抱歉，您似乎遇到了錯誤，對此深表歉意！

跳到新的一天

×

passages.name: Opening
passages.content:
"So, it's a deal?"

The pile of coins glints, even in the dim, smoky light of the tavern anteroom. It's easily two, maybe even three months' worth of pay.

This place must be desperate.

Despite trying to maintain a cold expression, you can feel a slight smile force its way across your face. The man sitting across from you - the magistrate of this town - stares with hope in his eyes.

"Deal," you grunt matter-of-factly.

The man exhales a breath he must have been holding for at least the last two minutes. He's older, but still strong and stocky looking, a short and unkempt beard on his chin.

"We were afraid it wouldn't be enough," he says, pushing the pile of coins towards you. "Ridinghood, our village, has been a peaceful little town for generations. This Wytch has cursed us all. Livestock missing, crops withering, marriages falling apart. We're at our wits end. When we heard the famous 'Blackwolf' was coming to town we gathered everything we could spare. You're our last hope!"

You let the smile linger for a moment before finishing the last swig of your drink. "People don't pay me for hope, they pay for results. I'll rid your town of this sorceress."

The man thanks you profusely and starts making his way out. Before he leaves, you call after him once more. "By the way, what was it you called her again? The red Wytch?"

His eyes dart around carefully, as if even saying the name summons ill fortune, "Uh, the Scarlet Wytch. On account of her long red hair."

With that he leaves you alone with a pile of gold and a mission to hunt a Wytch. You smirk to yourself at the name.

"The Scarlet Wytch of Ridinghood."

Leave

“所以，成交了？”

即使在酒館前廳昏暗、煙霧繚繞的燈光下，這堆硬幣也閃閃發光。這很容易相當於兩個月甚至三個月的薪水。

儘管你努力保持冷漠的表情，你還是能感覺到一絲微笑強行掠過你的臉龐。坐在你對面的那個人──這個鎮的法官──眼神裡充滿了希望。

「成交。」你實事求是地咕噥道。

男人呼出一口氣，他肯定至少在過去兩分鐘一直屏住呼吸。他年紀大了，但看起來仍然很強壯，很壯實，下巴上留著短而蓬亂的鬍子。

「我們擔心這還不夠，」他一邊說，一邊把一堆硬幣推向你。 「我們的村莊里丁胡德世世代代都是一個和平的小鎮。這個巫婆詛咒了我們所有人。牲畜失踪，莊稼枯萎，婚姻破裂。我們束手無策。當我們聽說著名的‘黑狼’要來鎮上時，我們收集了我們能剩下的一切。你是我們最後的希望！”

在喝完最後一口酒之前，你讓微笑停留了一會兒。 “人們付錢給我不是為了希望，而是為了結果。我會讓你的小鎮擺脫這個女巫。”

passages.name: MountainA
passages.content:
The birds and insects chirp merrily as you make your way up the steep mountain path. The scenic green trees against a blue sky make it hard to remember that dark sorcery dwells here. Knowing the danger, you don't let the serene sights distract you. You place every step carefully, aware of each snapped twig or rustle in the bushes - ready for an ambush at any moment...

Thankfully, nothing happens. Before long you find yourself at a clearing around the Wytch's cabin. It's small, and in good condition, despite the distance from town. Truth be told, you're not sure whether to feel relieved or worried by how average it is.

Investigate

值得慶幸的是，什麼也沒發生。不久後，你發現自己來到了巫妖小屋周圍的一片空地。儘管距離城鎮較遠，但它很小，而且狀況良好。說實話，你不確定是否會對它的平均水平感到放心或擔心。

passages.name: Relief
passages.content:
was not wrong, this place has definitely had an effect on you. You've never been as horny as often as you have been here. Your body is like a constantly coiled spring, ready to release at any moment - and ready to go again the very next moment.

You practically leap onto the bed, tearing your clothes off and freeing your body for debauchery and relief.

You're not even sure it was conscious desire that brought you upstairs - or if your body was doing the driving while your mind made excuses. Nevertheless, you're here, on the bed, undoing your buttons. Your breath is already ragged and your body tingling with desire. You know you couldn't stop yourself now, even if you wanted to.

You plop down on the bed, thankful for a brief rest. Absentmindedly, you run your hand across the smooth silk sheets, the cool, slippery surface sends a little tingle up your arm then back down your spine. You graze it again to repeat the pleasurable feeling. Enjoying the feeling immensely, you do it again...on your thigh...

...Then between your thighs. Everything feels so good here! Before long, your light grazing has turned into rubbing, and you find yourself undoing your buttons...

.Body

.Act

As you finish, you hear the telltale sound of footsteps coming up the path. In a panicked rush you clean up and head downstairs.

Back

Back

你幾乎跳到床上，脫掉衣服，釋放你的身體，盡情放蕩和放鬆。

你甚至不確定是有意識的慾望把你帶到了樓上——還是你的身體在開車，而你的思想卻在找藉口。然而，你卻在這裡，在床上，解開你的連結。你的呼吸已經變得急促，你的身體因慾望而刺痛。你知道你現在無法阻止自己，即使你想這麼做。

你撲通撲通地倒在床上，慶幸自己能短暫休息。你心不在焉地把手放在光滑的絲綢床單上，涼爽、光滑的表面讓你的手臂感到一陣刺痛，然後又順著脊椎回落。你再次輕撫它，重複這種愉悅的感覺。非常享受這種感覺，你又做了一次…在你的大腿上…

passages.name: DinnerFirst
passages.content: Soon enough, it's evening, and time for dinner. She heads to the cauldron, haphazardly dumping a basketful of raw meat and vegetables in. Confused, you watch as she leans down and whispers something into the pot. That same unearthly wind blows around the room and swirls over the pot. It shakes violently as the contents inside jump and convulse. In a few short moments, the whole cabin is filled with the delicious smell of warm stew. Despite a dozen demonstrations in the past day, you're still amazed at her magic - it even makes food. "Yes, I can even make stew," she says with a smile. You're not sure if she is reading your mind, or if your flabbergasted expression was obvious enough - probably the latter. She motions to a couple of bowls on the table, "Would you mind?" She plops down with a bounce at the table, as you serve portions for the both of you. "So, how was your first day?" she asks without irony through mouthfuls of dinner. She's talking as if you were a new farmhand, or a child back from their first day at school, instead of a prisoner. Curse her out Stay silent Play along
passages.content_zh: 很快，就到了晚上，該吃晚餐了。 她走向大鍋，隨意地把一籃生肉和蔬菜倒了進去。你困惑地看著她彎下腰，在鍋子裡低聲說了些什麼。同樣的神秘風在房間裡吹來，在鍋子上盤旋。隨著裡面的東西跳躍和抽搐，它劇烈地搖晃。不一會兒，整個船艙就充滿了熱燉菜的香味。儘管在過去的一天裡進行了十幾次演示，您仍然對她的魔力感到驚訝 - 它甚至可以製作食物。 「是的，我甚至會做燉菜，」她笑著說。你不確定她是否讀懂了你的心思，或者你驚愕的表情是否足夠明顯——可能是後者。 她指了指桌上的幾個碗，“你介意嗎？” 當你為你們倆分菜時，她在桌子上一蹦一跳地坐下。 「那麼，你第一天過得怎麼樣？」她一邊吃著晚餐，一邊毫無諷刺地問。她說話的語氣好像你是新來的農場工人，或是剛上學第一天回來的孩子，而不是囚犯。 詛咒她出去 保持沉默 一起玩

passages.name: Curse her out
passages.content: "Your soup be damned, wytch." you growl at her. For a moment, she looks genuinely hurt, before putting back on an aloof air. "You're so dramatic." You slam your fist on the table with a loud thud, "Dramatic?! You've trapped me here, you demon! Am I supposed to happily eat stew and pretend I'm not your prisoner?!" Completely unfazed, she takes her time to finish chewing. "Yes." Your fist grows tighter and your jaw clenches more, "I swear I will…" "Oh shut up." she cuts you off with a command, her spells compelling you to silence. "You will eat your stew silently." her words come slow and angry. "I didn't have to do this you know. I could have erased your mind, left you a drooling mess. I could have turned you into a frog. No, I instead chose to keep you here in hopes I can change your mind." "You call me unjust, a monster, YOU were the one who broke into my house looking to KILL me!" she slams down her spoon, and looks away, tired and upset. After a few moments, she lets out a long sigh. "I was so looking forward to fucking you half the night, but I'm too upset now. Finish up and sleep down here. You can speak again in the morning." She sulks off upstairs, leaving you alone with your thoughts and a pile of dishes. Go to sleep
passages.content_zh: 「你的湯該死，巫婆。」你對她咆哮。 有那麼一會兒，她看起來真的很受傷，然後又恢復了冷漠的樣子。 “你太戲劇化了。” 你用拳頭重重地敲在桌子上，“太戲劇化了？！你把我困在這裡了，你這個惡魔！我是不是應該高高興興地吃著燉菜，假裝我不是你的囚犯？！” 她完全不為所動，慢慢地咀嚼完畢。 “是的。” 你的拳頭握得更緊，下巴也咬得更緊：“我發誓我會…” 「噢，閉嘴。」她用命令打斷你，她的咒語迫使你保持沉默。 「你就靜靜地吃你的燉菜吧。」她的話語緩慢而憤怒。 「你知道，我沒必要這樣做。我本可以抹去你的思想，讓你流口水。我本可以把你變成一隻青蛙。不，我選擇把你留在這裡，希望我能改變你的想法。” 「你說我不公正，你是怪物，你就是闖入我家想要殺我的人！」她重重地放下勺子，移開視線，既疲倦又心煩意亂。 過了一會兒，她長長地嘆了口氣。 「我半個晚上都盼著操你，但我現在太心煩意亂了。幹完就在這兒睡吧。明天早上你再說話。” 她在樓上生悶氣，留下你獨自思考和一堆盤子。 睡覺

passages.name: Stay silent
passages.content: You sit silently, with her eyes on you, realizing that she will wait for you to answer. You grumble out a low, "Fine." She smiles at you, "So talkative. Well, I for one had a great day. I visited the blacksmith's son. Let me tell you, he is not only good at pounding iron." She finishes with the wink of her heavily made-up lashes. You almost choke on a bite of dinner at her lack of decorum, which she finds hilarious, laughing loudly at the far end of the table. "Oh, Blackwolf, you're so easy to rattle, it's adorable!" You clench your jaw and shoot her a stare...before realizing she's absolutely right, and just did it again. This makes you even angrier inside, but you choose to choke it down, and instead focus on your stew. She smiles at your restraint, "I think this is going to work out fine." You look back up with a cocked eyebrow, "Fine?" She explains, "You see, when some airquotes hero shows up to kill one of us, we usually just erase them, or change them into a frog or a book or something." She pauses to take a mouthful of stew, then continues talking while chewing it, "But that always seemed so excessive to me, I wondered if I could try rehabilitation instead. You, Blackwolf, are my experiment." "After all," she swallows and points the spoon at you accusingly, "you came here to kill me, I think you're getting off easy." The gravity of your situation washes over you, leaving you to sheepishly eat the rest of your stew in silence. Eventually, your bowls are empty, and your bellies are full. "Ah! I do make a mean stew! Now that dinner is done my lovely Blackwolf...I think it's time for dessert." Dessert "Ah! I do make a mean stew! Please clean up down here, and come to bed when finished." With that she leaves the mess and dishes as they are and heads upstairs. You finish cleaning and head up yourself later. Clean up then go upstairs to bed
passages.content_zh: 你靜靜地坐著，她的眼睛看著你，意識到她會等你回答。你低聲咕噥：“好吧。” 她對你笑了笑，「真健談，嗯，今天過得很開心，我拜訪了鐵匠的兒子，我告訴你，他不僅會打鐵。」最後，她眨了眨濃妝豔抹的睫毛。 你差點因為她的不禮貌而被一口晚餐噎住，她覺得這很搞笑，在桌子的另一端大聲笑起來。 “哦，黑狼，你真是太容易吵鬧了，真可愛！” 你咬緊牙關，瞪了她一眼……然後意識到她完全正確，然後又這麼做了。這讓你內心更加憤怒，但你選擇忍住，專注於燉菜。 她對你的克制微笑，“我想這會很順利。” 你抬起頭，挑眉：“可以嗎？” 她解釋說，“你看，當一些空語英雄出現並殺死我們中的一個人時，我們通常只是刪除它們，或者將它們變成一隻青蛙或一本書或其他東西。” 她停下來喝了一口燉菜，然後一邊嚼一邊繼續說話，“但這對我來說總是顯得太過分了，我想知道我是否可以嘗試康復。你，黑狼，是我的實驗品。” “畢竟，”她咽了口口水，用湯匙指責地指著你，“你來這裡是為了殺我，我想你很容易逃脫。” 處境的嚴重性淹沒了你，讓你羞怯地默默地吃掉剩下的燉菜。 最終，你的碗是空的，你的肚子是飽的。 「啊！我確實做了一道難吃的燉菜！現在晚餐已經做好了，我可愛的黑狼……我想是時候吃甜點了。” 甜點 「啊！我做的燉菜確實很糟糕！請清理一下這裡，完成後就上床睡覺。” 說完，她留下了亂七八糟的東西和盤子，然後上樓了。你完成清潔工作，稍後再出發。 收拾乾淨然後上樓睡覺

passages.name: Play along
passages.content: You cautiously examine her expression for sarcasm, but it seems a genuine question. "Not so bad, the chores weren't very hard." She lights up considerably at your reply, "See! I knew this would work out!" "Work out?" She nods, "You see, when some airquotes hero shows up to kill one of us, we usually just erase them, or change them into an animal or an object." She pauses to take a mouthful of stew, then continues talking while chewing it, "But that always seemed so excessive to me, I wondered if I could try rehabilitation instead of turning you into a frog." The gravity of your situation washes over you, as it dawns on you what could have been. She sees your expression drop, and laughs again, "Don't worry, I've never been into that frog thing. I have much more interesting kinks." Her expression changes into that sly smile and seductive eyes, "Speaking of which, I've had enough dinner, how about a little dessert?" Dessert "But that's for another day (wink). Please clean up down here, and come to bed when finished." With that she leaves the mess and dishes as they are and heads upstairs. You finish cleaning and head up yourself later. Head upstairs to bed
passages.content_zh: 你小心翼翼地觀察她的表情是否有諷刺意味，但這似乎是一個真正的問題。 “還不錯，家務活也不是很難。” 聽到你的回答，她高興極了，“看！我就知道這會成功！” “鍛鍊？” 她點點頭，“你看，當一些空語英雄出現要殺死我們中的一個人時，我們通常只是將他們刪除，或者將他們變成動物或物體。” 她停下來喝了一口燉菜，然後一邊嚼一邊繼續說：“但我總是覺得這太過分了，我想我是否可以嘗試康復，而不是把你變成青蛙。” 你處境的嚴重性籠罩著你，因為你逐漸明白了原本可能發生的事。 她看到你表情低落，又笑了，“別擔心，我從來沒有對青蛙感興趣過。我有更有趣的怪癖。” 她的表情變成了那狡黠的笑容和妖媚的眼神，“說起來，我的晚餐已經吃夠了，來點甜點怎麼樣？” 甜點 「但那是另一天了（眨眼）。請清理這裡，完成後上床睡覺。” 說完，她留下了亂七八糟的東西和盤子，然後上樓了。你完成清潔工作，稍後再出發。 上樓睡覺

passages.name: DinnerFirstDecision
passages.content:
The room is nearly pitch black, save for a little moonlight creeping in through the window.

You're exhausted, but sleep is the last thing on your mind. Physically today was not difficult, but all the changes have left your body feeling used and alien. More than your tired, you are emotionally drained. Stuck here with this woman whom you barely know, as she imprisons and enslaves you...you should absolutely despise her.

And yet, she has a point. With her power, she could have ended you a dozen times over, or subjected you to fate worse than death. Not that this forgives everything else she's done...

You squeeze your eyes closed, stuck in consideration, and decide to let sleep come. Moments before drifting off, your brain wanders to a final thought...

It could be worse, and she has been kind, I will play along.

I need to play along to find an escape.

I need to fight her with all my being.
passages.content_zh:
房間裡漆黑一片，只有微弱的月光從窗戶透進來。

你很累，但睡覺卻是你最不想做的事。今天身體上並不困難，但所有的變化都讓你的身體感覺被利用和陌生。不只是你的疲憊，你的情緒也被耗盡了。和這個你幾乎不認識的女人一起困在這裡，她囚禁你、奴役你……你絕對應該鄙視她。

然而，她說得有道理。以她的力量，她可能會殺死你十幾次，或讓你遭受比死亡更糟糕的命運。這並不是說她可以原諒她所做的一切...

你閉上眼睛，陷入沉思，決定睡覺。入睡前的片刻，你的大腦會浮現最後一個想法…

情況可能會更糟，而且她很友善，我會配合。

我需要一起玩才能找到逃脫的辦法。

我需要用我的全部力量來對抗她。

passages.name: Review
passages.content: .Message "Anyway, let's see how you did..." she begins her inspection of the room. "Let's see how you did..." She checks the fireplace, "A lovely, warm fire. Good." "I know it's not the dead of winter, but it would be nice to come home to a warm house at least." Pausing over the pot on the fire, she dips two fingers in, then licks them off...deliberately slow, making eye contact with you the entire time. "Mmmmmm, no points for originality, but it is delicious." Pausing over the pot, she waves away the black smoke of the badly burnt stew. "Well, at least you tried to make dinner, but you have to learn to stir every once in a while. No marks for this." She looks at the pot inside and shakes her head in disappointment. "I suppose dinner is on me again tonight? This is simply not acceptable, ." Moving around the rest of the room, she runs her fingers along the shelves checking for dust. Not finding any, she smiles, "Nice and clean, well done." Finding a mess, she "tsks" you several times. Finally she settles on the folded pile of laundry and smiles. "Excellent, finished washing! Though the folding is a little haphazard." Finally she gets to the laundry task and rolls her eyes. "And what, exactly, am I supposed to wear tomorrow? I need all the laundry washed, dried and folded! Now I'll have to waste some magic on that as well." "Well done, , you did everything perfectly." she says, but without the usual smiles or flair. You'd say she sounds sad if anything. "Did I do something wrong?" "Hmm? Oh, no not really, you did great." You're not sure what the issue is, but decide not to press it. You turn away and get ready for dinner...until a voice drifts up from behind you. "Well....now that you mention it..." You turn to see her making apologetic, almost puppy-dog eyes at you. A bad feeling creeps up in your belly. "You really have been doing well, so I will reward you as promised. But to be honest, you're doing a little too well. I was honestly looking forward to transforming you more. It really is so much fun." You close your eyes, realizing what's coming. "There's no way out of this, is there?" She looks upwards, as if genuinely giving it some thought before answering, "Nope!" Next "Well done, , you did everything perfectly...again!" she praises you lavishly, but there's something else to her voice. "Uh oh." You look up to see her giving you that same lost-puppy face. The one she makes when she wants to try something "new". "You're going to transform me again, aren't you?" you ask grimly. She nods a vigorously. "And you won't take no for an answer." More nodding. You roll your eyes. "Fine, what will it be this time?" Next All in all, she seems very pleased with your work, smiling and clapping. "Perfect! You deserve a reward!" Next $(function() {$("#layer8 img").attr('src', 'resources/avatar/layer8/' + State.variables.faceState + '/yelling.png')}); With each missed task she seems to grow more and more frustrated. "Gods, you didn’t finish a single chore today!" You start to argue, but she throws up a hand to stop you, "Yes I know you’ve come home with a belly full of magic - and who knows what else. I can feel it from here, I bet if I were a step closer, I could smell it too." That last part hurt a bit, but more than being embarrassed, you're angry. "What do you care? I followed your rules! You're just upset that I'm actually enjoying it!" "No, I want you to enjoy it, but this isn't enjoyment, it's addiction! That's literally all you did today! And it's not the first time either. Is that all you want to do? Go out and fuck all day?" "Yes!" You didn’t even need to think about it, the answer game straight out. You even surprised yourself with the admission. "Say it then, say what you want to be…" You feel the slight tingle of compulsion in her words, she’s forcing you to tell the truth…not that you were planning on hiding it, "I want to spend the rest of my life fucking people with this hot little body. I want to be a slut." "So be it…" You can feel the wind beginning to rise around you as she prepares a spell. Much later... "Well, I see you didn't do any cleaning today," she sighs and rubs the bridge of her nose. "Did you at least bring me some magic, or were you just completely useless?" Without waiting for an answer, she steps closer, holding out her hand to feel the magic within you, "Aaaand there it is, a bit of mag…" She stops mid-sentence, a look of surprise on her face, "Oh, , that's more than a bit. You've been busy!" As she holds out her hand, you feel that odd breezy feeling again, the same as when she uses her magic on you. The strange thing is, even though you can feel it blowing towards , you don't feel it behind you. Almost as if it's coming from you. When it finishes, closes her hand and takes a deep breath. Her voice is stern, though without the anger from earlier, "Well, you're off the hook today, , but not forever. You're here as punishment and as my helper. If you're just going to spend your days on your back in the village, we're going to have to alter our agreement." You want to shoot back that you'd been in several positions besides your back, but based on her tone, you decide it's probably best to keep it simple, "I understand." She side-eyes you for a moment before shaking it off and returning to a smile, "Alright then, magic gained, warning delivered, water under the bridge. What's for dinner?" Dinner With each inspection, she seems to get more upset, finally throwing her hands up in the air. "You didn't complete a single chore today! I have no clothes for tomorrow, no food for dinner..." She pauses a moment to regain her composure, rubbing the bridge of her nose. "You show no remorse, and worse, no willingness to change your ways...I didn't want to do this, but I don't see as I have any choice." You feel her magic begin to ebb around you, but it feels darker this time, more threatening than before. Punishment "Nevermind, I'm too angry for dinner. I'm going upstairs, you stay down here tonight!" She begins storming upstairs, but pauses midway, "I warn you, , continue this, and your punishment shall be far more severe!" Go to sleep "Well, I suppose you did some of what I asked. Were you able to make up the rest with a little "work" in town?" She holds out a hand towards you, 'feeling' the magic within you, "Oooh, ...that is...more than enough magic. You little minx, you." As she holds out her hand, you feel that odd breezy feeling again, the same as when she uses her magic on you. The strange thing is, even though you can feel it blowing towards , you don't feel it behind you. Almost as if it's coming from you. When it finishes, smiles, "I have to admit, I'm a little disappointed I don't get to "punish" you today, but fair's fair, that was a lot of magic. Heh, and you must be exhausted after a day like today!" She pauses to deliver a mischievous wink, "Now, what's for dinner?" Dinner "Well, I suppose you did some of what I asked. Were you able to make up the rest with a little "work" in town?" She holds out a hand towards you, 'feeling' the magic within you, "Oooh, not bad . Not enough, but not bad. At least you had a bit of fun." As she holds out her hand, you feel that odd breezy feeling again, the same as when she uses her magic on you. 你因為再次被稱為「女孩」而內心皺起眉頭，但決定不再碰運氣——因為她似乎對你的要求很友善。你耐心地等待她安頓下來並…做她計劃做的任何事情。 幾分鐘後，她換好衣服，撲通撲通地坐在桌邊，拿著一本書看。讓你仍然站著，等待，並且有點困惑。 最後，在感覺尷尬的漫長時間之後，你清了清喉嚨，“嗯，那麼你打算做點什麼嗎？” 她的眼睛從書的邊緣邪惡地窺視著。 「耐心點！我說過我會照顧你的。相信我，到時候你就試試吧，你會喜歡的。」她緩慢地眨了眨眼，結束了這一切。 她幫你安排了什麼？ 你確定你想要這個嗎？即使你的身體已經變成了女人的身體，但這並不代表你是女人…嗎？ 畢竟，在激烈的時刻投入身體的激情是一回事。但心甘情願地要求它感覺又是另一回事。需要它。想要它。 但這就是麻煩所在，你確實需要它，而且你絕對想要它。那種被填滿、被拉伸、被粗暴對待的感覺。被拋來拋去、搖晃著，直到你的大腦對一切都麻木了，除了那巨大的……堅硬的……每一次擊打的強烈快樂。 天啊，你現在想想就更慾火中燒了。是的，這就是你想要的。 你羞澀地回頭看了一眼，鼓起勇氣大聲說出來。 你甚至沒有機會就差點笑倒。 “別打擾了，不用你說。” 你低下頭，尷尬地咬著嘴唇，“有這麼明顯嗎？” 她又笑了，“你太糟糕了，女孩。我看到你的臉頰在燃燒，你像那樣咬著嘴唇。你甚至在搭帳篷！我打賭你的內褲都濕透了！” 你沒有真正注意到，但她絕對是對的。這種認識只會讓你的臉頰變得更明亮。 「你太過分了！你現在太可愛了，我想跳到你身上！趁我無法自拔之前，我們去吃晚飯吧。” 就像上次你要求打電話給樵夫一樣，你的臉頰燒得通紅——但這一次，不是尷尬，而是期待。 和以前一樣，你甚至無法發出請求。 看了你一眼，翻了個白眼。 「天哪，你太過分了！你又想要樵夫的圓木了，不是嗎？」 你微笑著，咬著嘴唇。 “只是不要太習慣那棵老橡樹，否則你可能無法享受森林的其餘部分，”她停頓了一下，嘆了口氣，“我並不是責怪你，那個人和他的……天哪，你讓我生氣了！讓我們在我們都發瘋之前去吃晚飯吧。” 晚餐 “你能……再給我一點時間嗎？我很難完成所有的……職責。” 微笑，這次看起來真的很同情。 「這可以理解，我對你的要求確實很多……今天你也很努力地完成任務，但我不應該讓你太輕鬆……” 她沉思了一會兒，突然想到一個主意，驚呼道：“我知道！我會跟你做一筆交易！如果你讓我再次改造你，我會給你更多的時間。這很公平，對吧？” 你甚至不知道從哪裡開始考慮整個情況的公平性……但你仍然需要回答。 交易 無協議 “你能……再給我一點時間嗎？我很難完成所有的……職責。” 微笑著對你聳聳肩，“當然……但你知道這件事。你有更多的時間，我可以和你一起玩一點。” 交易 無協議 “我在這裡開始感到幽閉恐懼症，我可以出去嗎，也許去城裡什麼的？” 她似乎思考了一分鐘，目光在你的身上上下掃視。 “當然。” 你準備好爭論並捍衛你的立場，她的同意如此輕易地讓你感到困惑，“什麼？真的嗎？” 「當然！我想沒有人會再認出你了，畢竟……我的小秘密守護者真是太好了。永遠不要告訴村民你的真實身份，關於我，這個小屋或魔法。” 一陣魔法之風短暫地吹過，你知道她所說的現在都是真的。 “這是一些金子。進城去儲備一些肉和蔬菜作為晚餐吧！” 晚餐 “我呃……進城了，但是我需要更多的錢。” 她瞇起眼睛看著你，“我早上不是給你了一些嗎？你都用在哪裡了？在酒吧？” 「呃……當然，都在酒吧。抱歉。」你低頭看著地板，盡量不進行目光接觸。 她重重地嘆了口氣，又遞給你幾枚硬幣，“呃，你可以把男孩帶出酒吧，但不能把酒吧帶出男孩……或女孩……或類似的東西。”她揮手示意，“總之，小心一點，像你這樣的小東西不能像以前那樣喝那麼多酒。” 她握住你的手，把硬幣放進去，但停了下來。 “你知道，這感覺不太對勁，我只是給你硬幣，沒有任何回報。我認為你欠我一點樂趣作為回報。你說呢？” 交易 無協議 “是的，是的，我們先吃點東西，然後就可以吃了。” 晚餐 “嗯，抱歉，你今天的魔力還不夠。我擔心你需要有人來幫助你……先給你補充能量。” （巨大而明顯的眨眼） 晚餐 提示：你需要發生性關係（與 之外的人）才能獲得更多魔法。 “你能教我魔法嗎？” 你期待著笑聲或一些精闢的笑話，但仍然保持沉默。她只是用若有所思的眼神盯著你。 「黑狼。那個自負、憤怒的野蠻人闖入我的房子，意圖在我自己的床上殺死我？我不會相信黑狼會用尖尖的棍子，更不用說魔法了。” 她的話很刺痛，更糟的是，因為你知道它們是真的。你獵殺那些不值得的生物，同時認為你是神給這個領域的禮物。 「對不起。如果我早知道……」你只能尖叫出來。 「我還沒完。我不會相信黑狼。但那已經不再是你了。當我決定通過剝奪你的力量和粗糙的外表來懲罰你時，我沒有意識到我會在內心找到一個善良、體貼的人。我會很自豪能夠訓練你，紅。” 「真的嗎？！」你跳起來擁抱她，甚至沒有等待重播。 “這麼可愛的東西我怎麼能拒絕呢？”她笑著把你剝下來，“現在去準備晚飯，吃完我們就開始。” 晚餐 “你能教我魔法嗎？” 她看著你，瞇著眼睛若有所思，“抱歉，你還沒準備好。魔法是一種偉大而可怕的力量，我不知道我是否可以信任你。做好你的家務，以表現出你的信任和奉獻，我們以後可以考慮。” 她轉身繼續她晚上的例行公事，讓你知道這件事沒有爭議。 “你能教我魔法嗎？” “老實說，我並沒有真正考慮過這一點。我們有一個小問題，你是個男孩。” “只有女孩才能成為巫師嗎？” “嗯……技術上不行，但實際上可以。說來話長。現在教你就是浪費時間。” 你感到失望，並且因為不知道「我…哦…我明白了」而感到有點愚蠢。 「哦，你看起來很難過！我感覺就像我剛剛踢了一隻小狗！我知道，也許我們可以幫你解決這個問題！” “我不是那個意思！” “你能教我魔法嗎？” 看了你一會兒，然後搖搖頭，“抱歉，你已經快準備好了，但還沒有完全準備好。你首先需要成為一個女人。” 「你什麼意思？你把我變成女人了。上次我檢查了一下，下面沒有雞雞！是我的胸部不夠大還是什麼？” 你並不是想搞笑，但她還是笑了，“這不是問題所在，但也不會有什麼壞處！我的意思是，你肯定是個女孩，但還不是女人。你需要魔法，為此，你需要與男人發生性關係。這部分由你來解決。” 她轉身要走，但頓了頓，「想想看，我也許知道什麼可以幫忙。你放心，我會處理好一切的！」她咯咯地笑著，繼續換晚禮服。 你耐心地等待她安頓下來並…做她計劃做的任何事情。 幾分鐘後，她換好衣服，撲通撲通地坐在桌邊，拿著一本書看。讓你仍然站著，等待，並且有點困惑。 最後，在感覺尷尬的漫長時間之後，你清了清喉嚨，“嗯，那你打算做點什麼嗎？” 她的眼睛從書的邊緣邪惡地窺視著。 「耐心點！我說過我會照顧你的。相信我，到時候你就試試吧，你會喜歡的。」她緩慢地眨了眨眼，結束了這一切。 她幫你安排了什麼？ 「那麼，吃飯吧！」她毫不停頓地說。讓你頭暈目眩，你的要求也用完。 晚餐

passages.content: "You can't keep me here!" That devilish smile slides across her plump red lips, "No, , I think you'll find that I can. That and much more." With that, you feel the tingle of magic rising around you again. .out .reply "It's this place! I'm just horny all the time! I can't work, I can't focus! It's impossible!" smiles, her eyes shining like she's just won a battle against you. "Oh I understand. If that little friend of yours is giving you so much trouble, maybe we can help you out with it." Your eyes go wide, realizing what she means. "Oh no! Not that!" She ignores your yell, "first, your punishment for failing your chores..." "And now, since you were so distracted by your naughty little friendpussy down there, let's do something about that." You're scared to ask again, knowing what the last time brought you...but then your cock is already gone. What more could she do? "I hate to say it, but I'm still too horny! I can't concentrate to do all the tasks you ask! And you can't exactly blame my 'male urges' anymore." One of her eyebrows lifts at that last part, and she pauses to think. "I suppose you're right , maybe it is just your nature. You take your punishment, and I'll think it over." "Now about your little itch shall we say. You're absolutely right! Us girls have our needs too! And I know just the thing to help. Don't you worry, I'll take care of everything!" she giggles and goes back to changing into her eveningwear. You wince internally at being called "girl" again, but decide not to push your luck - since it seems she's amiable to your request. You wait patiently for her to get settled in and…do whatever she plans to do. After a few minutes, she's finished changing and plops down at the table with a book to read. Leaving you still standing, waiting, and more than a little confused. Finally, after what feels like an embarrassingly long time, you clear your throat, "Um, so are you going to do anything?" Her eyes peek devilishly over the edge of the book. "Patience ! I said I'd take care of you. Trust me, and when the time comes, just try it, you'll like it." she finishes with a slow wink. What has she got planned for you? raises an eyebrow, "Oh? Are you sure you want to complain about that? You remember who I asked to help out last time? Or maybe that’s actually what you want…" Are you sure you want this? Even though your body has been transformed into a woman's, that doesn't mean you are a woman…or does it? After all, it's one thing to give into your body's passion in the heat of the moment. But it feels like another to willingly ask for it. To need it. To want it. But there's the trouble, you actually do need it, and you absolutely want it. That feeling of being filled and stretched and manhandled. Being thrown around and shaken until your mind is numb to everything but the intense pleasure of each stroke of that huge…hard… Gods, you're getting even hornier thinking about it now. Yes, this is what you want. has been analyzing your face this entire time, and shrugs, "Alright, you asked for it. Let's see if we can't give Hans a little more eye candy while we're at it." raises an eyebrow, "Again? I had no idea you'd enjoy it this much." Without even thinking about it, you instinctively bite your lip. You can even feel your face heat up as it turns red out of shame and excitement. just rolls her eyes, "Oh gods you've got it bad. FINE, I'll give you a little extra help for your date." You can feel your face turn even redder, but you hold your tongue…after all, it's not like she's all that wrong… "Oh, I think I know why." She says, seeming to float around you, arms wrapping around your waist. She cups her hands together over your crotch, sending a shiver of excitement racing up your spine. You're not sure if it's magic or her delicate touch, but an excited tingling is building between your legs. She seems to concentrate, and you feel that familiar tingle of her magic creeping up around you. "I think you paid a little too much attention to this than to your chores." "I don't have enough time! It's impossible to finish everything you ask." frowns, seeming upset. "Then I recommend you learn to work faster, . You think I don't know you spent half the day in the bedroom?" She reaches out and runs a lock of your hair through her hand, the familiar feel of magic ebbing through you, "Because you know the consequences when you don't." "I don't have enough time! It's impossible to finish everything you ask." smiles, for once actually looking sympathetic. "That's understandable, I ask a lot of you. Very well, I'll give you a little extra time tomorrow. And you might need it after this..." "It's your fault! I'm so tiny and weak now! I can hardly do anything!" frowns, seeming upset. "You think you have it difficult? Women have been doing these chores for a thousand years! And they do it with their husbands hounding and babies at their breast! You don't know the half of it….but you soon will..." With that, you feel the tingle of magic rising around you again. "There's no food! It was impossible to make any dinner!" you nearly shout, pointing at the empty table. "Shit, I completely forgot!" she exclaims, throwing her hands in the air. "I'm sorry , this one is on me. Argh, and I don't even have time to go to the market tomorrow! How about you just..." she trails off mid-sentence, her eyes flitting up and down your body. "...actually…why don't you go instead?" "What? Really?" "Sure! I don't want to spend half my day at the market, and afterall…My what a good little secret keeper you are. Never telling the villagers your real identity, about me, this cabin or magic." The wind of magic briefly blows by and you know what she says is now true. "If I can't say who I am, what will I do if somebody recognizes me?" "Oh, I'm not worried, I don't think anyone will recognize you…but good point. Just to make sure…" "Perfect! Now here's some money, I hope you have a nice day out on the town tomorrow!" "Ugh, fine I'll bring some back tomorrow. You can be so high maintenance ," she says with a giggle. You're not sure whether that was a joke or not. "Now for your punishment." "Punishment? Why? There was no food, this isn't fair! "Didn't we already discuss this? It's not supposed to be fair, it's supposed to be fun! Now hold still." "I uh…went to town,but I need more money." She narrows her eyes at you, "Didn't I give you some this morning? Wherever did you use it all? At the pub?" "Uh…sure, all at the pub. Sorry." you look down at the floor, trying not to make eye contact. She sighs heavily, passing you a few more coins, "Ugh, you can take the boy out of the bar, but not the bar out of the boy…or girl…or something like that." she waves the metaphor away, "Anyway, just be careful, a little thing like you can't handle as much liquor as you used to be able to." "Which reminds me…" "I need more magic, I don't have the time to do all my chores otherwise!" smiles, "I completely understand, but that's more of a you problem. You let your gaze drop, not wanting to admit the truth behind your request. She nods, "I thought so. First, let's take care of your punishment for incomplete chores." "And then there's the matter of turning you back into a proper wytch. Of course, this is only the equipment, you'll have to go get the magic yourself." "I need more magic, I don't have the time to do all my chores otherwise!" One of her eyebrows lifts as she side-eyes you, "An interesting problem, but I think you know how to handle it." "I do, but town is so far away, that takes up the same amount of time. There has to be an easier way." She pauses and thinks for a moment, "Well, I wouldn't say there's an easier way, but I know a faster one. If you're willing to try." It's your turn to side-eye, suspicious of her mischievous smile. But you relent, still wanting the help, "Okay, I'll try." "Excellent then, I'll set it up for tomorrow. And trust me, and when the time comes, just try it, you'll like it." she finishes with a slow wink. What has she got planned for you? She suddenly stops, "Oh! I almost forgot your punishment for your chores!" raises an eyebrow, "Oh? Are you sure you want to complain about that? Even though your body has been transformed into a woman's, that doesn't mean you are a woman…or does it? After all, it's one thing to give into your body's passion in the heat of the moment. But it feels like another to willingly ask for it. To need it. To want it. But there's the trouble, you actually do need it, and you absolutely want it. That feeling of being filled and stretched and manhandled. Being thrown around and shaken until your mind is numb to everything but the intense pleasure of each stroke of that huge…hard… Gods, you're getting even hornier thinking about it now. Yes, this is what you want. has been analyzing your face this entire time, and shrugs, "Alright, you asked for it. Let's see if we can't give Hans a little more eye candy while we're at it." raises an eyebrow, "Oh? Are you sure you want to complain about that? You remember who I asked to help out last time? Then again, maybe that's the reason you're asking, no?" Without even thinking about it, you instinctively bite your lip. You can even feel your face heat up as it turns red out of shame and excitement. just rolls her eyes, "Oh gods you've got it bad. FINE, I'll give you a little extra help for your date." You can feel your face turn even redder, but you hold your tongue…after all, it's not like she's all that wrong… "I went back into town to find out more about the hunter! I was trying to help!" you protest. "Oh? , that's very sweet, but I told you before, I've got everything under control." She pauses for a moment, "Oh gods, , I'm sorry, you look so sad. I appreciate your help! Tell me all about it after dinner." You hadn't realized you were looking sad until she mentioned it - but you're definitely pouting. Since when were you so emotional and expressive? She continues, "But first, your punishment for being late." "You're still going to change me? After I was helping out?" "Please , you should know by now I'll take any excuse to." She dusts her hands at a job done, and goes about changing her clothes and getting ready for dinner as if she hadn't just finished warping and changing your body. passages.content_zh: “你不能把我留在這裡！” 那邪惡的微笑滑過她豐滿的紅唇，“不，我想你會發現我可以。不僅如此，還有更多。” 隨之而來的是，你再次感受到魔法的刺痛感在你周圍升起。 。出去 .回覆 「就是這個地方！我一直很飢渴！我無法工作，我無法集中註意力！這不可能！” 微笑著，她的眼睛閃閃發光，就像她剛剛贏得了與你的戰鬥。 “哦，我明白了，如果你的那個小朋友給你帶來了這麼大的麻煩，也許我們可以幫你解決。” 你睜大眼睛，明白她的意思。 “哦不！不是那個！” 她無視你的喊叫，“首先，你因做家務失敗而受到的懲罰……” “現在，既然你被你那淘氣的小朋友的陰部搞得心煩意亂，我們就做點什麼吧。” 你害怕再次詢問，知道上次給你帶來了什麼......但你的雞巴已經消失了。她還能做什麼？ 「我不想這麼說，但我還是太飢渴了！我無法集中精力完成你要求的所有任務！而且你不能再責怪我的‘男性衝動’了。” 聽到最後一部分，她的一根眉毛揚了起來，她停下來思考。 “我想你是對的，也許這就是你的本性。你接受懲罰，我會考慮一下。” 「現在我們該談談你的小癢了。你說得完全正確！我們女孩也有我們的需要！我知道能幫上什麼忙。別擔心，我會處理好一切的！」她咯咯地笑著，繼續換晚禮服。 你因為再次被稱為「女孩」而內心皺起眉頭，但決定不再碰運氣——因為她似乎對你的要求很友善。你耐心地等待她安頓下來並…做她計劃做的任何事情。 幾分鐘後，她換好衣服，撲通撲通地坐在桌邊，拿著一本書看。讓你仍然站著，等待，並且有點困惑。 最後，在感覺尷尬的漫長時間之後，你清了清喉嚨，“嗯，那麼你打算做點什麼嗎？” 她的眼睛從書的邊緣邪惡地窺視著。 「耐心點！我說過我會照顧你的。相信我，到時候你就試試吧，你會喜歡的。」她緩慢地眨了眨眼，結束了這一切。 她幫你安排了什麼？ 挑眉，“哦？你確定要抱怨這個嗎？還記得我上次請誰幫忙嗎？或許這就是你想要的……” 你確定你想要這個嗎？即使你的身體已經變成了女人的身體，但這並不代表你是女人…嗎？ 畢竟，在激烈的時刻投入身體的激情是一回事。但心甘情願地要求它感覺又是另一回事。需要它。想要它。 但有一個問題，你確實需要它，而且你絕對想要它。那種被填滿、被拉伸、被粗暴對待的感覺。 Being thrown around and shaken until your mind is numb to everything but the intense pleasure of each stroke of that huge…hard… 天啊，你現在想想就更慾火中燒了。是的，這就是你想要的。 一直在分析你的臉，聳聳肩，“好吧，這是你自找的。讓我們看看我們能不能在這個過程中給漢斯多一點好看。” 揚起一邊眉毛，“又來了？沒想到你這麼喜歡。” 想都沒想，你本能地咬住了嘴唇。你甚至可以感覺到你的臉因羞恥和興奮而變紅。 只是翻了個白眼，“天啊，你搞砸了。好吧，我會給你的約會提供一些額外的幫助。” 你覺得自己的臉更紅了，但又忍住了……畢竟，她也沒有說錯什麼…… 「噢，我想我知道為什麼了。」她說，似乎漂浮在你周圍，雙臂摟著你的腰。她雙手合攏放在你的胯部，讓你的脊椎感到一陣興奮的顫抖。你不確定這是魔法還是她細膩的觸感，但你的雙腿之間正在產生一種興奮的刺痛感。她似乎全神貫注，你會感覺到她的魔法所帶來的熟悉的刺痛感在你周圍蔓延。 “我認為你對這件事的關注有點多​​於對你的家務事的關注。” “我時間不夠！不可能完成你要求的一切。” 皺著眉頭，看起來很不高興。 「那我建議你學會更快地工作，你以為我不知道你在臥室里呆了半天嗎？」她伸出手，撫過你的一綹頭髮，熟悉的魔法感覺在你身上消退，“因為你知道不這樣做的後果。” “我時間不夠！不可能完成你要求的一切。” 微笑，這次看起來真的很同情。 「這可以理解，我對你的要求很多。很好，明天我會給你一點額外的時間。之後你可能會需要它...」 “都是你的錯！我現在這麼弱小！我幾乎什麼都做不了！” 皺著眉頭，看起來很不高興。 「你認為你有困難嗎？女人做這些家務已經有一千年了！而且她們在丈夫的追捕和嬰兒的哺乳下做這些事！你不知道其中的一半……但你很快就會……” 隨之而來的是，你再次感受到魔法的刺痛感在你周圍升起。 「沒有食物了！連晚餐都做不成！」你指著空桌差點喊出來。 「糟糕，我完全忘記了！」她大聲喊道，雙手舉向空中。 「抱歉，這個是我的。唉，我明天連去市場的時間都沒有！那你就……」她說到一半就停了下來，目光在你的身上掃來掃去。 “……其實……你為什麼不去呢？” “什麼？真的嗎？” 「當然！我不想在市場上花半天時間，畢竟……我的小秘密守護者真是太好了。永遠不要告訴村民你的真實身份，關於我，這個小屋或魔法。” 魔法之風短暫地吹過，你知道她所說的現在都是真的。 “如果我不能說出我是誰，如果有人認出了我怎麼辦？” “哦，我不擔心，我不認為有人會認出你……但很好。只是為了確保……” 「完美！現在這是一些錢，希望你明天在城裡度過愉快的一天！” 「呃，好吧，我明天帶一些回來。你真是太難伺候了，」她咯咯笑著說。你不確定這是否是個玩笑。 “現在是對你的懲罰。” 「懲罰？為什麼？沒有食物，這不公平！ “我們不是已經討論過了嗎？這不應該是公平的，它應該是有趣的！現在別動。” “我呃……進城了，但是我需要更多的錢。” 她瞇起眼睛看著你，“我早上不是給你了一些嗎？你都用在哪裡了？在酒吧？” 「呃……當然，都在酒吧。抱歉。」你低頭看著地板，盡量不進行目光接觸。 她重重地嘆了口氣，又遞給你幾枚硬幣，“呃，你可以把男孩帶出酒吧，但不能把酒吧帶出男孩……或女孩……或類似的東西。”她揮手示意，“不管怎樣，小心一點，像你這樣的小東西，不能像以前那樣喝那麼多酒。” “這讓我想起了…” “我需要更多的魔法，否則我沒有時間做所有的家務事！” 微笑著，“我完全理解，但這更多的是你的問題。我不會只是免費給你魔法。你知道你需要什麼才能重新加入魔法姐妹會。但當你問的時候你已經知道了，不是嗎？” 你垂下目光，不想承認你的請求背後的真相。 她點點頭，“我也是這麼想的。首先，我們來處理一下你因家務不完整而受到的懲罰。” “然後就是讓你變回真正的巫師了。當然，這只是裝備，你還得自己去獲取魔法。” “我需要更多的魔法，否則我沒有時間做所有的家務事！” 當她側視著你時，她的一根眉毛揚了起來，“這是一個有趣的問題，但我認為你知道如何處理它。” “我願意，但是城鎮太遠了，花費同樣多的時間。必須有一個更簡單的方法。” 她停頓了一下，想了想，“嗯，我不會說有更簡單的方法，但我知道一個更快的方法。如果你願意嘗試的話。” 現在輪到你側目，對她頑皮的微笑表示懷疑。但你態度軟化了，仍然需要幫助，“好吧，我會嘗試的。” 「那就太好了，我明天就安排一下。相信我，到時候就試試吧，你會喜歡的。」她緩慢地眨了眨眼，結束了這一切。 她幫你安排了什麼？ 她突然停了下來，“哦！我差點忘了你對你做家務的懲罰了！” 挑眉，“哦？你確定要抱怨嗎？你還記得我上次請誰幫忙嗎？或許這就是你想要的……” 你確定你想要這個嗎？即使你的身體已經變成了女人的身體，但這並不代表你是女人…嗎？ 畢竟，在激烈的時刻投入身體的激情是一回事。但心甘情願地要求它感覺又是另一回事。需要它。想要它。 但有一個問題，你確實需要它，而且你絕對想要它。那種被填滿、被拉伸、被粗暴對待的感覺。被拋來拋去、搖晃著，直到你的大腦對一切都麻木了，除了那巨大的……堅硬的……每一次擊打的強烈快樂。 天啊，你現在想想就更慾火中燒了。是的，這就是你想要的。 一直在分析你的臉，聳聳肩，“好吧，這是你自找的。讓我們看看我們能不能在這個過程中給漢斯多一點好看。” 揚起眉毛，“哦？你確定要抱怨這個嗎？你還記得我上次請誰幫忙嗎？話又說回來，也許這就是你問的原因，不是嗎？” 想都沒想，你本能地咬住了嘴唇。你甚至可以感覺到你的臉因羞恥和興奮而變紅。 只是翻了個白眼，“天啊，你搞砸了。好吧，我會給你的約會提供一些額外的幫助。” 你覺得自己的臉更紅了，但又忍住了……畢竟，她也沒有說錯什麼…… 「我回到城裡是為了了解更多關於獵人的資訊！我是想幫忙！」你抗議。 「哦？，真是太好了，不過我之前就告訴過你了，一切都在我的掌控之中。” 她停頓了一下，“天哪，我很抱歉，你看起來很傷心。我很感謝你的幫助！晚餐後告訴我一切。” 直到她提到這件事之前，你都沒有意識到自己看起來很悲傷——但你肯定是在嘟嘴。從什麼時候起你變得如此情緒化、善於表達？ 她繼續說道，“但首先，你遲到的懲罰。” “在我幫忙之後你還要改變我嗎？” “拜託，你現在應該知道我會找任何藉口。” 她拍完手上的灰塵，然後去換衣服，準備吃晚飯，就好像她剛剛完成了變形和改變你的身體一樣。 你完全被所有的變化迷惑了，只能點頭並跟隨。 晚餐

passages.name: SleepDown
passages.content:
As the fire fades, the room slowly dims, eventually leaving you alone in the dark and cold.

There is no sofa or bench, so you do the best you can with a makeshift pillow and blankets from 's discarded clothing.

Eventually you drift off, but spend a long night restless and shivering.

Alone with your thoughts...

Drift off to sleep
passages.content_zh:
隨著火勢減弱，房間慢慢變暗，最終只剩下你獨自一人在黑暗和寒冷中。

沒有沙發或長凳，所以你只能用廢棄的衣服做的臨時枕頭和毯子。

最後你睡著了，但整個夜晚都焦躁不安，全身發抖。

獨自一人與你的想法...

漸漸入睡

passages.name: Equipment Change
passages.content: She seems to float around you, arms wrapping around your waist. She cups her hands together over your crotch, sending a shiver of excitement racing up your spine. You're not sure if it's magic or her delicate touch, but an excited tingling is building between your legs. She seems to concentrate, and you feel that familiar tingle of her magic creeping up around you. She dusts her hands at a job done, and goes about changing her clothes and getting ready for dinner as if she hadn't just finished warping and changing your body. Completely disoriented by all the changes, you only manage to nod and follow along. Dinner
passages.content_zh: 她似乎漂浮在你周圍，雙臂環抱著你的腰。她雙手合攏放在你的胯部，讓你的脊椎感到一陣興奮的顫抖。你不確定這是魔法還是她細膩的觸感，但你的雙腿之間正在產生一種興奮的刺痛感。她似乎全神貫注，你會感覺到她的魔法所帶來的熟悉的刺痛感在你周圍蔓延。 她拍完手上的灰塵，然後去換衣服，準備吃晚飯，就好像她剛剛完成了變形和改變你的身體一樣。 你完全被所有的變化迷惑了，只能點頭並跟隨。 晚餐

passages.name: DogEnd
passages.content: "Maybe I was just a fool to hope." You look over at . Her expression is taught and hard, but her eyes show a hint of sadness. "What?" "Just what I said. I was hoping there was more to you, . I didn’t want to believe that all you had inside was anger and hate. But even after all this time, that’s all I get from you." "That’s all there is! You act like I’m supposed to enjoy this, being trapped here with you. Of course I’m full of hate and anger. I hate being trapped here! I hate being imprisoned! And I hate you for doing it to me." "I see that now, and that you'll never change." "The only changes here are the ones you’ve forced on me. You’ll never change how I feel about you!" She sighs heavily, though you’re somewhere between frustration and exhaustion. "So be it." Your fate... Your fate...
passages.content_zh: “也許我只是個傻瓜才抱有希望。” 你看過去。她的表情很教誨，很嚴厲，但眼裡卻流露出一絲悲傷。 “什麼？” 「正如我所說的。我希望你能有更多。我不想相信你內心只有憤怒和仇恨。但即使過了這麼久，這就是我從你那裡得到的一切。” 「僅此而已！你表現得好像我應該享受這樣，和你一起被困在這裡。當然，我充滿了仇恨和憤怒。我討厭被困在這裡！我討厭被監禁！我討厭你對我這樣做。” “我現在明白了，你永遠不會改變。” 「這裡唯一的改變是你強加給我的。你永遠不會改變我對你的感覺！” 她重重地嘆了口氣，儘管你的心情介於沮喪和疲憊之間。 “就這樣吧。” 你的命運... 你的命運...

passages.name: WakeUpAlone
passages.content:
Day

You wake up at the sunrise, a bright beam of light creeping in the window and hitting you square in the face.

As rude an awakening as it is, you appreciate the warmth after a long, chilly night on the floor, surrounded by the mess you're expected to clean up again today. You sigh heavily and try to stretch out the kinks and aches of the night.

Not long after, you hear creaking on the stairs as  is finally awake and coming down, all smiles despite her anger last night.

Head Downstairs

Greet

Greet

Greet
passages.content_zh:
日

你在日出時醒來，一束明亮的光線爬進窗戶，照在你的臉上。

儘管這是一次粗魯的覺醒，但在地板上度過了漫長而寒冷的一夜後，你很享受溫暖，周圍都是你今天需要再次清理的爛攤子。你重重地嘆了口氣，試圖緩解夜晚的糾結和疼痛。

不久之後，你聽到樓梯上吱吱作響的聲音，她終於醒來併下來了，儘管她昨晚很生氣，但她還是滿臉笑容。

下樓

問候

問候

問候

passages.name: Dinner-Name
passages.content: Soon enough, it's evening, and time for dinner. She heads to the cauldron, haphazardly dumping a basketful of raw meat and vegetables in. Confused, you watch as she leans down and whispers something into the pot. That same unearthly wind blows around the room and swirls over the pot. It shakes violently as the contents inside jump and convulse. In a few short moments, the whole cabin is filled with the delicious smell of warm stew. Despite a dozen demonstrations in the past day, you're still amazed at her magic. You grab a couple of bowls and silverware and serve portions for each of you, while she plops down in her chair with a bounce. "I'm so hungry! So what should we talk about tonight to chew the fat?" You pause for a moment to think, and realize you basically know nothing about her. "Ok, tell me a little about yourself." A look of genuine surprise washes over her. "Me?" "Yeah, I mean, if we're going to be here together for a while, we should get to know each other.." Her surprise melts into a soft smile. "Wow, , that's surprisingly sweet of you. So what is it you wanted to know?" "I suppose I should start with your real name." Her face turns a little shy, then after a short pause, "Cassandra. Cassandra Smith." You burst out laughing, "Smith?" "Hey, don't laugh! What's wrong with Smith?" "Nothing, nothing wrong...it's just, so normal. I expected something more, I don't know...magical? Like...Starloom or Emberflower or something like that." She snerks in laughter along with you, "Starloom? I'll take normal any day over that. Besides, we can't all be as blessed with nicknames as The Blackwolf." "Oh, I don't know, the Scarlet Wytch isn't bad at all." She stops laughing as her smile fades, and she stares down into her stew. "No, I suppose not." You're not sure why, but you can see she isn't a fan of her title. Try to Empathize Play it off
passages.content_zh: 很快，就到了晚上，該吃晚餐了。 她走向大鍋，隨意地把一籃生肉和蔬菜倒了進去。你困惑地看著她彎下腰，在鍋子裡低聲說了些什麼。同樣的神秘風在房間裡吹來，在鍋子上盤旋。隨著裡面的東西跳躍和抽搐，它劇烈地搖晃。不一會兒，整個船艙就充滿了熱燉菜的香味。儘管在過去的一天裡進行了十幾次演示，你仍然對她的魔力感到驚訝。 你們抓起幾個碗和銀器，為你們每人分了一份，而她則一屁股坐在椅子上。 “我好餓啊！那麼今晚我們該聊點什麼來嚼脂肪呢？” 你停下來想了一會兒，發現你對她基本上一無所知。 “好吧，告訴我一些關於你自己的事。” 她臉上流露出真正的驚訝之色。 “我？” 「是的，我的意思是，如果我們要在一起一段時間，我們就應該互相了解一下……” 她的驚訝化為溫柔的微笑。 “哇，你真是太可愛了。那你想知道什麼？” “我想我應該從你的真名開始。” 她的臉變得有點害羞，短暫的停頓後，“卡桑德拉。卡桑德拉·史密斯。” 你突然大笑起來：“史密斯？” “嘿，別笑！史密斯怎麼了？” 「沒什麼，沒什麼問題……只是，太正常了。我期待更多的東西，我不知道……神奇嗎？比如……Starloom或Emberflower或類似的東西。” 她和你一起偷笑，“Starloom？我會在任何一天恢復正常。此外，我們不可能都像黑狼一樣有幸擁有綽號。” “哦，我不知道，紅女巫一點也不壞。” 當她的笑容消失時，她停止了笑，她低頭凝視著她的燉菜。 “不，我想不會。” 你不知道為什麼，但你可以看出她不喜歡她的頭銜。 嘗試換位思考 玩掉它

passages.name: Try to Empathize
passages.content: "I'm sorry, I didn't realize you didn't like it." "Don't worry about it, it's fine. There are far worse things for wytches to be called." You realize you don't know her past, and how hard things may have been for her...how hard they still might be. You find yourself sympathizing with her. Finally after a long while thinking, you speak up softly, "Well in that case, what would you like me to call you?" The look of joy that washes over her is immense, she smiles nearly with tears in her eyes. "Cassandra would be great." You finish dinner shortly after, and you automatically start cleaning up. She comes up behind you and wraps her arms around your waist. "Leave that for tomorrow. You deserve a little special treatment tonight." Dessert You finish dinner shortly after, and you automatically start cleaning up. You're surprised by her arms wrapping around your waist. "I just wanted to say thank you. Here I thought I was teaching you a lesson." With that she leaves the mess and dishes as they are and heads upstairs, smiling the whole time. Head upstairs to bed
passages.content_zh: “抱歉，我没发现你不喜欢。” “別擔心，沒關係。對於女巫來說，還有更糟糕的稱呼。” 你意識到你不了解她的過去，也不知道事情對她來說有多困難......它們仍然可能有多困難。你发现自己很同情她。 想了半天，你終於輕聲開口：“那麼，你想讓我怎麼稱呼你呢？” 她的臉上洋溢著巨大的喜悅，她微笑著，眼裡幾乎含著淚。 “卡桑德拉会很棒。” 不久後你吃完晚飯，你自然而然地開始打掃。 她走到你身后，用双臂搂住你的腰。 「留到明天吧。今晚你應該得到一點特殊待遇。” 甜點 不久後你吃完晚飯，你自然而然地開始打掃。 你驚訝地發現她的手臂環住了你的腰。 “我只是想說謝謝。我以為我是在教訓你。” 說完，她把亂七八糟的東西和盤子留在原樣，一直微笑著上樓。 上樓睡覺

passages.name: Play it off
passages.content: Seeing she's upset, you decide to try and play it off. "Hey! Don't worry about it, it's fine. There are far worse things for wytches to be called." "Yes, that's also very true," she replies darkly. Seems you've hit on a sore spot. You decide to play it safe and let dinner pass by in silence. When everything is finished, you automatically start cleaning up. She comes up behind you and starts tugging at your waistband. You turn to see that sly smile back on her face, "C'mon upstairs. I need your...help to take my mind off things. By the way, you can call me Cassandra." Dessert You finish dinner shortly after, and you automatically start cleaning up. She's calmed down enough to thank you for dinner and cleanup. While she's heading upstairs to bed, she pauses with a smile and says, "By the way, you can call me Cassandra." Finish cleaning, and head upstairs to bed
passages.content_zh: 你看到她不高興，你決定嘗試假裝。 “嘿！別擔心，沒關係。對女巫來說，還有更糟糕的事情。” 「是的，這也是真的，」她陰沉地回答。 看來你已經戳中痛了。你決定謹慎行事，讓晚餐安靜地過去。 當一切都完成後，你會自動開始清理。 她走到你身後，開始拉你的皮帶。 你轉身看到她臉上又露出狡猾的微笑，“上樓來吧。我需要你……幫我轉移注意力。順便說一句，你可以叫我卡桑德拉。” 甜點 不久後你吃完晚飯，你自然而然地開始打掃。 她已經平靜下來，感謝你為我們準備了晚餐和清理工作。當她上樓睡覺時，她停了下來，微笑著說：“順便說一句，你可以叫我卡桑德拉。” 打掃完，上樓睡覺

passages.name: SleepUp
passages.content:
By the time you make it upstairs, she's already in the bed snoring deeply.

Carefully you slip into the bed, as quiet as possible.

Alone with your thoughts...

Drift off to sleep
passages.content_zh:
等你上樓的時候，她已經躺在床上打鼾了。

你小心翼翼地鑽進床上，盡可能安靜。

獨自一人與你的想法...

漸漸入睡

passages.name: Dinner-NameDecision
passages.content:
The room is nearly pitch black, save for a little moonlight creeping in through the window.

Another day trapped here with . But she seems to have warmed up to you a little, even given you her name. She seems to think of you more as a person than a prisoner.

As you begin to drift off, you're left wondering, do you feel the same?

Yes, she is a person, and I'll call her Cassandra from now on.

No, she's still trapping me here, and I won't show her the respect of a name.
passages.content_zh:
房間裡漆黑一片，只有微弱的月光從窗戶透進來。

又一天被困在這裡。但她似乎對你有點好感了，甚至給了你她的名字。她似乎更多地將你視為一個人而不是一個囚犯。

當你開始入睡時，你會想，你也有同樣的感覺嗎？

是的，她是一個人，從現在開始我就叫她卡桑德拉。

不，她還是把我困在這裡，我不會對她表示尊重。

passages.name: DinnerDefault-Good
passages.content: Soon enough, it's evening, and time for dinner. You grab a couple of bowls and silverware and serve portions for each of you, while she plops down in her chair with a bounce. It's a surprisingly engaging dinner conversation. You and talk about your days, your lives, and dozens of other topics. You even find yourself laughing more than once and...actually enjoying her company. Is this real? Yes, you're having fun No, but she doesn't need to know that. No!
passages.content_zh: 很快，就到了晚上，該吃晚餐了。 你們抓起幾個碗和銀器，為你們每人分了一份，而她則一屁股坐在椅子上。 這是一次令人驚訝的有趣的晚餐談話。你們談論你們的日子、你們的生活以及許多其他話題。你甚至發現自己不只一次地笑，而且……真的很享受她的陪伴。這是真的嗎？ 是的，你玩得很開心 不，但她不需要知道這一點。 不！

passages.name: Enterfirst
passages.content:
You very slowly and cautiously push the door open, careful to not let it creak.

The dimly lit interior is again average for a small cabin. A table and chairs sit across from a hearth. One window, one door, and a staircase - likely leading to the bedroom. The most notable detail you see is that it's an absolute mess. Ashes piled in the hearth; clothes, books, scrolls and dishes strewn about carelessly; it looks like it hasn't had a good cleaning in weeks or months. Abandoned?

You look around carefully and silently - no easy task among the litter all over the floor. On the table are the remnants of a bowl of soup. It has a thick skin on top, but no mold, and the coals in the hearth still have some heat. Someone was here at least a day ago, if not this morning.

As you near the staircase, you hear the quiet shuffle of fabric and creak of furniture from above. Fortune smiles, you may have caught the Wytch sleeping in bed!

Go upstairs
passages.content_zh:
你非常緩慢而小心地推門，小心不要讓它發出吱吱聲。

對小木屋來說，昏暗的內部空間又是平均。壁爐對面有一張桌子和椅子。一扇窗戶、一扇門和一個樓梯——可能通往臥室。你看到的最值得注意的細節是它絕對是一團糟。爐子裡堆著灰燼；衣服、書籍、捲軸和盤子隨意散落；看起來幾週或幾個月都沒有好好清潔過。棄？

你靜靜地仔細環顧四周——在滿地的垃圾中，這可不是一件容易的事。桌上還剩下一碗湯。上面有厚厚的皮，但沒有發黴，爐膛裡的煤還有點熱度。如果今天早上沒有的話，至少一天前就有人來過這裡。

當你靠近樓梯時，你會聽到上面傳來織物安靜的拖曳聲和家具的吱吱聲。幸運女神微笑了，你可能發現了正在床上睡覺的巫婆！

上樓去

passages.name: UpstairsFirst
passages.content: Step by step, at an agonizingly slow pace, you make your way up the stairs. Careful not to make the slightest sound. … The bedroom is small, and save for a few bookshelves and a tiny closet to the side, it is almost entirely filled by a huge, down-stuffed bed. Sprawled out on the bed is a beautiful woman, sleeping soundly. Long and lithe limbs with a perfect balance of softness and muscle. A gently curving waist that flares out to a generous set of sensual hips. The breasts are larger than average and perky enough to point upwards even laying down. She's absolutely stunning, but she's not the Wytch. For one thing, her hair is pink. And her skin is purple. And she has horns. And a massive cock. Your face skews up at the lewd figure before you, a demon. This might be the Wytch's familiar...or just a plaything contracted from dark powers. She stirs slightly with a long, sensual "Mmmmmmmm" That huge appendage between her legs twitches and begins to inflate, "Mistress, you're back earl…" As her eyes flutter open she sees you, weapon raised and ready to strike. A look of surprise flashes through her eyes, before being replaced with one of fury. "YOU WILL NOT HARM MY MISTRESS!" she shrieks at you, leaping up from the bed with inhuman speed! Honed instinct takes over. In an instant, she is on you. Her claws wrapped around your throat, perfect body pressed up against your armor. The next instant she stops, your sword having found its mark - straight through her belly. She moans again - still managing to sound wanton and lustful, even in her death throes. Flame and smoke pours out the wound and consumes her in a burst. Within seconds, it's over and the demon is banished back to her realm. You barely have time to catch your breath when you hear a sound downstairs. "Beryl! I'm home!" "Shit" Hide
passages.content_zh: 你一步步走上樓梯，速度慢得令人痛苦。小心不要發出絲毫聲音。 …… 臥室很小，除了幾個書架和旁邊的一個小壁櫥外，幾乎完全被一張巨大的羽絨床填滿。 床上躺著一個美麗的女人，睡得香甜。四肢修長柔軟，柔軟度與肌肉達到完美平衡。輕輕彎曲的腰部向外展開，露出性感的臀部。乳房比一般人大，即使躺著也能向上挺立。她絕對令人驚嘆，但她不是女巫。 一方面，她的頭髮是粉紅色的。 而且她的皮膚是紫色的。 她有角。 還有一隻巨大的公雞。 你的臉歪向眼前這個淫蕩的身影，一個惡魔。這可能是女巫的使魔……或只是從黑暗力量契約而來的玩物。 她輕輕地動了動，發出一聲長而性感的“嗯嗯嗯” 她兩腿間那巨大的附屬物抽搐起來，開始膨脹，“夫人，伯爵您回來了……” 當她睜開眼睛時，她看到了你，舉起武器準備攻擊。她的眼眸中閃過一絲驚訝，隨後又被憤怒取代。 「你不准傷害我的女主人！」她對你尖叫，以非人的速度從床上跳起來！ 磨練的本能佔了上風。 瞬間，她就撲到你身上了。她的爪子抓住了你的喉嚨，完美的身體壓在你的盔甲上。 就在她停下來的瞬間，你的劍已經找到了目標——直接刺穿了她的腹部。 她再次呻吟──即使在死前的陣痛中，她的聲音仍顯得肆意而淫蕩。火焰和煙霧從傷口中湧出，一下子吞噬她。幾秒鐘之內，一切就結束了，惡魔被放逐回她的領域。 你還來不及喘口氣，就聽到樓下有聲音。 “貝麗爾！我回來了！” “媽的” 隱藏

passages.name: HideFirst
passages.content: You can hear her rummaging about downstairs. Followed by the sound of something breaking and a string of profanities. "Gods damn it all, we need somebody to clean this place up!" You have a few seconds to hide and prepare an ambush. Bed? Too open. Under the bed? Not enough room, bad angle. Closet? Closet. There's barely enough room for you to fit, but you manage to squeeze in, leaving only the slightest crack to see out of. Just in time too, as you can hear the other person coming up the stairs. "Beryl, have you spent the whole day in bed? You'd better at least be hard and ready for me." As soon as she enters, you know it's the Wytch. The descriptions match her perfectly. Beautiful, enchanting eyes, long scarlet hair, and a massive pair of perfect breasts. She stops in confusion at not finding her companion, just a step too far for an attack. Just a little closer… "Beryl?" her eyes scan the room, stopping on the cracked door of the closet. A bead of sweat forms on your brow. "Beryl, are you hiding in the closet? And why does the room stink of...sulfur…" A look of realization seems to cross over her, but rather than anger or fear, she smiles. "My,what a playful little game, with you refusing to come out of the closet like that." "Heh, the better to surprise you." you think to yourself. She steps forward, that smile growing playfully. You feel a breeze blowing past the closet doors against your face. Now is your chance! You burst from the closet to swing at her! Except that you don't. Your arms spasm and your sword jerks, knocking the closet open wide, but despite all your efforts, your legs will not move. "I told you you'd refuse to leave the closet, magic can be very persuasive." she stops drawing closer, but the devilish smile remains. Then her gaze drifts downward, "Dangerous looking weapon you have there." Your grip tightens around your sword, "the better to run you through with, Wytch!" "Hardly what I meant, but you make a good point." A look of concentration draws over her. "My,what an impressive sword and suit of armor you have. Too bad you forgot to bring them." Something about her words...unnatural...commanding. Not just commanding you, but as the phrase echoes in the small room, she seems to be commanding reality itself. Change
passages.content_zh: 你可以聽到她在樓下翻找的聲音。隨之而來的是東西破碎的聲音和一連串的髒話。 「該死的，我們需要有人來清理這個地方！” 你有幾秒鐘的時間來隱藏並準備伏擊。 床？太開放了。 床底下？空間不夠，角度不好。 壁櫥？壁櫥。 幾乎沒有足夠的空間讓你進去，但你還是設法擠了進去，只留下一點縫隙可以看到外面。也很及時，因為你可以聽到另一個人上樓梯的聲音。 “貝麗爾，你在床上躺了一整天了嗎？你最好至少要堅強起來，為我做好準備。” 她一進來，你就知道是女巫。這些描述與她完美匹配。美麗迷人的眼睛，猩紅色的長髮，還有一對巨大完美的乳房。 她困惑地停下來，因為沒有找到她的同伴，距離攻擊還差一步。再近一點… 「綠寶石？」她的目光掃視著房間，最後停在了壁櫥開裂的門上。你的額頭上滲出一滴汗珠。 「Beryl，你躲在衣櫥裡嗎？為什麼房間裡有…硫磺味…」 她似乎意識到了這一點，但她並沒有憤怒或恐懼，而是微笑著。 “天哪，真是個好玩的小遊戲，你拒絕像這樣出櫃。” 「呵呵，給你一個驚喜就更好了。」你心裡想。 她向前踏了一步，臉上的笑容變得俏皮起來。你感覺到一陣微風吹過衣櫃門，拂過你的臉。現在你的機會來了！你從衣櫃裡衝出來向她揮拳！ 除非你不這樣做。你的手臂痙攣，你的劍猛烈地抽動，把壁櫥撞得大開，但儘管你付出了所有的努力，你的腿還是動不了。 「我告訴過你會拒絕離開衣櫃，魔法很有說服力。」她不再靠近，但惡魔般的微笑依然存在。然後她的目光垂下，“你那裡有看起來很危險的武器。” 你握緊了劍，“這樣才能更好地刺穿你，巫妖！” 「雖然不是我的意思，但你說得很好。」一種專注的神情籠罩著她。 “哎呀，你的劍和鎧甲好厲害啊，可惜你忘記帶了。” 她的話有些……不自然……命令性。不僅僅是命令你，而且當這句話在小房間裡迴響時，她似乎在命令現實本身。 改變

passages.name: ChangeFirst
passages.content: A cold wind blows over you, slowly growing in strength. As it blows stronger, you hear your armor buckle and creak. Suddenly, impossibly, it starts to dissolve, as if it were made of nothing but sand. The "grains" of your sword and armor are picked up in the otherworldly wind, swirling around you before disappearing entirely. In seconds, you are left in your underclothes, standing frozen before the Wytch. The blood drains from your face. She has you trapped, defenseless. For the first time in a very long time, you begin to feel real fear. "Looks like I guessed right, handsome. You are well armed." You cover your body as much as you can, your face burning in anger and embarrassment. "You'll never best me, demon!" "No, I’m sure I haven’t got a chance against you," she says, rolling her eyes. "Well, until you "best" me, whatever shall we do with you?" She sits on the edge of the bed to ponder...almost getting within arms reach. "You need some kind of punishment. You broke into my house, tried to kill me, and banished my lover. Do you know how hard they are to summon? I don't even know where I put her phallactary." "The world is better off with one less succubus monster." "Oh she wasn't hurting anybody! Aside from fucking, she spent most of her time lounging in bed. Barely cooked and never cleaned...this place is a complete mess and I..." she pauses mid-sentence, a smile returning. "I think I've decided your punishment." She stands up again, looking somehow imperious in her decision, "My,what a kind, obedient servant you are. Always trying to please your mistress. And you would never try to harm her." That feeling of a cold breeze again blows past your face, raising goose-bumps and ruffling your hair. "What's your name?" You don’t want to tell her, but the words fall out regardless, "Jacob, they call me the Blackwolf." She snickers a little, "Alright, then Blackwolf. I think that's enough excitement for tonight. You may sleep downstairs, and you may not leave this place unless I say otherwise. Understood?" Your mind, your heart, every fiber of your being screams to attack, to launch and tackle the bitch, end her dark magic. Your muscles flex and strain, sweat forms at your brow, you open your mouth to yell a war cry…but all that comes out is, "Yes mistress." Obey
passages.content_zh: 一陣冷風吹過你，力量慢慢增強。當風吹得更猛烈時，你會聽到你的盔甲彎曲並發出吱吱聲。突然，不可思議的是，它開始溶解，就好像它是由沙子構成的。你的劍和盔甲的「顆粒」被超凡脫俗的風捲起，在你周圍旋轉，然後完全消失。幾秒鐘後，你就穿著內衣，僵硬地站在女巫面前。 血從你臉上流走。她讓你陷入困境，毫無防備。很長一段時間以來，你第一次開始感到真正的恐懼。 “看來我猜對了，帥哥，你武裝精良。” 你盡可能地遮住自己的身體，你的臉因憤怒和尷尬而燃燒。 “你永遠不可能打敗我，惡魔！” 「不，我確信我沒有機會對抗你，」她翻著白眼說道。 「好吧，在你『打敗』我之前，我們該拿你做什麼？」她坐在床邊沉思……幾乎伸手可及。 「你需要某種懲罰。你闖入我的房子，試圖殺死我，還放逐了我的愛人。你知道召喚他們有多困難嗎？我什至不知道我把她的陰莖放在哪裡了。” “世界少了一個魅魔怪物就會變得更好。” 「哦，她沒有傷害任何人！除了做愛，她大部分時間都躺在床上。幾乎沒有做飯，也從來沒有打掃過……這個地方一團糟，而我……」她停頓了一下，笑容又回來了。 “我想我已經決定了對你的懲罰了。” 她再次站起來，在她的決定中顯得有些專橫，“天哪，你真是一個善良、聽話的僕人。總是想取悅你的女主人。而且你永遠不會試圖傷害她。” 那種冷風再次吹過你的臉龐的感覺，讓你起雞皮疙瘩，吹亂你的頭髮。 “你叫什麼名字？” 你不想告訴她，但無論如何，這句話還是脫口而出：“雅各布，他們叫我黑狼。” 她輕笑了一聲，“好吧，那麼黑狼，我想今晚的刺激就夠了。你可以睡在樓下，除非我另有說明，否則你不能離開這裡。明白嗎？” 你的思想，你的心臟，你生命中的每一根纖維都尖叫著攻擊、發射並對付那個母狗，結束她的黑暗魔法。你的肌肉收縮、緊張，額頭冒汗，你張開嘴大喊一聲戰吼……但出來的只是， “是的，女主人。” 服從

passages.name: FirstNight
passages.content:
You descend into the darkened downstairs, trying hard not to trip on the clothes and clutter all over the floor. Unable to disobey.

Dejected and exhausted, you find a stool and sit. Alone and terrified in the dark.

Next Morning
passages.content_zh:
你走進黑暗的樓下，努力不被衣服絆倒，地板上亂七八糟。無法違抗。

你沮喪又疲憊，找了個凳子坐下。獨自一人，在黑暗中感到恐懼。

第二天早上

passages.name: MorningFirst
passages.content: The sun creeps in through the small window, hitting your tired eyes and making you squint. You didn't sleep. You tried to escape, dozens of times. You searched the place vainly over and over for something, some way to break the spell and escape. Nothing. By the morning you're exhausted, ragged looking, and somehow even angrier than before. "Rough night?" a sing-song voice drifts down from the stairs. The Wytch walks down the stairs, her voluptuous, sexy body bouncing and swaying in every direction at once. She's wearing some kind of negligee nightdress, the sheer fabric providing little support and even less modesty. You stare at the lurid display provided by her simply walking, getting turned on in spite of your burning anger. Without the slightest hint of shame, she strips off the skimpy nightgown, giving an even better view of her creamy skin bulging out of her underclothes. She smiles, purposefully and obviously trying to tempt you. It's working, your traitorous cock stiffening even more in your underwear. She definitely notices, "Mmm, save that for tonight, stud, you have other chores to attend to first." She leans against the table, crossing her arms under her copious chest. "So here's the deal, Jacob the Blackwolf. I have decided on the punishment for your transgressions. You will be my servant. I expect you to handle the chores around the house. You'll receive a list each day before I go out. If you do them well, you will be rewarded, if not, you will receive more punishment." You remain stone faced and angry. "How long?" "What?" "How long will this punishment last?" "Hmmm, good question. I guess until I feel you've redeemed yourself or are no longer a threat to me." "No longer a threat?" She smiles broadly, "Exactly. I think you're too used to being a big, powerful, warrior, and you're too dangerous to the magical world. Unless you serve me well and learn your lesson, I'm going to change you. To be less of a threat...and in ways that I find most pleasing." "Do your worst, wytch." "Oh no, Blackwolf, I'm going to do my best!" Chores Tip: You can cycle through link options with the arrow keys or WASD, the currently selected link is marked with a ">".
passages.content_zh: 陽光從小窗子裡爬進來，打在你疲憊的眼睛上，讓你瞇起眼睛。 你沒有睡覺。 你曾無數次試圖逃跑。你一遍又一遍地在這個地方尋找著什麼，尋找著某種打破咒語並逃脫的方法，但徒勞無功。 沒有什麼。 到了早上，你已經筋疲力盡，衣衫襤褸，甚至比以前更生氣。 「一夜難熬？」一陣歌聲從樓梯上飄下來。女巫走下樓梯，她性感的身體同時向各個方向彈跳和搖擺。她穿著某種睡衣睡裙，透明的布料幾乎沒有支撐，更不端莊。 你盯著她走路時的可怕表現，儘管你怒火中燒，但還是很興奮。 她毫無羞恥地脫掉了那件暴露的睡衣，更清楚地看到她從內褲裡凸出的奶油般的皮膚。她微笑著，明顯是故意想誘惑你。它起作用了，你叛逆的陰莖在你的內褲裡變得更加僵硬。 她肯定注意到了，“嗯，留到今晚吧，夥計，你還有其他雜務要先處理。” 她靠在桌上，雙手交叉在寬闊的胸前。 「這麼說吧，黑狼雅各布。我已經決定了對你的違法行為的懲罰。你將成為我的僕人。我希望你處理家裡的家務。每天我出去之前你都會收到一份清單。如果你做得好，你會得到獎勵，如果做得不好，你會受到更多的懲罰。” 你仍然面無表情、憤怒不已。 “多久？” “什麼？” “這個懲罰要持續多久？” “嗯，好問題。我想，直到我覺得你已經救贖了自己，或者不再對我構成威脅。” “不再是威脅了？” 她笑得很開心，“沒錯。我認為你太習慣於成為一個高大、強大的戰士，而且你對魔法世界來說太危險了。除非你好好地為我服務並吸取教訓，否則我會改變你。減少威脅……並且以我覺得最愉快的方式。” “做你最壞的打算吧，巫婆。” “哦不，黑狼，我會盡力的！” 家務事 提示：您可以使用箭頭鍵或 WASD 循環瀏覽連結選項，目前選定的連結標示為「">」。

The room is nearly pitch black, save for a little moonlight creeping in through the window.

You didn't do any chores today. You definitely kept your pride and self...but at what cost?  seemed very upset with you. If you keep on the current course, you'll have to step lightly.

Maybe it would be better to try and keep her happy.

No, I have to fight. When I escape, I want to still be myself.

passages.name: DinnerDefault-Great
passages.content: Soon enough, it's evening, and time for dinner. You grab a couple of bowls and silverware, talking and laughing with even before you've even sat down to eat. Even days ago, you couldn't have imagined this situation. Sitting here with a wytch, gabbing about life, magic, hair, clothes, whatever - and more than that, really enjoying it! You laugh genuinely at her jokes, empathize with her stories, tear up at her troubles...it almost feels like she's an old friend you grew up with, or maybe even something more? Enjoy it. Use it Fight it
passages.content_zh: 很快，就到了晚上，該吃晚餐了。 你甚至在坐下來吃飯之前就拿起幾個碗和銀器，有說有笑。 即使在幾天前，你也無法想像這種情況。和巫婆坐在這裡，閒聊生活、魔法、頭髮、衣服，等等——更重要的是，真的很享受！你會因為她的笑話而發自內心地大笑，對她的故事感同身受，因她的煩惱而落淚……這幾乎感覺她是你一起長大的老朋友，或者甚至更多？ 好好享受。 使用它 戰鬥吧

passages.name: Enjoy it.
passages.content: This may be wrong, it may be unnatural, but does that really matter? You're enjoying your time with another person, and she's enjoying yours. You're making each other happy, and right now at least, where you are feels much more important than how you got here. Dinner is over in the blink of an eye, and before you know it, it's nearly time to go to bed. ...though nowhere near time to sleep, she tells you with a seductive wink. Upstairs gives you a kiss on the cheek and heads upstairs to bed first. You finish cleaning and head up yourself later. Head upstairs to bed

You have to stay strong and not let her get in your head. You struggle through the conversation, but keep having to remind yourself to not enjoy it. passages.name: DinnerDefault-Bad
passages.content: Soon enough, it's evening, and time for dinner. You grab a couple of bowls and silverware and serve portions for each of you, while she sits down at the far end of the table. "Thank you" she says, coldly and matter-of-factly as you pass her the bowl. She doesn't wait for you to sit before she starts eating, pulling a scroll off the bookshelf and reading it to herself. You sit in the uncomfortable silence, the only sounds are the crackling of the fire and occasional slurp of soup. Try to make amends Say nothing Confront her

passages.name: DinnerDefault-Terrible
passages.content: She sits at the table, signifying she's ready for dinner. You grab a bowl of hot stew and set it down in front of her. She doesn't thank you...or even look at you for that matter, just turning to read a nearby book. Even after finishing her soup, she still continues reading for some time. Letting you stand there, the only sound your rumbling stomach. She's not angry or even disappointed anymore, she's just barely acknowledging you. Like you're no longer even a person to her. You have to admit to being a little worried by this treatment, but a part of you is also relieved that she's stopped trying to convert you to whatever evil plan she had. Serve her well Do the minimum
