passages.name: BarTalk
passages.content: "You boys having a nice day?" you say, trying to nonchalantly lean on the bar. The bartender shrugs, "Another day, another coin." You're about to reply when you hear the merchant pipe up from down the bar, "Hi Miss Red! Nice weather today!" You smile his way, giving him a greeting as well. He smiles back and turns red. It's actually really cute how happy he is to get your attention. "Any gossip in and about the town?" you say, trying to nonchalantly lean on the bar. The bartender shrugs, "Not much. Most I've heard is about this beautiful, mysterious woman who showed up at the local tavern recently." "Ha ha," you mock laugh, "you're smooth, I'll give you that." The bartender chuckles and goes back to cleaning glasses. From down the bar, you hear the merchant pipe up, "Are you…a wytch?" Your blood instantly runs cold. What does he mean? Have you been found out? You force a smile and turn his way. "Because you've totally cast a love spell on me!" Internally, you sigh in relief and pass it off with a nervous laugh, it was just a cheesy pickup line, "This place is just full of funny jesters." Seduce barkeep Seduce Merchant "Any new gossip?," you say, leaning on the bar. "You mean, besides the huge warrior in black armor preparing to do battle with a supernatural creature hiding outside the town?" he shrugs, "Not much." The bartender shrugs, "not much really, another day, another coin." The merchant butts in from down the bar, "And right there's the problem with this town, nothing ever happens!" The bartender rolls his eyes, "You that tipsy this early in the day?" The merchant smiles sloppily, "Yes. But that doesn't mean I'm wrong," he then turns towards you, eyes leveled squarely on your chest, "If you're looking for a little excitement in this sleepy little town, I've got a room upstairs." "Any gossip in and about the town?," you say, trying to nonchalantly lean on the bar. You have the hardest time trying to decide whether to lay your boobs on top of the bar, under it, or squished up against it. Leaving you doing a silly looking dance for a few moments. The merchant sitting nearby snickers. You give him a glare - which is probably less menacing than you hope it is. "Something funny?" He snickers, "first time at a bar, lass?" Your face burns red, ”No! I’m just not used to these…uh…the height of the bar." "Oh, yes definitely. Looks terribly uncomfortable." "I'll manage." you huff, turning back to the bar. You decide on slouching down and stuffing your breasts under the bar - less obvious that way. The merchant doesn't seem to know how to take a hint. "You know, if you're looking for some place more comfortable, my room here is lovely." You sigh deeply. He laughs. Even the bartender snickers. Seduce barkeep Seduce Merchant "Any gossip in and about the town?," you say, trying to nonchalantly lean on the bar. The fat merchant sitting nearby snickers. You give him a glare - which is probably less menacing than you hope it is. "Something funny?" "Oh no sir!" he snickers, "Just wondering if your mates put you up to this or what." Your temper flares at the nerve of this fat bastard, "You slimy son of a…" Before you get into any serious trouble, the bartender reaches over and places a hand on your chest, stopping you. "Don't give the local drunks any more attention than they deserve, he's naught but a troll." The merchant snickers again, but apologizes, "My apologies young sir." You nod in a huff, but realize it's probably for the best. Looking down at your chest, you notice that the bartender's hand looks huge, covering most of your chest. Who knows how well you'd do in a fight. He's just a merchant, but he's also currently bigger than you are. Seduce barkeep Besides the bartender, there's only one other person at the bar. A merchant by the looks of him, fat and dressed in finery. Probably stopped here to restock the store or similar. You ask the bartender about the state of the town. The bartender shrugs with a short sigh, "To be honest, nothing much has changed around here, in spite of our hopes. Isn't that right, George?" he says, nodding to the fat merchant. "Huh? Oh, yeah, uh…sure. And…um…you?" he stumbles awkwardly over his words, obviously surprised at being included in the conversation. You shrug, "We do what we can." "Yeah, I…uh…I know the feeling." he smiles again awkwardly and raises a glass in agreement. You raise yours. An awkward silence follows. Seduce barkeep Seduce Merchant Besides the bartender, there's only one other person at the bar. A merchant by the looks of him, fat and dressed in finery. Probably stopped here to restock the store or similar. You ask the bartender about the state of the town. He shrugs, "Not much worth saying. People seem to have some hope now that you're here to vanquish the scarlet wytch." He pauses to nod at the merchant down the bar, "Ain't that right, George?" The merchant turns towards you with nervous smile, "Uh…yes! Yes it is….uh…Sir wolf…erm Sir Blackwolf. How…how goes the hunt?" he stumbles awkwardly over his words, obviously intimidated. "You've heard about that?" you smile knowingly. "Yes sir, it's all the news as far as three villages over. You're a bit of a legend, um, sir. In fact, let me buy you a drink!" "I won't say no to that. Thank you." you nod again accepting the fresh mug from the bartender. Seduce barkeep Seduce Merchant Buy a drink Buy a drink (you need at least 2 coins) Back Leave
passages.content_zh: 「你們孩子今天過得愉快嗎？」你說，試著若無其事地靠在吧台上。 酒保聳聳肩，“改天，再一枚硬幣。” 你正要回答，這時你聽到酒吧下面的商人用尖聲喊道：“嗨，雷德小姐！今天天氣不錯！” 你向他微笑，也向他打招呼。他回以微笑，臉紅了。事實上，他很高興引起你的注意，這真的很可愛。 「鎮上有什麼八卦嗎？」你說，試著若無其事地靠在吧台上。 酒保聳聳肩，“不多，我聽說的最多的就是最近在當地酒館出現的這位美麗而神秘的女子。” “哈哈，”你嘲笑道，“你很圓滑，我就給你。” 調酒師輕笑一聲，繼續擦玻璃杯。 你聽到酒吧那頭的商人尖聲問道，“你是……巫婆嗎？” 你的血液瞬間變冷。他是什麼意思？你被發現了嗎？你強顏歡笑，轉過身去。 「因為你已經對我施了愛情咒！」 你內心鬆了口氣，緊張地笑了一聲，這只是一句俗氣的搭訕台詞，“這個地方到處都是滑稽的小丑。” 勾引酒保 勾引商人 「有什麼新的八卦嗎？」你靠在吧台上說。 “你是說，除了那個身穿黑甲的巨大戰士準備與隱藏在鎮外的超自然生物戰鬥之外？”他聳聳肩，“不多。” 酒保聳聳肩，“其實也沒什麼，改天，再一枚硬幣。” 商人從酒吧下面插嘴道：“這個鎮子就出問題了，什麼也沒發生！” 酒保翻了個白眼，“這麼早就醉了？” 商人漫不經心地笑了笑，“是的。但這並不意味著我錯了，”然後他轉向你，眼睛直視著你的胸口，“如果你想在這個沉睡的小鎮裡尋找一點刺激，我在樓上有一個房間。” 「鎮上有什麼八卦嗎？」你說，試著若無其事地靠在吧台上。您很難決定將胸部放在槓上、槓下還是壓在槓上。讓你跳一段看起來很愚蠢的舞蹈。 坐在附近的商人竊笑。 你瞪了他一眼——這可能沒有你希望的那麼具有威脅性。 “有什麼好笑的嗎？” 他笑道：“小姑娘，第一次來酒吧嗎？” 你的臉漲得通紅，“不！我只是不習慣這些……呃……吧台的高度。” “哦，當然是的。看起來非常不舒服。” 「我會處理好的。」你怒氣沖沖地轉身走回酒吧。你決定彎下腰，把胸部塞到欄桿下——這樣就沒那麼明顯了。 商人似乎不知道如何接受暗示。 “你知道，如果你正在尋找更舒適的地方，我這裡的房間很漂亮。” 你深深嘆息。他笑了。就連調酒師也在竊笑。 勾引酒保 勾引商人 「鎮上有什麼八卦嗎？」你說，試著若無其事地靠在吧台上。 坐在旁邊的胖商人竊笑起來。 你瞪了他一眼——這可能沒有你希望的那麼具有威脅性。 “有什麼好笑的嗎？” “噢，不，先生！”他竊笑道，“只是想知道你的伙伴們是不是慫恿你這麼做的。” 你的脾氣讓這個胖子的神經發炎了，“你這個黏糊糊的兒子……” 在你陷入任何嚴重麻煩之前，調酒師伸手將手放在你的胸口上，阻止了你。 “不要對當地的酒鬼給予過多的關注，他只不過是一個巨魔。” 商人再次竊笑，但還是道歉：“抱歉，年輕的先生。” 你氣呼呼地點點頭，但意識到這可能是最好的結果。低頭看著自己的胸部，你發現調酒師的手看起來很大，遮住了你大部分的胸部。誰知道你在戰鬥中會表現得如何。他只是個商人，但現在的規模也比你大。 勾引酒保 吧台裡除了調酒師之外，就只有一個人了。從他的外表來看，他是個商人，肥胖，衣著華麗。可能停在這裡是為了給商店或類似的地方補貨。 你向酒保詢問小鎮的狀況。 酒保聳聳肩，短促地嘆了口氣，「說實話，儘管我們抱有希望，但這裡並沒有發生什麼太大的變化。不是嗎，喬治？」他一邊說，一邊向胖商人點點頭。 「嗯？哦，是的，呃……當然。還有……嗯……你？」他結結巴巴地結結巴巴地說著話，顯然對自己被納入談話感到驚訝。 你聳聳肩：“我們盡力而為。” 「是的，我……呃……我知道這種感覺。」他再次尷尬地笑了笑，舉起杯子表示同意。你提高你的。 接下來是尷尬的沉默。 勾引酒保 勾引商人 吧台裡除了調酒師之外，就只有一個人了。從他的外表來看，他是個商人，肥胖，衣著華麗。可能停在這裡是為了給商店或類似的地方補貨。 你向酒保詢問小鎮的狀況。 他聳聳肩，“沒什麼值得說的。現在人們似乎對你來這裡擊敗猩紅女巫抱有一些希望。”他停下來，對吧台那頭的商人點點頭，“是嗎，喬治？” 商人帶著緊張的微笑轉向你，「呃……是的！是的……呃……狼先生……呃黑狼先生。狩獵怎麼樣……怎麼樣？」他結結巴巴地結結巴巴，顯然是被嚇到了。 「你聽過這件事嗎？」你會心意地微笑。 「是的，先生，這都是三個村莊之外的新聞。你有點傳奇，嗯，先生。事實上，讓我請你喝一杯！” 「我不會拒絕。謝謝。」你再次點頭，接受了調酒師送來的新鮮杯子。 勾引酒保 勾引商人 買一杯飲料 買一杯飲料（至少要2個硬幣） 返回 離開

passages.name: BarDrink
passages.content: "An ale, please." "That'll be two coin." You come up from your coin purse to see him smiling and holding your drink, "Just kidding, on the house for a lovely like you." "An ale, please." The bartender gives you another look of suspicion. "How old are you, miss?" You feel your face turn red in shame and embarrassment. "Older than I look," you say through gritted teeth. He holds your eyes for a moment longer before shrugging and pouring the drink. "That'll be two coin. Anything else?" "An ale, please." The bartender gives you another look of suspicion. "How old are you, son?" You feel your face turn red in shame and embarrassment. "Older than I look," you say through gritted teeth. He holds your eyes for a moment longer before shrugging and pouring the drink. "That'll be two coin. Anything else?" You order an ale. "Here you go, that'll be two coin." You order an ale, only to find that the bartender has it already poured, "On the house, for helping rid us of the wytch." Talk to barkeep Cheers Leave
passages.content_zh: “請喝一杯啤酒。” “那是兩枚硬幣。” 你從零錢包裡走出來，看到他微笑著拿著你的飲料，“開個玩笑，像你這樣可愛的人就得花錢了。” “請喝一杯啤酒。” 調酒師又用懷疑的眼神看了你一眼。 “小姐，你幾歲了？” 你感覺自己的臉因羞愧和尷尬而變紅。 「比我看起來更老。」你咬牙切齒地說。 他又凝視了你一會兒，然後聳聳肩，給你倒了酒。 “那是兩枚硬幣。還有別的嗎？” “請喝一杯啤酒。” 調酒師又用懷疑的眼神看了你一眼。 “兒子，你多大了？” 你感覺自己的臉因羞愧和尷尬而變紅。 「比我看起來更老。」你咬牙切齒地說。 他又凝視了你一會兒，然後聳聳肩，給你倒了酒。 “那是兩枚硬幣。還有別的嗎？” 你點了一杯麥芽酒。 “給你，兩枚硬幣。” 你點了一杯麥芽酒，卻發現調酒師已經倒好了，“在房子裡，幫助我們擺脫了女巫。” 與酒保交談 乾杯 離開

passages.name: BartenderSeduce
passages.content: You wait a little while until the fat merchant steps away for the bathroom. Seizing your chance, you lean across the bar, giving the bartender a nice view of your cleavage, and motion for the bartender to come closer. and motion for the bartender to come closer. He obliges and you whisper into his ear, "You mind I have another taste of your special stock under the counter?" He obliges and you whisper into his ear, "You keep any special reserves…you know…under the counter?" His eyes go wide at first then slide into a sly smile, "I'm sure we have something that can satisfy you. Want to come take a look?" You smile back and make your way around the bar. He obliges and you whisper into his ear, "You keep any special reserves…you know…under the counter?" His eyes go wide at first then slide into a sly smile, "I'm sure we have something that can satisfy you. Want to come take a look?" You smile back and make your way around the bar. Sex with barkeep You lean across the counter and motion for the bartender to lean closer. He obliges and you whisper into his ear, "You keep any special reserves…you know…under the counter?" His eyes go wide. "Kid, look, it's one thing to let you come in here and have a drink, but another if you're going to be pulling shit like that." He walks away and starts angrily washing glasses. You lean across the bar and motion for the tender to lean closer. He obliges and you whisper into his ear, "You keep any special reserves…you know…under the counter?" Your other hand reaches up and lightly strokes the side of his arm. You're surprised by the amount of muscle there, and wonder if it's similar to or surpassing yours now. He smiles warmly, "Well now, that's a real compliment from a handsome lad like yourself. But I don't mix business and pleasure." You shrug and return to your drink. You lean across the bar and motion for the tender to lean closer. He obliges and you whisper into his ear, "You keep any special reserves…you know…under the counter?" Your other hand reaches up and lightly strokes the side of his arm. He's well-muscled and handsome, even if nowhere near as strong as you are. He smiles warmly, "Well now, that's a real compliment, to he hit on by the famous Blackwolf! Sorry to say, I don't multi-class, but I'm honored. I'll be telling my grandkids I was once hit on by the famous Blackwolf." Nevermind Leave
passages.content_zh: 你等了一會兒，直到胖商人走開去洗手間。抓住機會，你靠在吧台上，讓調酒師可以清楚地看到你的乳溝，並示意調酒師靠近一些。並示意調酒師靠近一些。 他答應了，你在他耳邊低聲說道：“你介意我再嚐嚐櫃檯下面的特殊庫存嗎？” 他答應了，你在他耳邊低聲說道：“你在櫃檯下留有特殊儲備……你知道嗎？” 他的眼睛先是睜大了，然後就露出狡黠的笑容：“我肯定有能讓你滿意的東西，要不要過來看看？” 你回以微笑，然後繞過酒吧。 與酒保發生性關係 你等了一會兒，直到胖商人走開去洗手間。抓住機會，你靠在吧台上，讓調酒師可以清楚地看到你的乳溝，並示意調酒師靠近一些。並示意調酒師靠近一些。 他答應了，你在他耳邊低聲說道：“你介意我再嚐嚐櫃檯下面的特殊庫存嗎？” 他答應了，你在他耳邊低聲說道：“你在櫃檯下留有特殊儲備……你知道嗎？” 他的眼睛先是睜大了，然後就露出狡黠的笑容：“我肯定有能讓你滿意的東西，要不要過來看看？” 你回以微笑，然後繞過酒吧。 與酒保發生性關係 你靠在櫃檯上，示意調酒師更靠近。 他答應了，你在他耳邊低聲說道：“你在櫃檯下留有特殊儲備……你知道嗎？” 他的眼睛睜得大大的。 “孩子，聽著，讓你進來喝一杯是一回事，但如果你要做出這樣的事，那就是另一回事了。” 他走開，開始憤怒地洗眼鏡。 你靠在吧台上，示意供應者更靠近。 他答應了，你在他耳邊低聲說道：“你在櫃檯下留有特殊儲備……你知道嗎？” 你的另一隻手抬起，輕輕撫摸他的手臂一側。你對那裡的肌肉數量感到驚訝，並想知道它是否與你現在的相似或超過。 他溫暖地微笑著，“好吧，這確實是來自像你這樣的英俊小伙子的真正的讚美。但我不會把工作和娛樂混為一談。” 你聳聳肩，繼續喝飲料。 你靠在吧台上，示意供應者更靠近。 他答應了，你在他耳邊低聲說道：“你在櫃檯下留有特殊儲備……你知道嗎？” 你的另一隻手抬起，輕輕撫摸他的手臂一側。他肌肉發達，英俊瀟灑，儘管他的力量遠不及你。 他溫暖地笑了，“好吧，這真是一個恭維，他被著名的黑狼搭訕了！抱歉，我不參加多級課程，但我很榮幸。我會告訴我的孫子們，我曾經被著名的黑狼搭訕過。” 沒關係 離開

passages.name: MerchantSeduce
passages.content: You know you shouldn't. There's nothing compelling you to. But right now, you're so horny that you're willing to trade quality for quantity. You close your eyes and down the last of your drink before scootching closer to the fat merchant. "So, you still have your room here?" He nearly chokes on his drink as his false bravado completely evaporates. "Really? I…uh…I didn't actually think you would…you know, again." You move a little closer still, leaning towards him, you can see he's starting to sweat with nerves, it's actually a little cute. "So is that a yes?" He turns and looks you straight in the eye, seemingly unsure that you're serious. You hold his stare with as sultry look as possible. "Check please!" "So, you staying here at the inn?" His cocky jocular demeanor instantly changes to shy and unsure - nearly choking on his drink. Unsurprisingly, he was all bite and no bark. "What? I…uh…yes, just upstairs." You move a little closer still, leaning towards him, you can see he's starting to sweat with nerves, it's actually a little cute. "That sounds nice, would you mind showing me?" He turns and looks you straight in the eye, seemingly unsure that you're serious. You hold his stare with as sultry look as possible. He gulps and says meekly, "Yes! I mean…you and…erm…Really?" "Really." "Check please!" Sex with merchant Sex with merchant You know you shouldn't. There's nothing compelling you to. I…uh…you mean you…ummm…yes! Very comfortable." You move a little closer still, leaning towards him, you can see he's starting to sweat with nerves, it's actually a little cute. He gulps and says meekly, "Really?" "Really." "Check please!" Sex with merchant Sex with merchant Hell no. No way you'd even want to try with that pig. Scootching close to the merchant, you catch his eye and give him a smoldering look. "So, can I buy you a drink?" "Oh, no I'm good thank you." You move a little closer still, leaning towards him, trying to keep your eyes locked on his, "No? I could bring it up to your room for you." Something clicks and he finally understands what you're implying. "Oh? Oh! I…uh…no. Sorry, I'm not into men." He gives you a weak smile, then returns to his drink, trying his best to pretend you aren't there. You shrug and head back to your own stool to finish your drink - not a big loss to not bed a fat man in a bar. Scootching close to the merchant, you catch his eye and give him a smoldering look. "So, what do I owe you for the drink?" "Oh! Nothing, nothing at all! It's on me!" You move a little closer, leaning towards him, using your impressive size to its full advantage. Your eyes stay locked on his, "No? I could help you with your room here at the inn." Something clicks and he finally understands what you're implying. "Oh, I…uh…I mean, I can't…I mean, I don't…I mean…no thank you?" If he was stumbling over words before, he's absolutely falling over them now. passages.name: SmithTalk
passages.content: He stops hammering as you approach, wiping his brow with a big, burly forearm. "What can I do for ya today, lass?" "Nothing special, just looking." you say to him He gives you a slightly confused look, "Do you need some new...uh farm tools? Something repaired?" You turn a little red, realizing how out-of-place you probably look here. "I um...actually it's a little chilly, so I came in to warm up a little with your hearth." You flash him your best innocent eyes and smile. He looks like he just might melt against your cuteness before letting out a roaring laugh. "Ha Ha! I suppose it is! Well, feel free to stay as long as you like! My hearth is your hearth!" He stops hammering as you approach, wiping his brow with a big, burly forearm. "Can I help you, miss?" "Just having a look about town. I see you have a few weapons?" He gives you a sideways look for a moment, as if not sure you're serious. Sir…" You shrug at a point well made, "Just getting a look at the town I suppose. They call me Blackwolf." "Oh! You're the hunter everyone's on about! Out to slay the wytch!" "Yes, on both counts. passages.content_zh: 你正站在里丁胡德的一家小製桶店裡。周圍都是各種形狀和大小的桶子。店主正在努力製作新桶子……同時偷偷地看你一眼。 你正站在里丁胡德的一家小製桶店裡。周圍都是各種形狀和大小的桶子。店主埃維正在努力製作新木桶。 你走進一家小製桶店，發現店主正像以前一樣靠在木桶上努力工作。她的襯衫垂下來，你情不自禁地看到她的乳房在裡面誘人地搖晃。 「哦，歡迎回來！我希望你能再次來訪。」她說著，站起來微笑著向你打招呼。 「喔？也很高興見到你！」你說著，臉微微紅了。 她靠在一直在處理的木桶上，把手放在臀部上。當她上下打量你時，你可以看到她臉上掛著淡淡的微笑。 “我能為你做什麼？我想你不會再找一桶吧？” 與庫柏交談 你走進一家小製桶店，儘管不需要桶子。 當你進入時，你會驚訝地看到一個年輕女子正在箍一個桶子。她很可愛！一張美麗的臉龐，頭上綁著的頭巾裡垂下一縷金髮。她的身材也很好，苗條、健康，胸部大小也很漂亮——當她靠在桶上工作時，你可以看到她的襯衫內的乳房在晃動。 「哦，下午好，女士，有什麼可以幫您的嗎？」她說著，起身向你打招呼。 “沒什麼特別的，只是在城裡逛逛。” 她靠在一直在處理的木桶上，把手放在臀部上。當她上下打量你時，你可以看到她臉上掛著淡淡的微笑。 “好吧，你想看多久就看多久，如果你需要什麼我就在這裡。” 與庫柏交談 勾引庫柏 你走進一家小製桶店，發現埃維正像以前一樣在桶上努力工作。 “你好，小伙子，今天有什麼可以為你效勞的嗎？又一份無桶訂單？” 你因為一句說得很好的俏皮話而笑。 你走進一家小製桶店，儘管不需要桶子。 當你進入時，你會驚訝地看到一個年輕女子正在箍一個桶子。她很瘦，但很強壯，看起來很運動，有一張可愛的臉，頭上綁著的頭巾裡垂著一縷金色的頭髮。 「哦，下午好，呃……先生，您今天需要什麼尺寸的？」她說著，起身向你打招呼。 “抱歉，沒有，我不是來買桶的。” 她交叉雙臂，懷疑地看著你，“請原諒我問先生，如果你不是在找木桶，為什麼會來到木桶店？先生……” 你聳了聳肩，“我想只是去看看這個小鎮。” 她雙臂抱在胸前，“嗯嗯，看看小鎮。” “抱歉，我無意冒犯，說實話，只是試探一下。” 她似乎放鬆了一些，“好吧好吧，那麼，歡迎來到Ridinghood。你知道，你看起來非常面熟。我們以前見過嗎？” “我……呃……不這麼認為。” 她靠在一直在處理的木桶上，把手放在臀部上。她有些疑惑地瞇起了眼睛。 “好吧，你想看多久就看多久，如果你需要什麼我就在這裡。” 與庫柏交談 勾引庫柏 你走進一家小製桶店，發現埃維正像以前一樣在桶上努力工作。 “您好，先生，今天有什麼可以為您效勞的嗎？又一份無桶訂單？” 你因為一句說得很好的俏皮話而笑。 你走進一家小製桶店，儘管不需要桶子。 當你進入時，你會驚訝地看到一個年輕女子正在箍一個桶子。她很瘦，但很強壯，看起來很運動，有一張可愛的臉，頭上綁著的頭巾裡垂著一縷金色的頭髮。 「哦，下午好，大人，您今天需要多大號的？」她說著，起身向你打招呼。 “抱歉，沒有，我不是來買桶的。” 她交叉雙臂，懷疑地看著你，“請原諒我問先生，如果你不是在找木桶，為什麼會來到木桶店？先生……” 你聳了聳肩，“我想只是去看看這個小鎮。” 她雙臂抱在胸前，“嗯嗯，看看小鎮。” “抱歉，我無意冒犯，說實話，只是試探一下。” 她似乎放鬆了一些，“好吧好吧，那麼歡迎來到Ridinghood。Evie，很高興認識你。” “雅各布。很高興認識你，伊維。” 與庫柏交談 勾引庫柏 你走進一家小製桶店，儘管不需要桶子。 埃維在這裡，一如既往地在桶上努力工作。 “您好，黑狼先生，今天有什麼可以為您效勞的嗎？又一份無桶訂單？” 你因為一句說得很好的俏皮話而笑。 當你進入時，你會驚訝地看到一個年輕女子正在箍一個桶子。她很瘦，但很強壯，看起來很運動，有一張可愛的臉，頭上綁著的頭巾裡垂著一縷金色的頭髮。 「哦，下午好，大人，您今天需要多大號的？」她說著，起身向你打招呼。 “抱歉，沒有，我不是來買桶的。” 她交叉雙臂，懷疑地看著你，“請原諒我問先生，如果你不是在找木桶，為什麼會來到木桶店？先生……” 你聳聳肩，說得恰到好處，“我想只是去看看這個小鎮。他們叫我黑狼。” “噢！你就是大家都在談論的獵人！出去殺死女巫！” “是的，在這兩方面都是如此。你是嗎？” “伊維，很高興認識你。” “你也是伊維。” 與庫柏交談 勾引庫柏 離開

passages.name: CooperTalk
passages.content: "Business going well? Having a nice day?" you say, making small talk. She shoots you a sly smile "Great day today, the cutest little redhead in Ridinghood came into my shop today." You blush slightly and giggle - which is odd...you'd usually be upset by something like that. Are you getting used to being called "cute"? "Not often you see a young lady as a cooper." you say, making small talk. She shoots you a sly smile "True, not something I imagined I'd be doin' either. But me father caught ill, and seein' as I had the skills and the shop, why not? That said, not often you find a young lady visiting a cooper." "Touche." You look over her stock - it's all very well made - tight seams and even shapes. Hard to do with only one person and hand tools. "I have to say, you make some damn fine barrels, the craftsmanship is amazing." you say, making small talk. She shoots you a smile only briefly looking up from her work. "Thank you, took a while to get it down. You have to get a nice curve around the middle so they stay tight. Like me father always said, a good barrel is like a good pair of tits: size is important, but if they ain't nice 'n round, they ain't no good." You chuckle at the phrase, "That's an interesting way to look at it." She laughs too, "Yeah, me paw wasn't the most delicate man." "But he was right, these are some fine barrels." "Not often you see a young lady as a cooper." you say, making small talk. She shoots you a sarcastic smile only briefly looking up from her work. "True, not something I imagined I'd be doin' either. But me father caught ill, and seein' as I had the skills and the shop, why not? Turns out, I like it, and I'm damn good at it. You won't find a better cooper in the valley, tits or not!" "Heh, yeah. Sorry, never doubted you for a second. Those are some fine barrels." You look over her stock - it's all very well made - tight seams and even shapes. Hard to do with only one person and hand tools. You won't find a better cooper in the valley, tits or not!" "Never doubted you for a second. Those are some fine barrels." Seduce cooper Back Leave
passages.content_zh: 「生意還順利嗎？今天過得愉快嗎？」你說，閒聊。 她對你露出狡猾的微笑：“今天真是美好的一天，Ridinghood 最可愛的小紅髮今天來到了我的店裡。” 你微微臉紅並咯咯地笑——這很奇怪……你通常會因為這樣的事情而感到不安。你習慣被說「可愛」嗎？ 「你很少能看到一位年輕女士當製桶匠。」你說，閒聊。 她狡猾地對你笑了笑，“是的，我也沒想到我會這麼做。但是我父親病了，而且我有技術，也有店鋪，為什麼不呢？也就是說，你很少會看到一位年輕女士去看製桶匠。” “圖切。” 你仔細看她的庫存——做工都非常好——接縫緊密，形狀均勻。僅靠一個人和手動工具很難完成。 「我不得不說，你做的木桶真他媽的精緻，工藝太棒了。」你說，閒聊。 她只是短暫地從工作中抬起頭來，對你微笑。 「謝謝你，花了一段時間才把它放下來。你必須在中間形成一個漂亮的曲線，這樣它們才能保持緊繃。就像我父親常說的那樣，一個好的槍管就像一對好的乳房：大小很重要，但如果它們不漂亮，不圓，那就不好了。” 你對這句話笑了，“這是一個有趣的看待它的方式。” 她也笑道：“是啊，我的爪子本來就不是最嬌嫩的男人。” “但他是對的，這些都是一些很好的木桶。” 「你很少能看到一位年輕女士當製桶匠。」你說，閒聊。 她對你露出諷刺的微笑，只是短暫地從工作中抬起頭來。 「確實，這也不是我想像中我會做的事情。但是我父親病了，既然我有技術和店面，為什麼不呢？事實證明，我喜歡它，而且我非常擅長它。你在山谷裡找不到更好的製桶匠，不管是不是奶子！” 「呵呵，是的。抱歉，我從來沒有懷疑過你。這些都是一些很好的木桶。” 你仔細看她的庫存——做工都非常好——接縫緊密，形狀均勻。僅靠一個人和手動工具很難完成。 「我不得不說，你做的木桶真他媽的精緻，工藝太棒了。」你說，閒聊。 她只是短暫地從工作中抬起頭來，對你微笑。 「謝謝你，花了一段時間才把它放下來。你必須在中間形成一個漂亮的曲線，這樣它們才能保持緊繃。就像我父親常說的那樣，一個好的槍管就像一對好的乳房：大小很重要，但如果它們不漂亮，不圓，那就不好了。” 你對這句話笑了，“這是一個有趣的看待它的方式。” 她也笑道：“是啊，我的爪子本來就不是最嬌嫩的男人。” “但他是對的，這些都是一些很好的木桶。” 「你很少能看到一位年輕女士當製桶匠。」你說，閒聊。 她對你露出諷刺的微笑，只是短暫地從工作中抬起頭來。 「確實，這也不是我想像中我會做的事情。但是我父親病了，既然我有技術和店面，為什麼不呢？事實證明，我喜歡它，而且我非常擅長它。你在山谷裡找不到更好的製桶匠，不管是不是奶子！” “從來沒有懷疑過你。那些都是好桶。” 你仔細看她的庫存——做工都非常好——接縫緊密，形狀均勻。僅靠一個人和手動工具很難完成。 「我不得不說，你做的木桶真他媽的精緻，工藝太棒了。」你說，閒聊。 她只是短暫地從工作中抬起頭來，對你微笑。 「謝謝你，花了一段時間才把它放下來。你必須在中間形成一個漂亮的曲線，這樣它們才能保持緊繃。就像我父親常說的那樣，一個好的槍管就像一對好的乳房：大小很重要，但如果它們不漂亮，不圓，那就不好了。” 你對這句話笑了，“這是一個有趣的看待它的方式。” 她也笑道：“是啊，我的爪子本來就不是最嬌嫩的男人。” “但他是對的，這些都是一些很好的木桶。” 「你很少能看到一位年輕女士當製桶匠。」你說，閒聊。 她從工作中抬起頭來，對你露出諷刺的微笑。 「確實，這也不是我想像中我會做的事情。但是我父親病了，既然我有技術和店面，為什麼不呢？事實證明，我喜歡它，而且我非常擅長它。你在山谷裡找不到更好的製桶匠，不管是不是奶子！” “從來沒有懷疑過你。那些都是好桶。” 勾引庫柏 返回 離開

passages.name: CooperSeduce
passages.content: She excuses herself for a moment and walks into the back of the shop. You busy yourself looking at the various shapes and sizes of barrels lined along the walls. "See anything you like?" her voice surprises you, coming from right behind your head. You spin around to see her standing extremely close behind...wearing nothing except her apron! Trying to shift the conversation a little, you walk over to one of the barrels lined up against the wall. It's excellently constructed, smooth, with perfectly fitted staves and bands. "You do excellent work." "Oh, you like my goods?" her voice surprises you, coming from right behind your head. You spin around to see her standing extremely close behind. Um...yes? Um...yes? "And if you don't mind me saying so, some nice tits too." It's not just small talk, hunched over the barrel you can catch a glimpse down her apron at the two soft orbs jiggling there. They are quite nice. She stops and stands up with a frown, "I knew it! That's why you stopped in!" She makes her way up to you, making you realize that she's a hair taller than you. She jabs a finger into your chest, hard. "Two things. First, thank you, I'm proud of them. Second, get out, and go tell all your little friends that I'm a serious craftswoman, and not just some piece of ass for you kids to perv on." She jabs you again in the chest for good measure and turns around in a huff. Well chastised, you turn and hurry back out into the street, face burning red. "And if you don't mind me saying so, some nice tits too." It's not just small talk, hunched over the barrel you can catch a glimpse down her apron at the two soft orbs jiggling there. They are quite nice. She stops and stands up with a frown, "I knew it! That's why you stopped in!" She makes her way up to you, and jabs a finger into your chest. "Two things. First, thank you, I'm proud of them. Second, you're not really my type. Nice try, big guy." She traces a small X on your shirt with her finger and turns around in a huff. You shrug at the loss, but back out into the street. Didn't hurt to try at least. "And if you don't mind me saying so, some nice tits too." It's not just small talk, hunched over the barrel you can catch a glimpse down her apron at the two soft orbs jiggling there. They are quite nice. She stops and stands up with a frown, "Ah, so that's why you stopped in." She makes her way up to you and jabs a finger into your broad chest. "Two things. First, thank you, I'm proud of them. Second, you're nowhere near my type, so thank you, but no thank you." She traces a small X on your armor with her finger and turns around in a huff. You shrug at the loss, and head back out into the street. Didn't hurt to try at least. Leave
passages.content_zh: 她抱歉了一會兒，走進了商店的後面。 你忙著觀察沿著牆壁排列的各種形狀和大小的桶子。 「看到什麼你喜歡的東西了嗎？」她的聲音讓你大吃一驚，就在你的腦後。 你轉過身來，看到她站在離她很近的地方……除了圍裙之外什麼也沒穿！ 你試著稍微轉移話題，走到靠牆排列的一個木桶前。它結構精良、光滑，五線譜和樂隊完美貼合。 “你幹得非常出色。” 「哦，你喜歡我的貨嗎？」她的聲音讓你大吃一驚，就在你的腦後。 你轉過身，發現她就站在你很近的地方。 嗯...是嗎？ 嗯...是嗎？ “如果你不介意我這麼說的話，還有一些漂亮的乳房。” 這不僅僅是閒聊，彎下身子靠在桶上，你可以從她的圍裙下瞥見那兩個柔軟的球體在那裡搖晃。他們都很好。 她停下來，皺著眉站起來，“我就知道！所以你才停下來！” 她朝你走來，讓你意識到她比你高一根頭髮。她用一根手指狠狠地戳進你的胸口。 「有兩件事。第一，謝謝你們，我為他們感到驕傲。第二，出去，去告訴你們所有的小朋友，我是一個認真的工匠，而不是供你們這些孩子們使用的東西。” 她再次猛擊你的胸部，然後氣呼呼地轉過身來。 你受到了很好的懲罰，轉身急忙回到街上，臉漲得通紅。 “如果你不介意我這麼說的話，還有一些漂亮的乳房。” 這不僅僅是閒聊，彎下身子靠在桶上，你可以從她的圍裙下瞥見那兩個柔軟的球體在那裡搖晃。他們都很好。 她停下來，皺著眉站起來，“我就知道！所以你才停下來！” 她走到你身邊，用一根手指戳你的胸口。 “有兩件事。首先，謝謝你，我為他們感到驕傲。其次，你不是我喜歡的類型。不錯的嘗試，大個子。” 她用手指在你的襯衫上畫了一個小X，然後氣呼呼地轉過身來。 你因失落而聳聳肩，但又回到了街上。 至少嘗試一下並沒有什麼壞處。 “如果你不介意我這麼說的話，還有一些漂亮的乳房。” 這不僅僅是閒聊，彎下身子靠在桶上，你可以從她的圍裙下瞥見那兩個柔軟的球體在那裡搖晃。他們都很好。 她停下來，皺著眉站起來：“啊，所以你才進來的。” 她走到你身邊，用一根手指戳進你寬闊的胸膛。 「有兩件事。首先，謝謝你，我為他們感到驕傲。其次，你遠不是我喜歡的類型，所以謝謝你，但不，謝謝。” 她用手指在你的盔甲上畫了一個小X，然後氣呼呼地轉過身來。 你因失落而聳聳肩，然後回到街上。 至少嘗試一下並沒有什麼壞處。 離開

passages.name: OutsideFirst
passages.content:
An axe sits buried in a chopping stump. No rust on the blade, it's been used recently.

The path back to the mountain, and eventually town.

Women's clothes hung out to dry. A little bit too dainty and fashionable for someone living in the woods. Not to mention a very large bra. If what you've heard about the wytch is right, this is the place.

A water pump. Dry, but no dirt in the basin, it's been used in the last few days.

Go Inside
passages.content_zh:
一把斧子埋在砍伐的樹樁裡。刀刃沒有生鏽，最近才用過。

passages.name: InsideFirst
passages.content:
The hearth is out, though there is still some heat in the high pile of ashes. A dirty black cauldron hangs inside.

On the messy table, you find an old bowl of soup. Cold, and with a skin, but no mold. Someone was here as recently as this morning.

The room is a mess, dishes, clothes, and books strewn about carelessly, dust on every shelf and in every corner. Whoever lives here hasn't cleaned in weeks.

Go back outside

As you near the staircase, you hear the quiet shuffle of fabric and creak of furniture from above. Fortune smiles, you may have caught the Wytch sleeping in bed!

Go upstairs

If you're just going to spend your days on your back in the village, we're going to have to alter our agreement." You want to shoot back that you'd been in several positions, but based on her tone, you decide it's probably best to keep it simple, "I understand." She side-eyes you for a moment before shaking it off and returning to a smile, "Alright then, magic gained, warning delivered, water under the bridge. What's for dinner?" Dinner She sighs in frustration, "I was hoping you'd at least have an excuse! It's one thing to be late, but you didn't do a single one of the chores I asked! I honestly expected better of you !" She closes the book with a snap and stands up, eyes glinting in anger. "You show no remorse, and worse, no willingness to change your ways...I didn't want to do this, but I don't see as I have any choice." You feel her magic begin to ebb around you, but it feels darker this time, more threatening than before. Punishment "Nevermind, I'm too angry for dinner. I'm going upstairs, you stay down here tonight!" She begins storming upstairs, but pauses midway, "I warn you, , continue this, and your punishment shall be far more severe!" Go to sleep She sighs at you, "I'll be honest with you , I'm not really angry that you're late. I know you feel trapped here sometimes, and there's so many distractions out there. And you did do some chores...were you able to make up the rest with a little "work" in town?" She closes the book and stands up, holding out her hand to feel the magic within you, "Oooh, ...that is...more than enough magic. You little minx, you." As she holds out her hand, you feel that odd breezy feeling again, the same as when she uses her magic on you. The strange thing is, even though you can feel it blowing towards , you don't feel it behind you. Almost as if it's coming from you. When it finishes, smiles, "I have to admit, I'm a little disappointed I don't get to "punish" you today, but fair's fair, that was a lot of magic. Heh, and you must be exhausted after a day like today!" She pauses to deliver a mischievous wink, "Now, what's for dinner?" Dinner "Well, I suppose you did some of what I asked. Were you able to make up the rest with a little "work" in town?" She holds out a hand towards you, 'feeling' the magic within you, "Oooh, not bad . Not enough, but not bad. At least you had a bit of fun." As she holds out her hand, you feel that odd breezy feeling again, the same as when she uses her magic on you. The strange thing is, even though you can feel it blowing towards , you don't feel it behind you. Almost as if it's coming from you. When it finishes, smiles, "I just feel so lucky tonight. I get a fresh infusion of magic, and I get to punish you." She pauses a bit while her eyes twinkle mischievously, "Now, speaking of punishment!" Stay silent and accept your punishment. Her eyes flash with annoyance then give way to amusement, "So...did you just sit around all day beating off? I think a special punishment is in order. I'm going to enjoy this..." Punishment "Well, I suppose you did some of what I asked. Still, you need a little punishment." She stands up to begin casting her spell, but then pauses, looking at you curiously. She closes her eyes and holds a hand towards you, "Ooh, that's interesting! You're absolutely brimming with magic! You definitely had some fun today, didn't you, girl? I could use some of that." As she holds out her hand, you feel that odd breezy feeling again, the same as when she uses her magic on you. The strange thing is, even though you can feel it blowing towards , you don't feel it behind you. Almost as if it's coming from you. When it finishes, smiles, "What do you know, chores or not, you're proving to be even more useful than I thought !" "Now where were we, ah yes, your punishment!" Stay silent and accept your punishment. "Well, I suppose you did some of what I asked. But we have an agreement about your chores and punishment." She pauses and smiles, "To be honest, I think I might even prefer when I get to play with you..." Stay silent and accept your punishment. Tip>  Don't show tips
passages.content_zh: 當你終於回到小屋時，太陽已經快落山了，屋內溫暖的火光從窗戶照進來。 你慢慢地、小心地推開門，盡量保持安靜。有那麼一刻，你的腦海裡閃現出你第一次進入機艙時的情景，這一切都是從那時開始的。 當門完全打開時，你意識到你所有的隱身嘗試都被浪費了。 拿著一本書坐在桌子旁邊，但帶著永遠存在的微笑直視著你。 “好了好了，看看誰終於回來了，相信你玩得很開心吧？” 你低頭看著地板，有點羞愧，感覺就像一個被父母抓住的青少年。 你驚訝地聽到她笑起來：“哎呀！你就像一隻被罵的小狗！你真可愛！” 你設法擠出笑容，部分是希望看起來更可愛。 「我想我不能對你太生氣，畢竟你已經完成了所有的家務。所以我得到了一個乾淨的房子，我可以改變你作為懲罰……這就是我想要的一切。” 她把書放在一邊，站起身來：“說起來，我們是有一些改變不是嗎？” 她拍完手上的灰塵，然後去換衣服，準備吃晚飯，就好像她剛剛完成了變形和改變你的身體一樣。 你完全被所有的變化迷惑了，只能點頭並跟隨。 晚餐 她沮喪地嘆了口氣，“我希望你至少能有一個藉口！遲到是一回事，但我要求的家務你卻沒有做任何一件！說實話，我對你的期望更好！” $(function() {$("#layer8 img").attr('src', 'resources/avatar/layer8/' + State.variables.faceState + '/yelling.png')}); 她啪地合上書，站了起來，眼睛閃爍著憤怒的光芒。 你開始爭論，但她舉起一隻手阻止你，“是的，我知道你帶著充滿魔法的肚子回家了——誰知道還有什麼。我從這裡就能感覺到，我敢打賭如果我再靠近一步，我也能聞到它的味道。” 最後一部分有點傷人，但除了尷尬之外，你還很生氣。 “你管什麼？我遵守你的規則！你只是因為我真的很享受而感到不安！” 「不，我想讓你享受它，但這不是享受，這是上癮！這就是你今天所做的一切！而且這也不是第一次。這就是你想做的嗎？整天出去做愛？” 「是啊！總比和你一起被困在這裡好！」你憤怒地反擊——但這並非不真實。 看起來對你的回答感到震驚和受傷。她花了好一會兒才反應過來，但她的眼睛很快又因憤怒而瞇起。 “好吧。但這是你的選擇。” 懲罰 她沮喪地嘆了口氣，“我希望你至少能有一個藉口！遲到是一回事，但我要求的家務你卻沒有做任何一件！說實話，我對你的期望更好！” 她嘆了口氣合上書，“你至少給我帶來了一些魔法，還是你根本就沒什麼用？” 不等你回答，她走近了一步，伸出手去感受你體內的魔力，“啊啊，有一點魔力……”她說到一半就停了下來，臉上露出驚訝的表情，“噢，，不止一點點了，你忙著呢！” 當她伸出手時，你再次感受到那種奇怪的輕鬆感，就像她對你使用魔法一樣。奇怪的是，儘管你能感覺到它吹向你，但你卻感覺不到它在你身後。幾乎就好像它來自你。 完成後，合上她的手，深呼吸。她的聲音很嚴厲，但沒有之前的憤怒，“好吧，你今天擺脫了困境，但不會永遠。你來這裡是為了懲罰，也是我的幫手。如果你只是想在村里度過你的日子，我們將不得不改變我們的協議。” 你想反駁說你曾擔任過多個職位，但根據她的語氣，你決定最好保持簡單，“我理解。” 她斜視了你一會兒，然後擺脫了束縛，恢復了微笑，“好吧，魔法獲得，警告發出，橋下有水。晚餐吃什麼？” 晚餐 她沮喪地嘆了口氣，“我希望你至少能有一個藉口！遲到是一回事，但我要求的家務你卻沒有做任何一件！說實話，我對你的期望更好！” 她啪地合上書，站了起來，眼睛閃爍著憤怒的光芒。 “你沒有表現出悔意，更糟的是，不願意改變你的方式......我不想這樣做，但我不認為我有任何選擇。” 你感覺到她的魔力開始在你周圍衰退，但這次感覺比以前更黑暗，更有威脅性。 懲罰 “算了，我生氣了，吃不了飯了，我要上樓了，你今晚就在下面住吧！” 她開始衝上樓，但中途停了下來，“我警告你，再這樣下去，你的懲罰將會更加嚴厲！” 睡覺 她對你嘆了口氣，“說實話，我並不是真的因為你遲到而生氣。我知道你有時會感到被困在這裡，而且外面有很多幹擾。你確實做了一些家務……你能在城裡做點“工作”來彌補剩下的嗎？” 她合上書，站起來，伸出手感受你體內的魔力，“哦，……那是……足夠的魔力。你這個小妖精，你。” 當她伸出手時，你再次感受到那種奇怪的輕鬆感，就像她對你使用魔法一樣。奇怪的是，儘管你能感覺到它吹向你，但你卻感覺不到它在你身後。幾乎就好像它來自你。 結束後，微笑道：“我不得不承認，今天沒能‘懲罰’你，我有點失望，但公平公平，這真是太神奇了。呵呵，今天這樣的一天，你一定累壞了！” 她停下來，調皮地眨了眨眼睛，“現在，晚餐吃什麼？” 晚餐 “嗯，我想你已經做了我要求的一些事情。你能在城裡做一點‘工作’來彌補剩下的嗎？” 她向你伸出一隻手，‘感受’你體內的魔力，“哦，還不錯。還不夠，但還不錯。至少你玩得很開心。” 當她伸出手時，你再次感受到那種奇怪的輕鬆感，就像她對你使用魔法一樣。奇怪的是，儘管你能感覺到它吹向你，但你卻感覺不到它在你身後。幾乎就好像它來自你。 當它結束時，微笑著，“今晚我感覺很幸運。我得到了新鮮的魔法注入，我可以懲罰你。” 她頓了頓，眼睛閃爍著頑皮的光芒：“現在，說懲罰吧！” 保持沉默並接受懲罰。 她眼底閃過一抹惱怒，又轉為好笑，“那……你是不是整天坐著打人？我覺得應該有一個特別的懲罰，我會很享受這個……” 懲罰 “嗯，我想你已經按照我的要求做了一些。不過，你還是需要一點懲罰。” 她站起來開始施展咒語，但隨後停了下來，好奇地看著你。她閉上眼睛，向你伸出一隻手，“哦，這很有趣！你絕對充滿了魔力！你今天肯定玩得很開心，不是嗎，女孩？我可以利用其中的一些。” 當她伸出手時，你再次感受到那種奇怪的輕鬆感，就像她對你使用魔法一樣。奇怪的是，儘管你能感覺到它吹向你，但你卻感覺不到它在你身後。幾乎就好像它來自你。 當它完成時，微笑著，“你知道什麼，無論是否做家務，事實證明你比我想像的更有用！” “現在我們在哪裡，啊，是的，你的懲罰！” 保持沉默並接受懲罰。 「嗯，我想你做了一些我要求的事情。但是我們對你的家務和懲罰有一個協議。” 她頓了頓，微笑道：“說實話，我想我可能更喜歡和你一起玩……” 保持沉默並接受懲罰。 提示> 不顯示提示

passages.content: Of course, it's not real. You can feel that has genuinely started to open up to you, even to trust you. You can use this to plan your escape. Before you know it, dinner has long finished and it's nearly time to go to bed. ...though nowhere near time to sleep, she tells you with a seductive wink. Upstairs gives you a warm "goodnight" and heads upstairs to bed first. You finish cleaning and head up yourself later. Head upstairs to bed

passages.content: You have nothing specific to practice right now, so simply spend the time making small changes to objects around the cabin and enjoying the wonder of magic. Back "Ok, magic!" you say to outloud, hyping yourself up. You feel a little nervous, recalling that magic requires a strong imagination. Not just because of the dire warnings about miscast spells, but you're also well aware that imagination was never your strongest skill. Best to start with something simple. There are plenty of possible targets, what could you experiment with? The room is already clean...you could try making a mess and cleaning it up? But you're worried about trying to imagine randomness...and you don't want to have to clean again it if it doesn't work. Maybe one of the books, using magic to pull it off the shelf onto the table. But you don't know what's on each page. Do you have to imagine that too? If you imagine it wrong or imperfectly, will it change the contents of the book? This is more complicated than you thought! You continue searching the room for something small, simple, easy. At last you find the perfect candidate: a single coin sitting on the table. It's small, inconspicuous, and most importantly, easy to imagine. You've used the coins of the realm your entire life - and are intimately familiar with how it looks on each side. Flipping it over should be an easy first trick. But first you need to summon magic. You close your eyes, focusing inwards. Deep within you, you can feel it, a tingly, breezy kind of sensation, swirling in your core. You let it tickle your insides as it shifts and shimmers. Strangely, you realize this isn't a new feeling. When you've been excited, nervous, felt 'butterflies' in your stomach, it's always been a part of you. Simmering inside, just beneath the surface of your consciousness. The question is whether 's magic has given you access to it, or you simply never noticed it before. You've never been one to shy away from danger, but you're still a little nervous, meddling with something so powerful and dangerous. You steel yourself and take a deep breath. "My what..." The feeling surprises you enough to stop speaking. As you spoke, that swirling, random power suddenly aligned. For an instant, the whirlpool became a river within you. It was frightening and exhilarating all at once, but you accessed your power, your magic. You can do magic. You haven't felt this excited in a long, long time. You're almost shaking with the possibilities and potential. You've already spent quite a bit of time practicing, and burned through most of your magic. Probably best to call it a day. As you finish, you hear the telltale sound of footsteps coming up the path. You quickly clean up and smile, just as reaches the cabin. Finish Practice Finish practice Finish practice "Best to start simple..." you say to yourself, looking back to the coin. It's sitting patiently on the table, ready to be flipped over. You focus again on your magic, feeling the ebb and flow of the powers within you. According to the book, you have to visualize the coin being flipped, to see and believe completely that it's turned over. You stare at the coin, brow furrowed in concentration. It's currently tails, but you try to imagine the heads side on top. It's harder than you expected, your eyes and brain fighting your imagination. You keep repeating "heads, heads..." over and over, but you still see tails. It takes ages to convince yourself. Your neck is aching from the constant tensing, your eyes are starting to lose focus. As a bead of sweat begins trickling down your brow, your eyes refocus and you can FINALLY see it. The coin looks like the heads side is facing up. Now is your chance! "My what a...um...a turned over coin?" Shit. Unsure what to say, you stumble over your words, distracting your concentration. In an instant you lose the image an all your focus is gone. You sigh heavily, exhausted from the effort - with a bit of a headache. You decide that's enough for today. As you finish, you hear the telltale sound of footsteps coming up the path. You quickly clean up and smile, just as reaches the cabin. Finish Practice Finish practice Finish practice "Let's try this again." you say with determination. You find the coin again, placing it heads down on the table. You stare at it for a moment, gathering your concentration and confidence, then close your eyes to prepare. With your eyes closed, you picture your surroundings. The room, the table, and of course the coin. In your mind, you picture it in careful detail, sitting on the table, with its heads side on top. It comes much more easily than yesterday, but the biggest change is having your eyes closed! It's so much easier to picture without your eyes constantly disagreeing with you! When you are ready…when you perfectly see the coin with the heads on top, you take a deep breath, and say the phrase. "My what a lucky day! A coin with heads on top!" You feel the swirling tingles of magic deep inside align then flow upwards and outwards. You feel that familiar breeze blowing from you into the room. The magic finishes in an instant, but you take your time to open your eyes - relishing the feelings before you check the result. Eventually you let go a breath you didn't know you'd been holding and open your eyes. Sitting in front of you is a coin. Heads side up. "Yessss!" you squeal in delight, not caring for a moment how high and girlish your voice sounds. You did it! You're a wytch! Err...wizard...or...whatever, you've got magic! You pick up the coin to admire your work. Heads! You flip it over. Heads! Wait, what? You flip it a few more times as it dawns on you what you just did. You didn't flip the coin. You pictured it with heads on top, and the top became heads...while the bottom didn't change. The book was right, this is more complicated than you thought. You can't help but laugh, still too happy at having completed a spell to worry that it didn't go quite right. You pocket your new "trick" coin, full of excitement to try again tomorrow. As you finish, you hear the telltale sound of footsteps coming up the path. You quickly clean up and smile, just as reaches the cabin. Finish Practice Finish practice Finish practice Despite your little "mistake" yesterday, you're filled with excitement today. You slam a fresh coin on the table and take a step back. You're finding imagining gets easier with practice. Closing your eyes, you picture the coin first - this time in isolation. You see the two sides, heads and tails - with the heads side decidedly facing up. The rest of the scene drifts in around it, the table, the room, etc. Comfortable with your image, you speak the words. "My what luck, a heads-up coin." Magic swirls again, the cooling breeze blowing from within you. It's a calming, pleasant feeling, like you are one with the world, connected by the magic flowing through you. It's something deeper and greater than yourself. It's so enjoyable, you almost lose focus of your image of the coin. When it finishes, you cautiously open your eyes. The coin sits heads up. You flip it over to find tails. Pride swells inside you. You're doing it! You're getting better! Since you arrived here, you've approached most days with anger, dread, or resignation. For the first time in many days, you're actually excited for what the future will bring. As you finish, you hear the telltale sound of footsteps coming up the path. You quickly clean up and smile, just as reaches the cabin. Finish Practice Finish practice Finish practice High on your success with the coin, you decide to try something a little bigger…or at least more useful. Scanning the room for your next target, your eyes stop on the broom. You’re very familiar with it, having swept up more times than you care to count. Plus, seen animate it to clean the room, so you know it's possible. You close your eyes and start with an image of the broom in careful detail, then add in the room around it, so it’s floating in the center. It's definitely harder with something moving - picturing all the different ways it can swoop about in the air. You remember to try imagining it whole to avoid changing anything. And after a long time of focus, you smile and speak. "My what an amazing broom, flying wherever I command!" You feel the magic swirling out from inside, followed by the gentle breeze of magic surrounding you. When the spell completes and the wind stops, you cautiously open your eyes. The broom stands, floating silently in the center of the room, almost as if it were standing at attention. Your breath catches in your throat in excitement. It's actually working! After a few minutes of dancing in triumph, you decide to try and actually do something with your newly enchanted broom. "Um…go left?" The broom floats to your left, setting off another round of excited dancing. "Go right!" the broom floats across the room to the right. "Sweep!" the broom lowers itself to the ground and begins sweeping. This is going to save you so much time! You're casting spells like a real wytch! Come to think of it, are you a real wytch? After all, you're a girl now…a girl with magic. Hell, you've even got a magical broomstick. You can't help but laugh, picturing yourself zooming around on a flying broomstick. "Eep!" you cry out in shock. The broom seems to have followed your imagination a little too closely, flying up between your legs and trying to lift you off the ground! You grab on, trying to maintain balance as it bucks and pushes upwards. It's struggling with your weight, but managing to hold you aloft - barely. You're in absolute awe of the power of magic. While not exactly zooming yet, you are actually, really, flying! At the same time, you also realize how dangerous this is. It was just the briefest image, a fleeting thought about flying, and the magic made it happen. You'll have to constantly be on your guard with this power. But first…you have to get down. "Go down!" No response. "Uh…land!" You try a few different variations, but the broom doesn't budge. Maybe it's because you're not imagining it? You're having a hard time imagining anything right now, suspended off the ground and struggling to keep your balance. Even worse, with the handle up between your legs, it's pushed up against your pussy. Each little shake feels really good, and you're starting to get quite excited. Truth be told, while you want to get down, you wouldn't mind the broom shaking just a little more. Finally, the broom responds…by shaking more! Exactly as you just imagined. Its shaking is getting smoother but much faster and more intense. You begin to breathe faster as the pleasure overtakes your senses and you have to keep an even tighter grip. Soon the broom is less shaking and more vibrating between your legs. You can feel your pussy pulsing and growing wet, smearing its juices on the broom as your hips begin to hump against it. It's too much! You lose your balance and are forced to wrap your arms and legs around the broom to avoid falling, your hips still bucking wildly. You can feel the vibrations through your whole body - against your legs, on your pussy, even between your breasts - tipping you over the edge into orgasm. You scream out, still wrapped tightly around the broom like it was your lover. You're tired and a little sore from holding on so tight for so long, but you manage to turn upside down and hang like a sloth before letting go. You manage to land without hurting yourself too badly. Not on the landing anyway - as soon as you hit the carpet, the spell seems to end, and the broom falls, conking you on the head. You laugh at the absurdity of the whole situation. You're going to have to be careful to not do that again…either that or do it again very soon. As you finish, you hear the telltale sound of footsteps coming up the path. You quickly clean up and smile, just as reaches the cabin. Finish Practice Finish practice Finish practice "Alright Broom, let's try this again." you say rubbing your hands together and eyeing your target. Despite the interesting result last time, you're eager to try the magic again. You begin the ritual as before, creating a snapshot of the room and broom in your mind, then merging it with images of the broom moving about on its own. This time you're sure to imagine it sweeping the floor, and careful to keep out any intrusive thoughts or fantasies. You allow yourself a little bit of pride, imagining your spells is coming more and more easily. You're actually starting to get pretty good at it! When you're satisfied with the picture in your mind, you take a deep breath and speak, "My what a helpful broom! Cleaning up like that!" You smile and bite your lip. Even before you open your eyes, you hear the telltale swishing sound of the broom, sweeping up as you commanded. When you finally open your eyes you can't help but giggle. It's working! The broom is sweeping! You spend a few moments admiring your handiwork while the broom cleans. When the spot is clean, you direct it to move over and sweep another area, then the next, etc. Soon the room is looking much cleaner and it's only taken…about 20 minutes. 對於移動的東西來說肯定更難——想像它在空中猛撲的所有不同方式。你讓自己在精神上「感覺」掃帚、重量、質地、末端的刷毛。你需要一段時間才能在腦海中完全看到它，但它最終會到來。 「是的，我看到了。 」 「好，現在說出來，就像我一樣，」她在你耳邊低語。 「我的掃帚真是太有用了，聽指揮跳舞。 」 你閉上眼睛，專注於內心。在你的內心深處，你可以感覺到它，一種刺痛的、微風般的感覺，在你的核心盤旋。當它移動和閃爍時，你讓它在你的內心發癢。奇怪的是，你意識到這並不是什麼新感覺。當你興奮、緊張、感覺胃裡有「蝴蝶」時，它一直是你的一部分。就在你的意識表面之下，在內心醞釀。問題是 的魔法是否讓你能夠接觸到它，或者你只是以前從未註意到它。 保持鎮靜很困難，但很有效。你感覺到你體內魔法的漩渦刺痛感對齊並從你身上向外流動。你感覺到熟悉的微風從你身上吹進房間。這是一種平靜、愉快的感覺，就像你與世界融為一體，透過流經你體內的魔力而連結。喜歡比自己更深刻、更偉大的東西。這太令人愉快了，你幾乎失去了掃帚圖像的焦點。 「睜開眼睛。」的聲音在你耳邊低語。 你小心翼翼地睜開眼睛。掃帚也是一樣，掃著，飄在同一個地方。 「有效嗎？」你小心翼翼地問。 「好吧，掃帚，就像昨天一樣。」你大聲說出來，就好像無生命的物體能聽到你的聲音一樣。 雖然昨天看到它旋轉和跳舞，你不太確定它是多麼“無生命”。既然你已經體驗並研究了魔法，你對世界上的許多事情就不再那麼確定了。 你閉上眼睛，就像教你的那樣，想像掃帚的樣子。你在心裡小心翼翼地撫摸著它，多節但光滑的手柄，一捆樹枝構成了頭部，還有一根小紅線將它們綁在一起。當你覺得腦海中已經有了完美的形象時，你就會小心翼翼地念出咒語。 “我的掃帚真棒，準備掃地了！” 你感覺到魔法在你體內攪動，從你腹部深處的某個地方向上流動，並透過你伸出的手。你感覺到風吹了起來，睜開眼睛，卻看到掃帚向你飛馳而來。 邦克 你在腦海中再次運行這個圖像。它非常完美，每一個小細節，每一個旋鈕和結，樹枝束的形狀，你都可以看到......非常接近。 當你意識到自己的錯誤時，你拍了拍額頭。你如此著迷於掃帚的細節，你在腦海中非常近距離地想像它。魔法並沒有失敗，它只是按照你所想的那樣做了——掃帚就在你眼前。 passages.name: DinnerHottie
passages.content: "Mmm, smells good today, , did they have something special at the market?" You shrug, "Just the usual I think, I…uh…wasn't really paying attention." It's a half-truth. You weren't really paying attention to the wares at the store, but only because you were preoccupied with all the townsfolk who were paying attention to you. It was bound to happen. A small town that has trouble with "the scarlet wytch", then a red-haired woman nobody knows starts suddenly showing up, doesn't take a genius to put two and two together. They already knew about , and now they probably know about you. They might knowthink you're a wytch too. They might even be planning the next attack on you now! seems to notice you worrying about it, "You look troubled, , everything ok? Something happen in town? If some boy took advantage of you, say the word and I'll turn him into a slug." You snicker at her joke despite yourself, "No, no, nothing like that…but I am a little worried. Recently in town, people have been…noticing me. They watch me when I'm in their shop, they turn back in the street after I pass by, I can feel their eyes on me everywhere I go. They might be watching us!" blinks twice before throwing her head back in laughter so hard that she nearly falls over. You fail to find the humor, "I'm serious! They might connect me with you, or think I'm a wytch!" She shakes her head, trying hard to stop laughing - and absolutely failing, "Oh gods, you're adorable! And so sweet to be looking out for me like that! But you have nothing to worry about, I'm sure." "So then why has everyone been watching me so closely in town?" "Because you're a hottie, ! They aren't watching you, they're watching you." You're completely shocked, stunned by the news. "I'm…hot? You mean they're all just…" "Yup, probably trying to imagine you naked." "I never even considered it. I mean, I know what I look like, and I know that I would probably take a glance. But I didn't really expect it to be this bad, this obvious." "You don't know the half of it, girl. Men are dogs like that, they can't resist a pretty face and a tight little body. Or a nice rack, or a sweet ass - and girl, you're ranking pretty high on those criteria. Hell, I bet you could walk up to nearly any boy in town and have your way with him." goes back to eating nonchalantly while you sit in stunned silence. You're a hottie. The implications swirl around your conflicted mind. Is this good? It's not exactly bad. Should you be happy? Angry? Could you really go out and pick up random guys? "You know, you really ought to eat your dinner. You're going to need your strength if you want to catch a man next time you're in town." "Though, you don't have to wait that long if you don't want to." Upstairs She eventually finishes and goes upstairs, leaving you to your thoughts…and a lot of dishes.. Head upstairs to bed You can now use your looks to pick up random people for sex when in town.

passages.name: DinnerBroomstick
passages.content: You serve out the bowls and utensils as usual, filling each with stew for dinner as finishes changing into her house clothes and relaxes. "Oh ! You wouldn't believe the day I've had." She puts her feet up on the bench and leans back, rubbing the bridge of her nose. "Oh?" you mutter, knowing full well she's about to tell you whether you want to hear it or not. "Yes! So I met with a faery out in the woods today. She tried like three times to enchant me! I even told her I was a wytch and she didn't believe me! Said I didn't look like one! As if she expected me to fly down on a broom cackling with a pointy hat! The nerve of some people!" You chuckle nervously at her story, your experience with the broom flashing hotly in your mind. But was she being serious about it or not? Only one way to find out. "I'm kind of embarrassed to ask, but...is it true?" She eyes you suspiciously, "Is what true?" Your cheeks are getting hot again, "The...uh...broom thing? Do wytches actually ride them?" Her eyes narrow as she stares at you, studying your face. Does she know about you and the broom? You can feel your cheeks blushing more and more as her eyes burrow into you. Finally, she bursts out laughing, "Could your face get any redder ? Gods you're so cute when you're being shy!" You feel an instant wave of relief knowing that your secret is safe. "It's not a crazy question, but no, wytches don't really fly around on broomsticks. If you need to fly around for some reason, you could enchant something to fly, but a broomstick would be a lousy choice. Way too easy to fall off, I'd think. Worse, it's just too conspicuous. No better way to advertise there's a wytch nearby than for a dozen farmers to see her zoom by on a sweeper!" "That makes sense, but then why are wytches famous for riding them?" Her lips curl in a playful smile, "Because, my curious little red fox, wytches don't ride broomsticks, they ride broomsticks." You feel your face starting to turn red again as she explains. "Think about it, a broomstick is about the right size and shape, nice and smooth, but also a bit bumpy. One of the first spells a young wytch learns is how to animate objects. Are you telling me a horny little firecracker like you hasn't at least thought of that?" You shake your head a little too hard and give a very unconvincing, "No!" She side-eyes you, keeping her smile, "Uh huh. Anyway, I'm sure some time, somewhere, a wytch or two has been seen "cleaning," and the rumors probably just spread from there." Admit what you did with the broom Hide the truth!
passages.content_zh: 你像往常一樣把碗和器皿端上來，在每個碗和器皿中盛上燉菜作為晚餐，然後換上她的家居服並放鬆下來。 “哦！你不會相信我已經度過了這一天。” 她把腳放在長凳上，向後靠去，揉著鼻樑。 「喔？」你嘟咕噥著，心裡清楚她即將告訴你，不管你想聽還是不想聽。 “是的！所以我今天在树林里遇到了一位仙女。她三度试图对我施魔法！我什至告诉她我是一个巫师，但她不相信我！说我看起来不像巫师！好像她希望我骑着扫帚飞下来，戴着尖尖的帽子咯咯地笑！有些人的神经！” 你聽著她的故事緊張地笑起來，你的腦海中閃現出你使用掃帚的經歷。但她是認真的還是不認真的？ 只有一種方法可以找出答案。 “我有點不好意思問，但是……這是真的嗎？” 她疑惑地看著你，“這是真的嗎？” 你的臉頰又開始發熱了，“那個……呃……掃帚之類的東西？巫妖真的會騎它們嗎？” 她瞇起眼睛盯著你，研究你的臉。她知道你和掃帚的事嗎？當她的眼睛深深地盯著你時，你能感覺到你的臉頰越來越紅。 最後，她笑了起來：“你的臉能再紅點嗎？天哪，你害羞的樣子太可愛了！” 知道你的秘密是安全的，你立刻感到如釋重負。 “这不是一个疯狂的问题，但不，巫妖并不会真的骑着扫帚飞来飞去。如果你出于某种原因需要飞来飞去，你可以附魔一些东西来飞，但扫帚将是一个糟糕的选择。我认为太容易掉下来。更糟糕的是，它太显眼了。没有什么比让十几个农民看到她骑着扫帚飞驰而过更好的广告方式了，附近有巫妖！” “這是有道理的，但是為什麼巫妖會因為騎它們而聞名呢？” 她的嘴角勾起一抹俏皮的微笑，“因為，我那隻好奇的小紅狐，巫婆不騎掃帚，他們騎掃帚。” 當她解釋時，你感覺到你的臉又開始變紅了。 “想想看，扫帚的大小和形状都差不多，漂亮、光滑，但也有点凹凸不平。年轻巫婆学会的第一个咒语就是如何让物体动起来。你是在告诉我一个角质的小鞭炮吗？你至少没有想到过这一点吗？” 你搖搖頭有點用力，給了一個非常令人難以置信的聲音：“不！” 她斜视着你，保持着微笑，“嗯嗯。总之，我确信在某个时间、某个地方，有人看到一两个巫婆在“打扫卫生”，而谣言可能就是从那里传播开来的。” 承認你用掃帚做了什麼 隱藏真相！

passages.name: BroomstickBoom
passages.content: You chuckle nervously, feeling your cheeks reddening slightly, "Huh. That makes sense." doesn't answer, she just keeps watching you with that smile. Does she suspect? You feel yourself blushing even more. "I mean, I can see that…that it would…you know…fit…heh." She's still smiling. Oh gods, she knows! How could she not, your face is burning up in embarrassment! "OK FINE! You caught me! I fucked the broom! And before you ask, yes it felt fantastic! Is that what you wanted to hear?" She keeps smiling and nods, keeping her composure, "Oh? "C'mon upstairs Red, let's have a little fun. Feel free to bring the broom if you like." "Ha ha, funny joke." "That was a joke, right?" Upstairs You finish cleaning and head up yourself later. Head upstairs to bed
passages.content_zh: 你緊張地笑了笑，感覺臉頰微微泛紅，“嗯，有道理。” 她沒有回答，只是一直微笑著看著你。她懷疑嗎？你感覺自己臉更紅了。 “我的意思是，我可以看到……它會……你知道……適合……呵呵。” 她還在微笑。天哪，她知道！怎麼可能，你的臉都羞得發燙了！ 「好吧，好吧！你抓住了我！我操了掃帚！在你問之前，是的，感覺棒極了！你想听的是這個嗎？” 她保持微笑，點點頭，保持鎮靜，“哦？聽起來不錯。” 好吧，這不是您期待的答案。她期待這樣嗎？她怎麼能保持如此鎮定呢？你震驚地坐了一會兒……至少在竊笑開始之前是這樣。 幾乎是在碗裡噴鼻息，再也無法抑制笑聲了。 你們也開始笑得很厲害，以至於你們都喘不過氣來。 “噢，紅，歡迎來到俱樂部！” 最後你不再笑了，也快到了睡覺的時間了。 “上樓吧，紅，我們玩點樂子吧。如果你願意的話，可以帶上掃帚。” “哈哈，好笑的笑話。” “那是個笑話，對吧？” 樓上 你完成清潔工作，稍後再出發。 上樓睡覺

passages.name: DinnerMonsters
passages.content: You serve out dinner and sit down together to eat. She strikes up the conversation, "So I've told you all about myself and my magic, how about you?" You shrug, "Um, ok. What do you want to know?" "Well…what's a hunter's life like? I know! What's the biggest monster you've ever fought." It's your turn to smile, you enjoy telling stories of your hunts. "That's not the question you want to ask," you say dramatically, "You want the second biggest. It's a much better story." "Oooh, tell me about it!" She leans in on her elbows, eyes sparkling with anticipation. "The biggest was a gorgeworm that got way too large for its own good. Big enough to wrap itself around this house..twice! But it was easy to take care of, winter was coming, so I just waited for it to go into hibernation and put a spear through its head." You stab a carrot with your fork for emphasis. "Wow! Still brave of you, if it woke up, it could have eaten you whole!" You shrug, "They're heavy sleepers. Like I said, the worm wasn't that interesting. The second biggest, and nearly the size of a house itself, was an ogre!" gasps, covering her mouth, "An ogre! I take it back, you’re not brave, you’re crazy! Even with magic I wouldn't mess with an ogre! They’ll eat an entire village in a night! Guards and all!" "Oh I know! In fact, this ogre had done just that. By the time I'd arrived, the town was empty, either deserted or just dessert. When I got there, he'd crushed in a thatch roof cottage, and was using the whole house like a makeshift chair while he finished eating a flock of sheep." "Did you wait for him to sleep too? Stab him in the head?" she mimics the action, fully engrossed in the tale. You laugh, "Not this time. Ogres aren't only huge, they're hard to kill. Arms and legs are strong and wide, their bellies are huge and fat, and their skulls are thick with bone. There’s nowhere within reach where you can actually injure them. The only real vulnerable parts are their eyes or throat. But with this one sitting on a crushed house, there was no way to get up there sneakily for an attack." "What did you do?" "The only sensible thing, I threw a tomato at him." "What?" "Yup - Splat! Right across his forehead." "What the heck would that do, besides make him angry?" "That's the point, I wanted him to chase me. And he did! He was up and roaring in a flash! I could feel the ground shake with every footfall as he ran towards me. Thankfully, I made my way to the inn." "Wait, you said this thing was as big as a house, and even crushed one to make a chair. How would going into an inn protect you? Wouldn't he just crush it too?" "That’s what I was counting on. See, before I threw the tomato, I snuck around town a bit. This inn had a very nice, and very deep wine cellar. When the ogre tried to crush me, he went straight through the floor! I was already out the other side, ready to strike when he fell!" You pull a spoon across your throat and mine the death throes of the ogre. claps in delight. "What a story! Oh, I'm going to need more of those!" "It was a good one, hefty profit, and I found a good few unopened bottles of wine." After a short pause, "How about you?" "What about me?" "You're a part of the world of magic, you must have some fantastical run-ins." "Me? Oh no. Some wytches go for those kinds of adventures, but most stay away from that life. It's a little weird, but I can't help feel a little guilty about monsters." "What do you mean?" "Most of the monsters in the world were made by wytches." "You made them?!?" you nearly drop your spoon. Her eyes flash in anger for a moment before cooling, "No, not me! And not on purpose…usually. It's mostly inexperienced wytches who messed up their spells. Magic can be dangerous and unpredictable." "How does somebody mess up a spell and create an ogre?" "At a guess, probably a spell to make someone stronger, or taller, or both. But they overdid it, or didn’t control themselves when casting." Your eyes are wide and your jaw is nearly on the table, "And you're telling me most monsters came about this way?" "Wytch magic is very old and very powerful." "How about harpies?" "Flight spell." "Lizardfolk?" "Enchanted pet." "Gelatinous cubes?" "A fetish carried waaay too far." "Vampires?" "Ugh, trust me, you don't want to know." You sit back, absolutely stunned. Your world just got a whole lot larger and smaller at the same time. You feel the blood drain from your face as another realization comes over you, "So ogres were people." "At one point, yes, some people somewhere were turned into orges. Though now most are just born as ogres from ogre parents. Still though, kind of puts your profession in a new perspective, doesn't it?" That's an understatement, "I always thought I was protecting people from monsters." "Don't be too hard on yourself, you probably still saved quite a few people. Monsters are often…well, monsters. That ogre still ate a town. But they might not all have deserved it. It's just a little more complicated. Believe me, magic may seem like a shortcut to solve any problem, but it never makes anything simpler." You sit quietly for a long time, head still swimming with this new information. She giggles at your perplexed state, "Well, I can see I've given you a lot to think about, and it's late. I think I'll head up for the night." "...not to mention, I promised you another battle in the bedroom tonight." Upstairs She goes upstairs, leaving you to your thoughts…and a lot of dishes.. Head upstairs to bed
passages.content_zh: 你們把晚餐端上來，然後坐在一起吃飯。 她開始對話，“我已經告訴了你關於我自己和我的魔法的一切，你呢？” 你聳聳肩，“嗯，好吧。你想知道什麼？” 「嗯……獵人的生活是什麼樣的？我知道！你打過的最大的怪物是什麼。” 現在輪到你微笑了，你喜歡講述你的狩獵故事。 “這不是你想問的問題，”你戲劇性地說，“你想要第二大的問題。這是一個更好的故事。” 「喔哦，快告訴我吧！」她靠在手肘上，眼睛裡閃爍著期待的光芒。 「最大的是一隻大蠶蟲，它變得太大了。大到足以將自己包裹在這座房子周圍......兩次！但它很容易照顧，冬天即將到來，所以我只是等待它進入冬眠，然後用長矛刺穿它的頭。」你用叉子刺一根胡蘿蔔以示強調。 「哇！你膽子還真大，它要是醒了，估計會把你整個吃掉的！” 你聳聳肩，“它們睡得很沉。就像我說的，那條蟲子沒那麼有趣。第二大的，幾乎有房子那麼大，是一隻食人魔！” 「食人魔！我收回剛才的話，你不勇敢，你瘋了！即使有魔法，我也不會招惹食人魔！他們會在一夜之間吃掉整個村莊！守衛什麼的！” 「哦，我知道！事實上，這個食人魔就是這麼做的。當我到達時，小鎮已經空無一人，要么是荒無人煙，要么只是甜點。當我到達那裡時，他已經擠在一間茅草屋頂的小屋裡，一邊吃完一群羊，一邊把整個房子當作臨時椅子。” 「你也等他睡了？捅他的頭？」她模仿這個動作，完全沉浸在故事裡。 你笑道：「這次不行了。食人魔不僅體型龐大，而且很難殺死。他們的胳膊和腿又粗又粗，肚子又大又胖，頭骨又厚又厚，根本就沒有地方可以真正傷害到他們。唯一真正脆弱的地方就是他們的眼睛和喉嚨。但這個人坐在被壓扁的房子裡，根本沒辦法偷偷去攻擊。」 “你做了什麼？” “唯一明智的事情是，我向他扔了一個西紅柿。” “什麼？” “是的——啪！就在他的額頭上。” “這除了讓他生氣之外還能做什麼？” 「就是這樣，我想讓他追我。他做到了！他一瞬間就站了起來，咆哮著！當他向我跑來時，我能感覺到每一個腳步聲都讓地面震動。謝天謝地，我還是到了旅館。” 「等等，你說這東西有房子那麼大，還把它壓碎了做成椅子，進客棧怎麼能保護你？他不會也把它壓碎吧？” 「這就是我所指望的。瞧，在我扔西紅柿之前，我在城裡溜達了一圈。這家旅館有一個非常漂亮、非常深的酒窖。當食人魔試圖壓碎我時，他直接穿過地板！我已經在另一邊了，準備在他摔倒時發起攻擊！」你用勺子摀住喉嚨，挖掘食人魔陣痛。 高興地鼓起掌來。 “多好的故事啊！哦，我需要更多這樣的故事！” “這是一筆好生意，利潤豐厚，而且我發現了好幾瓶未開封的葡萄酒。” 短暫的停頓後，“那你呢？” “關於我的什麼？” “你是魔法世界的一部分，一定會遇到一些奇幻的遭遇。” 「我？哦不。有些女巫會去冒險，但大多數都會遠離那種生活。這有點奇怪，但我不禁對怪物感到有點內疚。” “你是什麼意思？” “世界上大多數怪物都是女巫創造的。” 「是你做的？！？」你差點把湯匙掉下來了。 她的眼睛閃過一陣憤怒，然後冷靜下來，“不，不是我！而且不是故意的……通常情況下。大多是沒有經驗的女巫搞砸了他們的咒語。魔法可能是危險且不可預測的。” “一個人如何搞亂咒語並創造出一個食人魔？” 「猜測，可能是一個讓某人變得更強壯，或者更高，或者兩者兼而有之的咒語。但他們做得太過分了，或者在施法時沒有控制自己。” 你的眼睛睜得大大的，下巴幾乎貼在桌子上，“你是說大多數怪物都是這樣來的？” “巫妖的魔法非常古老，而且非常強大。” “鷹身女妖怎麼樣？” “飛行咒語。” “蜥蜴人？” “附魔寵物。” “凝膠塊？” “戀物癖太過分了。” “吸血鬼？” “呃，相信我，你不會想知道的。” 你坐下來，完全驚呆了。你的世界同時變得更大和更小。 當你意識到另一個事實時，你感到臉上的血色消失了，“所以食人魔也是人。” 「是的，在某個時刻，有些人在某個地方被變成了食人魔。儘管現在大多數人只是從食人魔父母那裡生下來的食人魔。儘管如此，這還是讓你的職業有了一個新的視角，不是嗎？” 這是一個輕描淡寫的說法，“我一直以為我是在保護人們免受怪物的侵害。” 「別對自己太苛刻，你可能還救了很多人。怪物往往是……好吧，怪物。那個食人魔仍然吃了一個城鎮。但他們可能不是所有人都罪有應得。只是有點複雜。相信我，魔法似乎是解決任何問題的捷徑，但它永遠不會讓任何事情變得更簡單。” 你靜靜地坐了很長一段時間，腦子裡仍然沉浸著這些新資訊。 她對你困惑的狀態咯咯地笑起來，“好吧，我看得出來我已經給了你很多思考，而且已經很晚了。我想我該回去過夜了。” “……更何況，我答應過你今晚在臥室裡再戰一場。” 樓上 她上樓，讓你獨自思考…還有很多菜… 上樓睡覺

passages.name: DinnerMonsters-Decision
passages.content:
Your mind is still not at ease from the dinnertime discussion.

You keep thinking back to all the monsters you've hunted over the years and how some of them might have been people.

As  said, they were monsters. They were terrorizing towns…or so the townsfolk told you, but that's also what they said about . And even if they really were evil, they were also still victims…

You always considered yourself the righteous sword of justice. When situations had been weighed, the monsters found out, that's when the people sent you. You never had to think about the monsters, just kill them.

You might not have been the one passing judgment, but you always avoided questioning it. Some part of you probably knew there were questionable parts of your profession. Ignoring the morals of your actions doesn't absolve you of them.

So where does that leave you? Can you still see yourself being a hunter, even if you were to get out of here?

No. I've got a new body and a new life now, I want to explore this path.

No. Even if I got my old body back, knowing what I know now, I couldn't be a hunter anymore.

Yes…but 'hunter' might not be the right word anymore. If a target is not dangerous, or repentant, I'd like to help them instead!

Yes, while some 'monsters' might be victims, regular people are still getting hurt and even eaten by them every day. They need a protector.
passages.content_zh:
晚餐時的討論讓你的心情仍然不平靜。

你不斷回想起這些年來你獵殺過的所有怪物，以及其中一些可能是人類。

正如所說，他們是怪物。他們正在恐嚇城鎮……至少鎮民是這麼告訴你的，但這也是他們所說的。而即使他們真的是邪惡的，他們仍然是受害者…

你一直認為自己是正義的正義之劍。當權衡了情況後，怪物發現了，那就是人們派你來的時候。你永遠不必考慮怪物，只需殺死它們即可。

你可能不是做出判斷的人，但你總是避免質疑它。你的某些部分可能知道你的職業中存在有問題的部分。忽視你行為的道德並不能免除你的責任。

那你會怎樣呢？即使你要離開這裡，你還能認為自己是個獵人嗎？

不，我現在有了新的身體，有了新的生活，我要探索這條路。

不，即使我恢復了原來的身體，就我現在所知，我也不能再當獵人了。

是的……但「獵人」可能不再是正確的詞了。如果目標不危險，也不悔改，我願意幫助他們！

是的，雖然有些『怪物』可能成為受害者，但普通人每天都仍然在被它們傷害甚至吃掉。他們需要一個保護者。

passages.name: Dinner-Boobs
passages.content: You set the table, as usual, dishing out dinner. watches closely with her head propped up in her hands, smiling as always. You don’t know what, but she definitely has something on her mind. As you place her bowl in front of her she finally speaks up, "So how are the girls treating you?" "The girls? You’re the only one here…aren’t you?" you ask nervously, worried some other strange magic is at work. This makes burst out in laughter again. "No, Red, your girls, your tits!" she reaches up and bounces her breasts in emphasis. "Ohh! Yes, umm…my chest…" "Still in denial? That’s not a chest, Red, those are tits." She’s not wrong, there is still some part of you that resists calling them breasts, or tits, or whatever. Maybe it’s because they’re a new "part" of your body that you didn’t have before. Maybe it’s because they’re the most obvious part of your change - they practically scream out that you’re a girl. Even though every part of you looks like a girl now, for some reason, the one that you struggle with the most is your ch…are your breasts. And you do struggle. "Yeah yeah, I know. They’re a pain! They obstruct my view. They bump into everything. They never stop jiggling, and because they’re so sensitive, I feel EVERY jiggle!" "I know right? Guys just think they’re decorations, but they get in the way of everything!" "Gods yes, if they knew what it was really like they’d…" you stop, suddenly realizing what you’re saying. is grinning ear to ear. You slowly release your boobs (which you were holding for emphasis), letting them plop down with a jiggle, "Ok, you’ve made your point." There’s a few moments of silence before pipes up again, "But you love them, don’t you?" Yes, damnit! I don’t know, maybe No, I don't!
passages.content_zh: 你像往常一樣擺好桌子，準備晚餐。 她雙手撐著頭仔細觀察，一如既往地微笑。你不知道是什麼，但她肯定有什麼想法。 當你把碗放在她面前時，她終於開口了：“那麼女孩們對你怎麼樣？” 「女孩們？你們是這裡唯一的人……不是嗎？」你緊張地問道，擔心有其他奇怪的魔法在起作用。 這讓再次爆發出一陣笑聲。 「不，瑞德，你的女兒，你的奶子！」她抬起手，強調地彈動自己的乳房。 「喔！是的，嗯……我的胸部……” “還在否認嗎？那不是胸部，瑞德，那是乳房。” 她沒有錯，你仍然有一部分拒絕稱它們為乳房、山雀或其他什麼。也許是因為它們是你身體中以前沒有的新「部位」。也許是因為它們是你改變中最明顯的部分——它們幾乎尖叫著說你是個女孩。儘管現在你的每一部分看起來都像個女孩，但出於某種原因，你最困擾的是你的胸部。 而你確實在掙扎。 「是的，是的，我知道。它們很痛苦！它們擋住了我的視線。它們撞到了所有東西。它們永遠不會停止晃動，而且因為它們非常敏感，我能感覺到每一次晃動！” 「我知道對吧？人們只是認為它們是裝飾品，但它們妨礙了一切！」 「天啊，是的，如果他們知道那到底是什麼樣的，他們就會……」你停了下來，突然意識到自己在說什麼。 笑得合不攏嘴。 你慢慢地鬆開你的胸部（你為了強調而握住它），讓它們輕輕地垂下來，“好吧，你已經表達了你的觀點。” 沉默了一會兒，然後再次開口：“但你愛他們，不是嗎？” 是的，該死！ 我不知道，也許 不，我不！

passages.name: Yes, damnit!
passages.content: "Yes, damnit!" you yell, half angry, half laughing. "They’re all the things I said. Heavy, annoying, always in the way, always bouncing. But I do love them. They’re so soft and warm, and they feel so good to hold and touch! I know this sounds crazy coming from me, but I even love the way they stretch out my shirt. I was attractive before, but now I feel…sexy." "Yes! You get it! They’re so bothersome, but I wouldn’t give them up for the world. Boobs are awesome." You nod sheepishly, surprised at how much you find yourself adapting to your new shape. Another moment of silence passes before you work up the will to ask a question that’s been burning in you for a few days. "So…are they real?" "Don’t you think that’s a bit personal, Red?" "Oh, sorry, I didn’t mean anything! I was just curious whether or not you used magic to, you know, enhance them." She waves it off, "Just kidding, I get it, I would be curious too. You don’t often find beauties like these naturally," she hefts them in her hands for a little shimmy. "Well, I didn’t enhance them. My matron - the woman who taught me magic - did. It’s actually very difficult to use magic on oneself, so she helped me out as a gift. Actually, I was always pretty busty, but big boobs aren’t always the prettiest. They sag or get stretch marks or the like. She kept the size I already had, but gave me this impeccable shape…ok maybe a little extra size too." "Do wytches often enchant each other like that?" She shakes her head as she chews on a bite of stew, "It takes a lot of trust to allow another wytch to enchant you, they could do anything they want with your defenses down. So it’s not something we do regularly. But that said, a matron will usually give her apprentice some banging looks as a gift. Wytches power their magic with sex, so being drop-dead-gorgeous is kind of part of the trade." "Wait, are you planning on that for me? Are you going to give me huge tits too!?! This size is big enough!" She grins at you, "Well then, you’d better keep working hard at your chores! I think you get more delicious with each inch. Plus it’s nice to have somebody to complain to about big-boob problems." With that she stands up and stretches, finished with dinner. "Anyway, come upstairs, I can show you some of the big-boob benefits." Upstairs You finish cleaning and head up yourself later. Head upstairs to bed
passages.content_zh: 「是啊，可惡！」你大喊，半生氣，半笑。 「它們都是我說的。沉重、煩人、總是礙事、總是彈跳。但我確實喜歡它們。它們是如此柔軟和溫暖，握起來和触摸起來感覺很好！我知道這聽起來很瘋狂，但我什至喜歡它們伸展我襯衫的方式。我以前很有吸引力，但現在我感覺……性感。” 「是的！你明白了！它們太麻煩了，但我不會放棄它們。胸部太棒了。」 你不好意思地點點頭，驚訝地發現自己已經適應了新的形狀。 又過了片刻的沉默，你才鼓起勇氣提出一個困擾你幾天的問題。 “那麼……它們是真的嗎？” “你不覺得這有點私人化嗎，瑞德？” 「哦，抱歉，我沒有別的意思！我只是好奇你是否使用魔法來增強它們。” 她擺擺手，「開個玩笑，我明白了，我也會好奇的。你不會經常發現這樣的美女，」她把它們放在手裡輕輕晃動。 「嗯，我沒有增強它們。我的女護士——教我魔法的女人——做到了。對自己使用魔法實際上非常困難，所以她幫助我作為禮物。實際上，我一直都很豐滿，但大胸部並不總是最漂亮的。它們下垂或長妊娠紋之類的。她保持了我已有的尺寸，但給了我這個無可挑剔的形狀……」好吧，也許還多了一點尺寸。」 “巫妖們常常這樣互相著迷嗎？” 她一邊嚼著一口燉菜，一邊搖頭，「需要很大的信任才能讓另一個女巫對你著迷，他們可以在你的防禦力下降的情況下做任何他們想做的事。所以這不是我們經常做的事情。不過話雖如此，主婦通常會給她的學徒一些性感的眼神作為禮物。女巫通過性來增強他們的魔法，所以華麗得令人窒息的一部分。 「等等，你打算給我這個嗎？你也要給我巨大的乳房嗎！？！這個尺寸夠大了！」 她對你笑道：“那麼，你最好繼續努力做家務！我覺得你每一寸都會變得更美味。而且，有人向你抱怨大胸問題也很好。” 說完，她站了起來，伸了個懶腰，吃完了晚餐。 “不管怎樣，上樓來，我可以給你展示一些大胸部的好處。” 樓上 你完成清潔工作，稍後再出發。 上樓睡覺

passages.name: I don’t know, maybe
passages.content: "I don’t know, maybe?" "Maybe? "Yeah. I do like them. They’re so warm and soft, and they feel amazing to touch and hold. I mean, that's nothing new, what guy doesn't like playing with a pair of tits?" You look down to find yourself unconsciously cupping them, "But it's still weird that they're on me." "It feels wrong?" "Maybe? Like I said, I like them. I'm not sure if I don't want them or I'm just not used to them yet." "If I offered to take them away, would you say yes?" "I know I'm supposed to say yes - that I'm a man and that men don't have boobs. But I'm not sure that's my answer any more. And that's the weirdest feeling of all." You trail off surprised at how much you find yourself adapting to your new shape. Another moment of silence passes before you work up the will to ask a question that’s been burning in you for a few days. "So…are they real?" "Don’t you think that’s a bit personal, Red?" "Oh, sorry, I didn’t mean anything! I was just curious whether or not you used magic to, you know, enhance them." She waves it off, "Just kidding, I get it, I would be curious too. You don’t often find beauties like these naturally," she hefts them in her hands for a little shimmy. "Well, I didn’t enhance them. My matron - the woman who taught me magic - did. It’s actually very difficult to use magic on oneself, so she helped me out as a gift. Actually, I was always pretty busty, but big boobs aren’t always the prettiest. They sag or get stretch marks or the like. She kept the size I already had, but gave me this impeccable shape…ok maybe a little extra size too." "Do wytches often enchant each other like that?" "It takes a lot of trust to allow another wytch to enchant you, they could do anything they want with your defenses down. So it’s not something we do regularly. But that said, a matron will usually give her apprentice some banging looks as a gift. Wytches power their magic with sex, so being drop-dead-gorgeous is kind of part of the trade." "Wait, are you planning on that for me? Are you going to give me huge tits too!?! This size is big enough!" She grins at you, "Well then, you’d better keep working hard at your chores! I think you get more delicious with each inch. Plus it’s nice to have somebody to complain to about big-boob problems." With that she stands up and stretches, finished with dinner. "Anyway, come upstairs, I can show you some of the big-boob benefits." Upstairs You finish cleaning and head up yourself later. Head upstairs to bed
