passages.name: Sketch
passages.content:
You spend a little time sketching out your magic practice partner: the broom.

For such a simple shape, you have a surprisingly difficult time drawing it out - getting all the lines and bristles to look good - and accurate.

You decide to sketch out  for some drawing practice. After all, she's constantly on your mind, and an easy visual reference. Not to mention that you see her every day - in excessive detail.

You start with her face, carefully sketching every detail as you see it in your mind. The curves of her eyes and lips, her cute nose, and her immaculately shaped eyebrows. You even surprise yourself with how well you're able to recall and draw out her face. Maybe this practice is working!

You even allow yourself some time to sketch further down her body. Her slender neck and shoulders, and of course her surging breasts - though looking it over, you may have taken a little artistic license with them.

When you pause to check your work, you're surprised to see how much time has passed. You really got into drawing her!

You're not really in the mood to carefully sketch something for practice - can't find the inspiration. Instead, you just let yourself go and draw a caricature of .

It's not much more than a few crudely drawn, smirking stick figures with long hair and big circle boobs. It's more silly than malicious, but you have a good giggle at the result - it definitely helps you relieve some stress.

You start off drawing another picture of , but don't really feel like just copying reality…after all, you're supposed to be practicing your imagination, so why not imagine?

You try drawing different versions of  - short hair, bigger boobs, a different nose…etc. It's surprisingly fun, you even understand a little more about the entertainment she gets out of changing you.

You keep going, drawing some wild stuff.  with a tail or a beak. You even draw a "cat" version of her - a small, cute, burgundy cat with violet eyes.

You like it so much, you even draw a few more versions of " cat".

You giggle to yourself at the silliness of your drawings, a small part of you wondering just how far you can go with magic once you learn more.

Right as you finish, you hear the telltale sound of footsteps coming up the path. You spent so long drawing that  is already home!

Back

Back
passages.content_zh:
你花了一點時間勾勒出你的魔法練習夥伴：掃帚。

對於如此簡單的形狀，將其繪製出來是非常困難的 - 讓所有線條和刷毛看起來都很好 - 並且準確。

您決定畫草圖進行一些繪畫練習。畢竟，她一直在你的腦海中，並且是一個簡單的視覺參考。更不用說你每天都能看到她——細節太多。

你從她的臉開始，仔細勾勒出你在腦海中看到的每一個細節。她的眼睛和嘴唇的曲線，她可愛的鼻子，還有她形狀完美的眉毛。你甚至會驚訝於自己竟然能如此清晰地回憶並畫出她的臉。也許這個做法有效！

你甚至給自己​​一些時間來進一步描繪她的身體。她細長的脖子和肩膀，當然還有她那高聳的乳房——儘管仔細看，你可能對它們採取了一些藝術許可。

當你停下來檢查你的工作時，你會驚訝地發現時間已經過去了多少。你真的很喜歡畫她！

你真的沒有心情仔細地畫一些草圖來練習——找不到靈感。相反，你只需放開自己，畫一幅漫畫。

它只不過是一些粗製濫造、傻笑的簡筆人物，長著長髮和大圓胸。這比惡意更愚蠢，但你對結果會咯咯笑——它絕對可以幫助你緩解一些壓力。

你開始畫另一張圖，但又不想只是複製現實……畢竟，你應該練習你的想像力，所以為什麼不想像呢？

你嘗試畫不同版本的——短髮、更大的胸部、不同的鼻子……等等。這非常有趣，你甚至可以更多地了解她從改變你中得到的樂趣。

你繼續前進，畫一些狂野的東西。  有尾巴或喙。你甚至畫了她的「貓」版本——一隻小而可愛的酒紅色貓，紫羅蘭色的眼睛。

你太喜歡了，還畫了幾個版本的「貓」。

你對自己愚蠢的圖畫咯咯地笑，你的一小部分想知道一旦你了解了更多，你能在魔法上走多遠。

當你完成時，你會聽到小路上傳來明顯的腳步聲。你畫了這麼久，已經到家了！

返回

返回

passages.name: LocketResult
passages.content:
Over the time you've been here, you've changed a lot, in ways obvious and some less so.  gave you a chance to re-examine…no…to re-make your entire life. And you’re happy with the result, happy being with her.

You decide right there that it’s time to tell her how you feel, and you have just the idea how!

Jumping up, you run to the bookshelf to fetch the small silver locket you found a few days ago. You pop it open, in the left half is the tiny painting of 's matriarch, Sophie, however, the right half is empty - for now. You grab a knife and get to work, cutting out an appropriate-sized picture of yourself from the sketchbook.

After a little trimming and positioning, you have it carefully set in the frame - a locket with Sophie on one side and you on the other.

You smile at the result, a feeling of happiness and warmth coming over you as you realize how big of a step this is. You can only hope  likes it!

Close Book

Congratulations! You have unlocked the "Locket " special ending! Giving the locket to  will end the game.

And the answer is no.

It's not that you hate the idea, you've seen the best qualities of , and you realize that getting closer to her would be an adventure full of passion and excitement - but it wouldn't be honest.

As you look over the paintings, you can see how much she cares about you, but it's something you just don't share…at least not now.

You sigh heavily and close the book, deciding to put these pictures and emotions away for today.

Close Book
passages.content_zh:
在你來到這裡的這段時間裡，你發生了很多變化，有些變化是顯而易見的，有些變化則不那麼明顯。  給了你一個重新審視……不……重新塑造你的整個生活的機會。你對結果很滿意，很高興和她在一起。

你當即決定是時候告訴她你的感受了，你也知道該怎麼做！

你跳起來，跑到書架去拿幾天前發現的小銀墜子盒。你打開它，左半邊是女族長蘇菲的小畫，然而，右半邊是空的——現在。你拿起一把刀開始工作，從素描本上剪下一張合適大小的自己的照片。

經過一點修剪和定位後，你將它小心地安裝在框架中——一個掛墜盒，一側是蘇菲，另一側是你。

你對結果微笑，當你意識到這是多麼大的一步時，一種幸福和溫暖的感覺油然而生。你只能希望喜歡它！

關閉書本

恭喜！您已解鎖「墜子盒」特殊結局！給予吊飾盒即可結束遊戲。

答案是否定的。

這並不是說你討厭這個想法，你已經看到了她最好的品質，並且你意識到接近她將是一次充滿激情和興奮的冒險 - 但這是不誠實的。

當你看著這些畫時，你可以看到她有多關心你，但這是你無法分享的……至少現在不能。

你重重地嘆了口氣，合上書，決定今天把這些圖片和情感收起來。

關閉書本

passages.name: DinnerBattery
passages.content: You grab a couple of bowls and silverware, hurrying to get dinner ready. watches you silently, reclining in her chair as if deep in thought. Just as you finish dishing out the food and sitting down yourself, she decides to pipe up, "So, , I wanted to talk about your new…hobbies down in town. Sexing up all the villagers, I mean." You feel your face going red from embarrassment, but manage to croak, "Yes?" She smiles, "It's nothing to be embarrassed about. We all have temptations and urges." You're not sure where she's going with this, but nod along. "Thanks for understanding, I guess." She continues, "I get it, you're anxious, frustrated with being here, and what's more, you've got looks that make men line up to talk to you. The temptation to throw off your responsibilities and give in to desire is simply overwhelming." You feel like a teenager getting a lecture from a parent, despite the fact that you're actually older than she is… "And the truth is, this helps me out as well. You come back, dripping in magic, saving me the need to go and recharge. So I've decided to make you an offer." Finally, the point. "For each person's worth of magic you bring me, I will forgive one chore for the day." "Wait, really? I can get out of the house, have sex, and it will get me out of work? What's the catch?" "No catch, but you'll be responsible for your end of the deal. Don't use up the magic before giving it to me. And most of all, don't make it your life to fuck random townsfolk day in and day out. You're worth more than the pleasure you can get and give." It's a deal! Sounds risky, but I agree No, I don't want that
passages.content_zh: 你抓起幾個碗和銀器，趕緊準備晚餐。 靜靜地看著你，斜靠在椅子上，彷彿陷入了沉思。 就在你端完食物並坐下時，她決定開口，“那麼，我想談談你在城裡的新……愛好。我的意思是讓所有村民都性感起來。” 你覺得自己的臉因為尷尬而紅了，但還是勉強問道：“是嗎？” 她笑道：“這沒什麼好害羞的，我們都有誘惑，都有衝動。” 你不確定她會怎麼想，但還是點頭同意。 “我想，謝謝你的理解。” 她繼續說道，“我明白，你在這裡感到焦慮、沮喪，而且，你的外表讓男人們排隊跟你說話。擺脫責任、屈服於慾望的誘惑簡直是壓倒性的。” 你感覺就像一個青少年正在接受父母的教訓，儘管事實上你比她大… “事實是，這對我也有幫助。你回來時，渾身充滿魔力，讓我不需要去充電。所以我決定向你提供報價。” 最後說重點。 “對於你給我帶來的每個人的魔法價值，我會原諒當天的一件苦差事。” “等等，真的嗎？我可以走出家門，做愛，這會讓我失業？有什麼問題嗎？” 「沒問題，但你要對交易的結果負責。在把魔法交給我之前，不要用完它。最重要的是，不要把日復一日地操隨機的鎮民當作你的生活。你比你能獲得和給予的快樂更有價值。” 這是一筆交易！ 聽起來很危險，但我同意 不，我不想那樣

passages.name: It's a deal!
passages.content: You don't even need to give it a second thought. Fewer chores, freedom outside, and the price in return is getting to fuck all day long? Just the idea sends a little tingle of pleasure through you, your .Med getting excited at the thought. "Deal!" "Well, that didn't take long," she sighs, "at first I was worried this was my doing, but I think this was always you - and I've just let you free." "What do you mean, 'always me'?" "Nothing, forget I said it. You have fun in town. Like I said, just don't make it your life…or else." her tone turns a bit dark on the "or else". You feel like she means it. It passes quickly though, and she returns to her chipper self, "Anyway, I'm heading up to bed." She pauses at the stairway, "…you want to come up and get a head start on your new tasks?" Upstairs Leaving you to the dinner cleaning and questioning whether you've made the right decision. Head upstairs to bed
passages.content_zh: 你甚至不需要再考慮一下。更少的家務，外面的自由，而回報的代價就是整天操蛋？只要這個想法就會讓你感到一絲快樂，你的醫學就會因為這個想法而感到興奮。 “交易！” 「好吧，這並沒有花很長時間，」她嘆了口氣，“起初我擔心這是我做的，但我認為這總是你的——而且我剛剛讓你自由了。” “‘永遠是我’是什麼意思？” 「沒什麼，忘了我說過的。你在城裡玩得很開心。就像我說的，只是不要把它當作你的生活……否則。」說到「否則」時，她的語氣變得有些陰沉。你感覺她是認真的。 不過時間過得很快，她又恢復了輕鬆的狀態，“不管怎樣，我要上床睡覺了。” 她在樓梯處停了下來，“…你想上來開始你的新任務嗎？” 樓上 讓你去清理晚餐並質疑你是否做了正確的決定。 上樓睡覺

passages.name: Sounds risky, but I agree
passages.content: Fewer chores, freedom outside, and the price in return is getting to fuck all day long? Even the thought sends a little tingle of pleasure through you, your .Med getting excited at the thought. You stop yourself, taking back control from your little friend downstairs. The reason it sounds too good to be true is because it is. What kind of person spends all day fucking? What kind of life would that be? Hell, even said it, you're worth more than simple carnal pleasure. But you're also not a priest. No reason you can't have the best of both worlds. You already know you're going to go back to town, and you're going to have sex at some point, why not get a little something out of it? "Well?" her impatience breaks you out of your thoughts. "Ok, deal, I guess." She smiles that sly smile at you, "I thought so. You know, at first, I was worried this was my doing, but I think this was always you - and I've just let you free." You feel like she means it. It passes quickly though, and she returns to her chipper self, "Anyway, I'm heading up to bed." She pauses at the stairway, "…you want to come up and get a head start on your new chore list?" Upstairs Leaving you to the dinner cleaning and questioning whether you've made the right decision. Head upstairs to bed

passages.name: No, I don't want that

Even the thought sends a little tingle of pleasure through you, your .Med getting excited at the thought. You shake your head, taking back control from your little friend downstairs. The reason it sounds too good to be true is because it is. What kind of person spends all day fucking? What kind of life would that be? passages.name: BatteryEnd
passages.content: .hunterMark {display:none;} #versionwarning {display:none;} ...Months later... You scream out in extacy as you quiver and shake in another orgasm. Your partner, whatever his name is, likewise grunts in pleasure as he slams into you with his own climax. That has to be your fourteenth or fifteenth orgasam of the day - though it’s hard to remember. Not that you care about the number, just that they keep coming. You stand on wobbly legs to thank your partner as he leaves. Both of you promising to meet again soon. "Well, that was fun to watch!" You jump in shock from the voice, but spin around as soon as you recognize it. "Cassy!" You see her standing near the closet, in a space that was empty a moment ago. She must have teleported in, or turned invisible, or some other wytchy thing. "Hi Red, I…OOF" she’s interrupted as you run over and give her a great big hug. "Sorry! It’s just so good to see you! You haven't come to visit me in a fortnight at least!" "Something like that, I’ve been busy. I’ve actually been made head of my coven - thanks in no small part to all the magic you've given me! And it’s nice to see you too." She looks you up and down, “especially so much of you," noting your nakedness. You giggle, not really bothered - you spend most of your time naked these days - but look for your robe anyway. stops you, "Oh don’t worry about that, I’m always happy to enjoy my artwork…in fact…" She trails off for a moment, squinting at you, before moving close and kneeling down to your chest. "Have you…grown?" she reaches out and lifts one of your enormous breasts. It takes both of her hands, and even then her fingers disappear under the soft, pale curve of your boob. "I thought I made you as big as me, but I think you might have outclassed me!" In a smooth, well practiced motion, she pulls down her top, letting her own mountainous breasts bounce free. She lines herself up against you. It’s not too dramatic, but you definitely have a notable size advantage on her. "It must be residual magic from the spell…or maybe the magic took your own desires into account…it might even be…" She’s interrupted by a knock on the door. You blush red, "That’s probably one of my clients." "Wait, didn’t one just leave?" You blush a little harder in embarrassment (but just a little). She rolls her eyes, "I’ve created a monster! Well, let him in, no sense in keeping him waiting." When you let him in, his jaw nearly hits the floor as he sees two nearly naked, impossibly busty redheads waiting for him. He probably thinks he's the luckiest person in the world. But you know the truth. With your incredible body and a life of nearly constant pleasure, there's noone luckier than you. The End Ending #14: Coppertop Congratulations on completing the game! You have unlocked the "Earrings" accessory! This will be available in the bedroom closet in future playthroughs. Restart Game
passages.content_zh: .hunterMark {顯示：無;} #versionwarning {顯示：無；} ....幾個月後... 當你在另一次高潮中顫抖時，你興奮地尖叫起來。你的伴侶，無論他叫什麼名字，當他用自己的高潮猛擊你時，同樣會發出愉悅的咕嚕聲。 那一定是你一天中第十四或第十五次的高潮——儘管很難記住。並不是說你關心數量，而是他們不斷出現。 當你的伴侶離開時，你搖搖晃晃地站起來感謝他。你們倆都承諾很快會再次見面。 “嗯，看起來很有趣！” 你被這個聲音嚇了一跳，但當你認出它時，你立即轉過身來。 “卡西！” 你看到她站在衣櫥附近，那裡剛才是空的。她一定是傳送進來了，或者變成了隱形，或者發生了其他一些奇怪的事情。 「嗨，瑞德，我…哦」當你跑過去給她一個大大的擁抱時，她打斷了你。 “抱歉！很高興見到你！你至少已經兩週沒有來看我了！” 「類似這樣的事情，我一直很忙。實際上我已經被任命為我的巫師團的首腦——這在很大程度上要感謝你給我的所有魔法！而且很高興見到你。” 她上下打量著你，“尤其是你”，注意到你的裸體。 你咯咯地笑，並沒有真正感到煩惱——這些天你大部分時間都赤身裸體——但無論如何還是要尋找你的長袍。 阻止你，“哦，別擔心，我總是很高興欣賞我的藝術作品……事實上……” 她的聲音減弱了一會兒，瞇著眼睛看著你，然後靠近並跪在你的胸前。 「你……成長了嗎？」她伸出手，舉起你巨大的乳房之一。這需要她的雙手，即便如此，她的手指也消失在你胸部柔軟蒼白的曲線下。 「我以為我讓你和我一樣強大，但我想你可能已經超越我了！」 她以流暢、熟練的動作拉下上衣，讓自己如山般的乳房自由彈動。 她站在你的對立面。這並不算太戲劇化，但你對她來說絕對有明顯的體型優勢。 「一定是咒語殘留的魔力……或者是魔法考慮到了你自己的慾望……甚至可能……」 她被敲門聲打斷了。 你臉紅了，“那可能是我的客戶之一。” “等等，剛才不是有人走了嗎？” 你因為尷尬而臉紅了一點（但只是一點點）。 她翻了個白眼，“我創造了一個怪物！好吧，讓他進來，讓他等待沒有意義。” 當你讓他進來時，他的下巴差點撞到地板，因為他看到兩個幾乎赤身裸體、豐滿得令人難以置信的紅發女郎在等著他。 他可能認為自己是世界上最幸運的人。但你知道真相。擁有令人難以置信的身體和幾乎持續快樂的生活，沒有人比你更幸運。 結局 結局#14：銅頂 恭喜您完成遊戲！您已解鎖「耳環」配件！在以後的遊戲中，這將在臥室壁櫥中提供。 重新開始遊戲

passages.name: DinnerDoll
passages.content: You dutifully lay out the bowls of hot stew as she goes into her tale. "I was a much younger wytch then, and a lot more naive. I'd moved into a small village in some far-off province. Of course, my matron - the wytch who taught me - warned me against getting too close to villagers, but I was so confident and headstrong. I've always been good with people so I was sure I'd be the exception to how most wytches live. I thought that I could live right there, in the middle of town. That I'd be able to change their minds or win their hearts, or maybe even just blend in. As I said, young and naive. I even tried to open a little potion and medicine shop." she chuckles a little at herself, but you can see a hint of sadness in her eyes. "Anyway, one day a man rushes into my shop, begging my help. His daughter is deathly sick with fever, and he and his wife were in an absolute panic." 's eyes have dropped down, almost as if she's retelling the story to the doll instead of you. "I follow him to their home, and find their daughter is in bad shape, on death's door. I want to help, but I'd been making potions all day and didn't have enough magic left to cast any spells." "What did you do?" you ask, rapt in her story. "I did what I had to. I sucked off the father right there." You almost choke on your stew. "You what?!" Her eyes momentarily flash with anger, "it's not what I wanted to do, but I needed magic to help! Nothing more to it than that." She calms herself down with a deep breath, "Sorry, I shouldn't have snapped at you. Sex is how we wytches refill our magic. I was only trying to save the girl. "And it worked. I got my magic and saved Clara - that was her name. I got to walk around town with my head high, feeling great about myself." She pauses, looking sad again, "It lasted about three days. The man's wife found out and accused me of enchanting and bewitching her husband. He went along with her story, and before you knew it the town was blaming me for everything, including making Clara sick in the first place. "That very night, there's another unexpected knock on my door, this time it's Clara herself. She thanks me for everything and warns me that the villagers have made a mob and are coming to burn my shop - and maybe me too. So I decided to run. She gave me her doll - because it had always kept her safe and made her feel better. I owe little Clara my life for warning me that day." "I'm sorry, I thought it might be a childhood toy or something. I didn't realize it was so important to you." She sniffs and wipes at her eyes. "No…it's fine…it's actually a happy memory. It reminds me that there are some good people out there." She stands up from the table, pushing away her barely-touched stew. "That story just about did me in, I think I'll turn in a little early tonight." Before heading upstairs, she smiles down at the doll again, then looks back at you, "You know what, she's protected me for long enough, I think it's time I passed her on. You keep her, giving her a good squeeze always makes me feel better." She tosses the doll in your direction and disappears up the stairs. You look at the doll for a little while before cleaning up the dishes and heading up yourself. Head upstairs to bed
passages.content_zh: 當她講述她的故事時，你盡責地擺好幾碗熱燉菜。 「那時我是一個年輕得多的巫師，而且更加天真。我搬到了某個遙遠省份的一個小村莊。當然，我的女巫——教我的巫師——警告我不要與村民走得太近，但我是如此自信和任性。我一直與人相處很好，所以我確信我會成為大多數巫師生活方式的例外。 「總而言之，有一天，一個男人衝進我的店裡，請求我的幫助。他的女兒發燒了，病得很重，他和他的妻子陷入了絕對的恐慌。」她的眼睛垂了下來，就好像她正在向洋娃娃而不是你複述這個故事。 「我跟著他到了他們家，發現他們的女兒情況很糟糕，瀕臨死亡。我想幫忙，但我整天都在製作魔藥，沒有足夠的魔力來施展任何咒語。” 「你做了什麼？」你問，全神貫注於她的故事。 “我做了我必須做的事。我就在那裡給父親口交。” 你差點被燉菜噎住了。 “你什麼？！” 她眼中閃過一抹怒火，“這不是我想做的，但我需要魔法來幫忙！僅此而已。” 她深深吸了一口氣，讓自己冷靜下來，「抱歉，我不應該對你發脾氣。性是我們巫婆補充魔法的方式。我只是想拯救那個女孩。 「而且它奏效了。我用我的魔法拯救了克拉拉——那是她的名字。我昂首挺胸地在城裡散步，自我感覺良好。 」 她停頓了一下，再次顯得悲傷，「持續了大約三天。那人的妻子發現了，指責我對她的丈夫施妖媚、迷惑。他同意了她的說法，不知不覺間，鎮上的人就把一切都歸咎於我，包括一開始就讓克拉拉生病了。 「那天晚上，又有一次意想不到的敲門聲，這次是克拉拉本人。她感謝我所做的一切，並警告我，村民們已經聚集在一起，要燒毀我的商店——也許我也一樣。所以我決定逃跑。她給了我她的洋娃娃——因為它一直保證了她的安全，讓她感覺好一些。我欠小克拉拉一條命，因為她那天警告了我。」 “抱歉，我以為這可能是小時候的玩具什麼的，沒想到它對你來說這麼重要。” 她吸了吸鼻子，擦了擦眼睛。 “不……沒關係……這其實是一段快樂的回憶。它讓我想起外面還有一些好人。” 她從桌子上站起來，推開她幾乎沒有碰過的燉菜。 「那個故事讓我很著迷，我想今晚我會早點睡覺。” 在上樓之前，她再次對娃娃微笑，然後回頭看著你，“你知道嗎，她保護了我足夠長的時間了，我想是時候放棄她了。你留著她，好好捏捏她總是讓我感覺好點。” 她把娃娃丟向你的方向，然後消失在樓梯上。你看了一會兒娃娃，然後清理碗碟，然後自己走上前去。 上樓睡覺

passages.name: DinnerDoll-Decision
passages.content:
So…now you've got a doll.

It's not an especially cute or feminine doll…but nonetheless, it feels kind of cute and feminine to just have it.

isn't trying to trick you into being more girly, is she?

Probably not, she's not that kind of tricky. And her story sounded touchingly sincere and sweet.

But if that's true, it means she's trying to support you emotionally…while changing you physically…

…which completely messes with your head.

You rub your eyes and sigh. It's too late to think about something so confusing.

The only pressing question is whether you plan to take her up on the offer and use the doll occasionally.

It can't hurt to give it a try at least.

Probably not. Only if I really need to.

No matter what I look like, I'm not a girl and I don't need a girl's toy.
passages.content_zh:
所以……現在你有了一個洋娃娃。

這不是一個特別可愛或女性化的娃娃……但儘管如此，擁有它還是感覺有點可愛和女性化。

她不會是想讓你變得更少女吧？

或許不是，她沒那麼狡猾。她的故事聽起來真誠又甜蜜。

但如果這是真的，那就意味著她試圖在情感上支持你…同時改變你的身體…

……這完全搞亂了你的頭腦。

你揉揉眼睛，嘆了口氣。現在考慮如此令人困惑的事情已經太晚了。

唯一緊迫的問題是你是否打算接受她的提議並偶爾使用這個娃娃。

至少嘗試一下也沒什麼壞處。

可能不會。僅當我確實需要時。

不管我長什麼樣，我都不是女孩，我不需要女孩的玩具。

passages.name: DinnerLocketIntro
passages.content: She sits down and smiles at the locket again, "It's amazing you found this, I hadn't thought about it in awhile. This was Sophie, my matriarch," she continues, opening the locket to show you the picture, "that's what we wytches call those who give us our magic. Though she was also my mentor, my friend, and much more." You study the tiny image, it's an intricately rendered painting of a regal-looking woman with piercing green eyes and bright, strawberry-red hair. Moreover, you recognize the painting style as 's from her sketchbook - she painted this. "She must have meant a lot to you." "Yes…she literally saved my life when she woke me up to magic." "Saved you? Were you a slave or a criminal or something?" "Oh no," she exclaims with a chuckle, "nothing so dramatic or cliche as that. My family was actually quite well off. Not nobility, but my father was a very wealthy merchant. I was his only daughter. I was pampered, tutored, and doted on hand and foot." You snerk at that with an eye roll, "Oh how horrible. Thank goodness you were rescued." She shoots you a glare and frown. "Yes, I am thankful. You have no idea the life of a wealthy woman. We are raised without a care in the world, without any worry or responsibility - the most comfortable hell you can imagine. How would you feel if you had no say in where you lived, what you eat, how you speak and dress, who you fuck, who you marry? Women in that world are not people, we're trophies. Would you want such a life?" You're taken aback, both by her old life and the passion she speaks about it. Moreover, you agree completely. You wouldn't want to be chained to a husband - even if the chain was made of gold. "You're right, I couldn't stand that life. I wasn't rich or pampered, grew up as a farmhand, but I couldn't let my whole world be a single farm. I first started hunting just to get away from the fields." "I thought so, from the first conversation we had, I thought you were like me. There's so much in the world to see, to taste, to feel! I hope you remember that out in the world." " You raise an eyebrow, "I'd try, but first I'd have to actually be...you know, free." "Yes yes, touche. This isn't a life sentence, you're only here as long as you need to be...or choose to be. Just as it was for me." Your eyebrow jumps up a little further in curiosity, "What does that mean?" Her usual smirk comes back, "It's getting late, let's leave it there for now. Tell you what, you keep the locket for now, as a reminder that this can all be a positive experience. Trust me on that." With that, she stretches and heads upstairs for the night. Leaving you with a mystery and a pile of dishes. Finish the dishes and head upstairs to bed
passages.content_zh: 她坐下來，再次對著墜飾盒微笑，“你發現這個真是太神奇了，我有一段時間沒有想到它了。這是索菲，我的女族長，”她繼續說道，打開掛墜盒給你看照片，“這就是我們巫師所說的那些給予我們魔法的人。儘管她也是我的導師，我的朋友，等等。” 你仔細研究這幅微小的圖像，它是一幅複雜渲染的畫作，畫中是一位看起來富麗堂皇的女人，她有著銳利的綠色眼睛和明亮的草莓紅頭髮。而且，你從她的素描本上認出了繪畫風格——她畫了這個。 “她對你一定意義重大。” 「是的……當她用魔法喚醒我時，她確實救了我的命。” 「救了你？你是奴隸還是罪犯還是什麼？」 「哦，不，」她咯咯地笑道，「沒有什麼比這更戲劇化或陳詞濫調了。我的家庭其實很富裕。不是貴族，但我的父親是一位非常富有的商人。我是他唯一的女兒。我被寵壞了，被教導著，手腳都被寵壞了。」 你對此嗤之以鼻，翻了個白眼，“哦，太可怕了。謝天謝地，你被救了。” 她瞪了你一眼，皺起眉頭。 「是的，我很感激。你不知道有錢女人的生活。我們在這個世界上無憂無慮地長大，沒有任何憂慮或責任——這是你能想像到的最舒適的地獄。如果你對你住在哪裡、吃什麼、說話和穿衣、和誰誰沒有發言權，你會感覺如何？那個世界的女人 你對她過去的生活和她談論它的熱情感到驚訝。而且，你完全同意。你不會想被鎖在丈夫身上——即使鎖鍊是金子做的。 「你說得對，我無法忍受那樣的生活。我不富有，也不養尊處優，作為一個農場工人長大，但我不能讓我的整個世界變成一個農場。我開始打獵只是為了遠離田野。” 「我是這麼認為的，從我們第一次談話開始，我就覺得你和我一樣。世界上有那麼多東西值得看、去品嚐、去感受！我希望你能記住這一點。” 」 你揚起眉毛，「我會嘗試，但首先我必須真正…你知道，自由。 」 「是的，是的，觸摸。這不是無期徒刑，只要你需要…或選擇在這裡，你就在這裡。就像對我來說一樣。 」 眉頭一挑，好奇地說：「這是什麼意思？ 」 她又恢復了往常的笑容：「時間不早了，我們就先到此為止。 「告訴你吧，你暫時保留這個墜飾盒，以提醒你這一切都可以是一次積極的經歷。相信我。」 說完，她伸了個懶腰，上樓睡覺。給你留下一個謎團和一堆菜餚。 洗完碗就上樓睡覺

passages.name: GiveLocket
passages.content: You can't help but smile and bounce on your heels as you speak with . She cocks an eyebrow at your ear-to-ear grin, "What's got you so excited? Did you get into my potions again or something?" "Nope, I've got something for you." "For me? What do you mean." You thrust your hands forward, showing her the locket. She doesn't understand at first, "My locket, I already know about that. Thank you again for finding it." You roll your eyes at her being obtuse for once, "No...open it." Looking confused, she takes the locket from your hands and cracks it open. "Oh Red..." she stares at it with a shocked look on her face. At first, you're worried you've done something wrong. Is she mad at you cutting up her sketchbook? You try to explain yourself, "I thought you might like it, you know the two redheads in your life..." Without a word, rushes towards you with tears in her eyes, wrapping her arms around you. She's holding you so tight you can hardly breathe, your head swallowed in the deep softness of her bountiful chest. "Oh Red..." she says again through the tears, "this is the sweetest thing anyone's ever done for me!" She pulls you back long enough to let you breathe again only to shower your face with kisses before burying you again in another hug. "So I take it you like it?" She releases her hug but still holds you close, "I don't have words to describe how much I love it. Wherever did you get the idea?" "I found your sketchbook, and figured, if you have this keepsake of your matriarch, you might want one of your...well, of me." "I do. I didn't think I would ever be as close to anyone as my matriarch until I found you. You've changed me Red, maybe more than I've changed you and...I.." she leans you back again, staring deep into your eyes, "Red, I…you’ve come to mean so much to me. I can’t imagine this cabin - or my life - without you," she pauses as if summoning up the courage. "There's something I've been thinking about for some time now. Would you like to stay with me? No deal, no compulsion, just you and me, together?" Of course!
passages.content_zh: 與 交談時，您會情不自禁地微笑並踮起腳跟。 她對你咧嘴一笑，揚起了眉毛，“你怎麼這麼興奮？你是不是又喝了我的魔藥還是什麼？” “不用了，我有東西給你。” “為了我？什麼意思。” 你向前伸出雙手，給她看了墜飾盒。 她一開始不明白，“我的墜飾盒，我已經知道了。再次感謝你找到它。” 你對她的遲鈍翻了個白眼，“不……打開它。” 她一臉困惑，從你手中接過墜子盒，將它打開。 「哦，紅……」她盯著它，臉上露出震驚的表情。起初，你擔心自己做錯了什麼。她對你剪掉她的素描本很生氣嗎？ 你試圖解釋自己，“我想你可能會喜歡它，你認識你生活中的兩個紅發女郎……” 一言不發，她眼含淚水沖向你，用雙臂擁抱你。 她把你抱得那麼緊，你幾乎無法呼吸，你的頭被她寬闊的胸膛深深地柔軟吞沒。 “哦，瑞德……”她淚流滿面地再次說道，“這是任何人為我做過的最甜蜜的事情！” 她把你拉回來足夠長的時間，讓你再次呼吸，只是在你再次擁抱之前親吻你的臉。 “那我想你喜歡吧？” 她鬆開了擁抱，但仍然緊緊地抱住你，“我無法用言語來形容我有多喜歡它。你從哪裡得到這個主意的？” “我找到了你的素描本，然後想，如果你有你女族長的這個紀念品，你可能會想要一個你的……好吧，我的。” 「是的。在找到你之前，我以為我不會像我的女族長那樣與任何人如此親密。你改變了我，紅，也許比我對你的改變還要多，而且……我……」她再次將你靠在椅背上，深深地凝視著你的眼睛， 「瑞德，我……你對我來說意義重大。我無法想像沒有你的這個小屋——或者我的生活，」她停了下來，彷彿鼓起勇氣。 「有件事我已經想了一段時間了。你願意和我在一起嗎？沒有交易，沒有強迫，只有你和我，在一起嗎？” 當然！

passages.name: LocketEnd
passages.content: .hunterMark {display:none;} #versionwarning {display:none;} "Yes! I feel the same way, I want to be with you too!" squeals in delight and lifts you off the ground in another suffocatingly tight hug. She half leads, half carries you up to the bedroom. The two of you spend the rest of the night (and most of the next day) there. Alternating between bouts of passion and cuddling in each other’s arms. Strangely, despite all your adventures as a hunter and your strange transformative experience at the cabin, looking back, this moment is when your story truly began. With newfound confidence and freedom, you and Cassandra left the little cabin behind and set out to see the world. You traveled continents, saw empires, met countless people, tasted incredible cuisines, and left a trail of satisfied and exhausted men in your wake. You two become the kind of couple that fables are written about. In fact, many were - folktales sprang up worldwide of a pair of mysterious, beautiful, red-haired women who would appear and disappear after a night of unimaginable pleasures. Some of the tales say there are still out there to this day, exploring all the sights, sounds, and pleasures the world has to offer. The End Ending #19: Happily Ever After Huge congratulations! This ending is the most rare and difficult in the game! Well done! You have unlocked the "Locket" accessory! This will be available in the bedroom closet in future playthroughs. Restart Game
passages.content_zh: .hunterMark {顯示：無;} #versionwarning {顯示：無；} 「是啊！我也這麼想，我也想和你在一起！」 高興地尖叫，並用另一個令人窒息的緊緊擁抱將你從地上抱起來。她半牽著你，半抱你到臥室。 你們兩個在那裡度過了餘下的夜晚（以及第二天的大部分時間）。在激情和擁抱之間交替。 奇怪的是，儘管你作為一名獵人經歷了所有的冒險，並且在小屋裡經歷了奇怪的變革經歷，但回想起來，這一刻才是你的故事真正開始的時刻。 帶著新的自信和自由，你和卡桑德拉離開了小木屋，出發去看世界。你走遍了各大洲，見過了帝國，結識了無數的人，品嚐了令人難以置信的美食，並在你身後留下了一群心滿意足又疲憊不堪的男人。 你們兩個成為了寓言中描述的那種情侶。事實上，世界各地流傳著許多關於一對神秘、美麗的紅髮女子的民間故事，她們在經歷了難以想像的快樂之夜後出現又消失。 一些傳說稱，直到今天，它們仍然在那裡，探索世界上所有的景色、聲音和樂趣。 結局 結局#19：從此幸福快樂 熱烈祝賀！這個結局是遊戲中最罕見、最困難的！幹得好！ 您已解鎖「墜子盒」配件！在以後的遊戲中，這將在臥室壁櫥中提供。 重新開始遊戲

你彎下身子，再次開始撫摸那根粗大的雞巴。即使在運動後，它仍然會因您的觸摸而抽搐。

“哦，我不知道，我想我可能還需要一點……”

她的眼睛睜大了，她又笑了。她的陰莖抽搐並開始重新膨脹。

你們兩個真的整晚都在做愛。每個位置，每個方法，玩具和自然。

直到接近日出​​時，你終於讓她恢復正常——在犯了一些錯誤之後，包括陰莖脫落從床上掉到地板上。

第二天，建議你們兩個都躺在床上。你們沒有爭吵，幾乎一整天都在彼此懷裡躺著睡覺。

有一次，你醒來發現自己被……摟住了。你完全被她的身體包圍了。她的絲腿搭在你的腿上，她的手臂緊緊地摟著你，甚至她的一個巨大的乳房也垂在你的腰上。你會感到溫暖、安全、被包圍…和被愛。您從未感覺與另一個人如此自在或如此親密。

身後傳來她睡眼惺忪的聲音：“紅，你醒了嗎？”

“是的。”

“我想問你一件事。”

“是的？”

“我知道這可能看起來很奇怪或突然……但你對我來說意義重大。如果你願意……我希望你能和我在一起。”

“我陪你一整天了，哪兒也不去。”

你感覺到屁股上被輕輕一拍，“我不是這個意思，你也知道。我的意思是，我希望你永遠和我在一起。沒有魔法強迫，沒有交易，只有你和我。在一起。”

passages.name: CatSuccess
passages.content: "It worked?" You can hardly believe your eyes. Sitting on the ground in front of you is a small, burgundy, and very confused-looking cat! "It worked," you sigh in relief and collapse onto your knees on the floor. You're exhausted and drained. Not only from the spell, but emotionally as well. Your feelings about were…complicated to say the least, as was the decision to turn on her. But now that it's done, you feel a huge weight lifting off your shoulders. Almost literally, as her enchantments keeping you in the cabin evaporate off you. You feel lighter, relieved, and free again. Your internal monologue is interrupted by a brushing sensation on your leg. You'd almost forgotten about Cassandra the cat, but she's now gently rubbing your shin. "Hey there, do you remember me? Do you know who I am?" You reach down to stroke her red fur. She jumps up into your lap and nuzzles you softly. "What do I do with you now?" you wonder. "Actually, what do I do with myself now?" You’ll have to start your life over with nothing except a cat… Well, techincally - you realize looking around - you also have a cabin now... And a full wardrobe of fancy clothes and magical trinkets… And the ability to use magic - the ability to do nearly anything you want… A smile slowly spreads across your face. Later...
passages.content_zh: “有效嗎？” 你簡直不敢相信自己的眼睛。你面前的地上坐著一隻小貓，酒紅色，看起來很困惑！ 「成功了。」你鬆了口氣，跪倒在地板上。 你已經筋疲力盡了。不僅來自咒語，也來自情感。你的感受……至少可以說很複雜，就像背叛她的決定一樣。但現在一切都完成了，你會感覺到肩上的重擔卸下了。幾乎是字面上的意思，當她把你留在小屋裡的魔力從你身上消失時。你會感到輕鬆、輕鬆、自由。 你的內心獨白被腿上的摩擦感打斷了。 你幾乎忘記了卡桑德拉貓，但她現在正在輕輕地摩擦你的小腿。 「嘿，你還記得我嗎？你知道我是誰嗎？」你伸手撫摸她紅色的皮毛。 她跳到你的腿上，輕輕地用鼻子蹭你。 「現在我該拿你怎麼辦？」你想知道。 “其實，我現在該怎麼辦？” 你將不得不重新開始你的生活，除了一隻貓之外什麼都沒有... 好吧，從技術上講 - 你環顧四周發現 - 你現在也有一間小屋了... 還有一整套漂亮的衣服和神奇的小飾品… 還有使用魔法的能力──幾乎可以做任何你想做的事… 微笑慢慢地在你的臉上蔓延。 之後...

passages.name: CatFail
passages.content: Your spell failed…well, not exactly failed, but it didn’t quite work either. still stands in front of you, though quite different from a moment ago. She now has tiny feline whiskers, an adorable pair of cat ears, and a long tail twitching angrily behind her. "Don’t move a muscle!” she commands angrily, reasserting her magic’s control over you. You freeze instantly, unable to move or speak. ”What in the seven kingdoms did you do to me?” she looks over her changed body, feeling the tail and ears. ”Is this some kind of new kink? Answer me truthfully.” You find yourself able to speak again, the words coming out without much chance to edit them, ”I was trying to turn you into a cat, so I could escape.” ”Oh Red, really?” She actually looks a little hurt. ”After all we’ve done together, all I’ve taught you. I spared you from a fate as an animal, but you’d do that to me? I thought I knew you better…I thought I meant at least a little more to you,” as she speaks, you can see the hurt building in her eyes. Your emotions are likewise a maelstrom at the moment. You feel angry that your spell didn’t work, scared of her reprisal, and even guilt at betraying her trust and hurting her. She’s pacing back and forth now, her emotions easily as conflicted as yours. It shows on her face, as well as her surprisingly expressive ears and tail. When she finally speaks, you hear her voice wavering on the verge of tears, ”Gods Red, I thought for once, I might actually have found somebody who wouldn’t betray me. Somebody who I could share myself with. You’re worse than all the torch waving villagers put together!” You wish you could apologize - or do anything really, besides standing here looking stupid. continues pacing for ages, considering her options, sniffing back tears the entire time, ”What am I going to do now? Obviously, you can’t be trusted - so I can’t just let you leave. Especially not with magic, you’d be a danger to everyone. I suppose I could turn you into a cat, but I never wanted to do that. Besides…” She walks forward and places a hand softly on your cheek. Her eyes finally giving over to tears, ”Besides, you might not care about me, but I care about you. I’ve gotten used to you being here, Red…I actually like you. What am I going to do?” She thinks about it for a long time, sniffing through the tears. At one point, one of her pointy ears twitches. As she reaches up to scratch it, her eyes brighten somewhat. ”You know, you might have accidentally come up with the perfect solution...” Wind rushes around you as she begins casting her spell. Your vision blurs slightly as the magic takes its effect. Later...
passages.content_zh:
你的咒語失敗了……好吧，不完全失敗，但也不太有效。  依然站在你的面前，雖然和剛才已經不一樣了。她現在長著小小的貓鬚、一對可愛的貓耳朵，還有一條長尾巴在她身後憤怒地抽動。

「一動也不動！」她憤怒地命令道，重申她的魔法對你的控制。你立刻僵住了，無法動彈或說話。

「你在七國裡對我做了什麼？」她審視著自己變化的身體，摸著尾巴和耳朵。

“這是某種新的怪癖嗎？如實回答我。”

你發現自己又可以說話了，但沒有太多機會編輯它們，“我想把你變成一隻貓，這樣我就可以逃脫。”

「哦，紅，真的嗎？」她看起來確實有點受傷。

「畢竟我們一起做了所有的事，我教給你的一切。我讓你免於成為動物的命運，但你卻要這樣對我？我以為我更了解你……我以為我對你至少意味著更多一點，」當她說話時，你可以看到她眼中受傷的感覺。

此刻你的情緒同樣陷入漩渦。你因為自己的咒語不起作用而感到憤怒，害怕她的報復，甚至因為背叛了她的信任並傷害了她而感到內疚。

她現在來回踱步，她的情緒和你的一樣容易矛盾。它表現在她的臉上，以及她令人驚訝的富有表現力的耳朵和尾巴上。當她終於開口說話時，你聽到她的聲音顫抖著，快要落淚了：“紅神，我一度想，我可能真的找到了一個不會背叛我的人。一個我可以與之分享自己的人。你比所有揮舞著火把的村民加起來還要糟糕！”

你希望你能道歉——或者做任何真正的事情，除了站在這裡看起來很愚蠢。

她繼續踱著好長一段時間，考慮著自己的選擇，一直吸著眼淚，“我現在該怎麼辦？顯然，你不值得信任——所以我不能讓你離開。尤其是沒有魔法，你會對每個人構成危險。我想我可以把你變成一隻貓，但我從來不想那樣做。此外……”

她向前走去，將一隻手輕輕放在你的臉頰上。她的眼睛終於流下了淚水，“而且，你可能不在乎我，但我在乎你。我已經習慣你在這裡了，紅……我其實喜歡你。我該怎麼辦？”

她想了很久，淚流滿面。有一次，她的一隻尖耳朵抽動了一下。當她伸手去抓的時候，她的眼睛變得有些明亮。

“你知道，你可能一不小心就想出了完美的解決方案……”

當她開始施展咒語時，風在你身邊呼嘯而過。當魔法生效時，你的視線會稍微模糊。

之後...

passages.name: EvilWytch
passages.content: .hunterMark {display:none;} #versionwarning {display:none;} Of course, you had to play things a little more carefully, at least at first. You stayed out of sight and out of town for a few months. Traveling to distant towns to recharge your magic, and rarely visiting the same place twice. That doesn't stop rumors from spreading about you. A mysterious, red-haired beauty who suddenly appears and seduces the townsfolk. It's funny how things have almost come full circle. When you used to arrive in town as the Blackwolf, people would stare at you, lock their doors, and whisper rumors of hunters and monsters. Now when you saunter through a village, it's nearly the same. People still stare - though it's more of a leer now, women clutch their men, and you overhear tales and warnings of wytches and seductresses mixed with whistles and innuendo. You enjoy it just as much now as you did then. While a wytch's life doesn't have the perilous moments of life and death that hunting did, you're absolutely loving it. Traveling wherever looks ripe for enjoyment, doing whatever strikes your fancy, taking anything you like, and fucking your way through droves of men for power and pleasure. Truth be told, while you were a good hunter…you make an excellent Scarlet Wytch. The End Ending #17: New Scarlet Wytch Congratulations on completing the game! You have unlocked the "Scarlet Wytch" outfit! This will be available in the bedroom closet in future playthroughs. Restart Game
passages.content_zh: .hunterMark {顯示：無;} #versionwarning {顯示：無；} 當然，你必須更加小心地玩遊戲，至少在一開始是這樣。 你在人們的視線之外、遠離城鎮的地方待了幾個月。前往遙遠的城鎮恢復魔力，很少會兩次造訪同一個地方。 這並不能阻止關於你的謠言的傳播。突然出現的神秘紅髮美女，誘惑了鎮上的人們。 有趣的是，事情幾乎又回到了原點。 當你以黑狼的身份來到城鎮時，人們會盯著你看，鎖上門，低聲議論獵人和怪物的謠言。 現在，當你漫步穿過一個村莊時，情況幾乎是一樣的。人們仍然盯著看——儘管現在更多的斜視，女人緊緊抓住她們的男人，你會無意中聽到女巫和誘惑者的故事和警告，夾雜著口哨和影射。 你現在和以前一樣享受它。 雖然女巫的生活不像狩獵那樣充滿生死存亡的危險時刻，但你絕對會喜歡它。去任何看起來適合享受的地方旅行，做任何你想做的事，拿走你喜歡的任何東西，並在成群結隊的男人中做愛以獲取權力和快樂。 說實話，雖然你是個優秀的獵人……但你卻是個出色的緋紅女巫。 結局 結局#17：新緋紅女巫 恭喜您完成遊戲！您已解鎖「緋紅女巫」服裝！在以後的遊戲中，這將在臥室壁櫥中提供。 重新開始遊戲

passages.name: CatgirlEnd
passages.content: .hunterMark {display:none;} #versionwarning {display:none;} You open your eyes blinking, and give a looong stretch. Did you fall asleep? You feel good, so you must have slept. You look up at Mistress, sitting on the bench by the fire. She seems tired, and her eyes are all red. Was she crying? You cock your head in curiosity, feeling one of your tall, pointy ears twitch. ”Mistress, are you alright?” ”I…I think so, Red. I hope so. How are you?” You pad your way over to the bench and lay down on it, placing your head in her lap. From here you can feel the warmth of her body, though you have a little trouble seeing her face over those huge boobs of hers. ”Good!” you stretch again and sigh adorably, ”I just had a nap, so I feel great. Good enough to…um…maybe have another nap.” She laughs heartily at that, your joke seemed to make her feel much better. Not that it was actually a joke… From your position on her lap, you’re mesmerized by her breasts, the way they’re bouncing with her laughter right in front of your face. You can’t help but reach up and bat at one, watching it bounce back and forth even more. ”Red! Stop it!” she says still giggling. You’re only encouraged, and flip over “play” with them some more, burying your entire face into the warm softness. ”No matter what I do, some things never change with you.” Your face pops out from deep inside her cleavage, unsure what she means by that. ”Oh gods, you’re too adorable!” she hugs you, squeezing your face back into her chest - not that you mind. ”Come on, it’s late, let's go upstairs. I'll give you a better look.” Your tail whips back and forth excitedly, giving her all the answer she needs. The End Ending #15: Cat-girl Congratulations on completing the game! You have unlocked the "Cat-girl" accessory! This will be available in the bedroom closet in future playthroughs. Restart Game
passages.content_zh: .hunterMark {顯示：無;} #versionwarning {顯示：無；} 你眨著眼睛睜開眼睛，伸了個懶腰。你睡著了嗎？ 你感覺很好，所以你一定已經睡著了。你抬頭看著坐在火邊長凳上的女主人。她看起來很累，眼睛都紅了。她哭了嗎？ 你好奇地歪着头，感觉你的一只又高又尖的耳朵在抽搐。 “小姐，您沒事吧？” “我……我想是的，瑞德。我希望如此。你好嗎？” 你蹑手蹑脚地走到长凳上，躺在上面，把头靠在她的腿上。从这里你可以感受到她身体的温暖，尽管你很难在她巨大的胸部上看到她的脸。 「好的！」你再次伸了個懶腰，可愛地嘆了口氣，“我剛剛睡了個午覺，所以我感覺很好。很好……嗯……也許再睡一會兒。” 她聽了哈哈大笑，你的笑話似乎讓她心情好了很多。其實這並不是個玩笑… 從你坐在她腿上的位置，你會被她的乳房迷住，它們隨著她的笑聲在你面前跳躍。你情不自禁地伸手擊球，看著它來回彈跳得更多。 「紅！住手！」她說，仍然咯咯笑。你只会受到鼓励，然后再翻过来和它们“玩”一会儿，把你的整个脸埋进温暖的柔软中。 “无论我做什么，有些事情对你来说永远不会改变。” 你的臉從她的乳溝深處露出來，不確定她這是什麼意思。 「天啊，你也太可愛了吧！」她擁抱你，把你的臉擠回她的胸口——你並不介意。 “走吧，时间不早了，我们上楼吧，我给你仔细看看。” 你的尾巴興奮地來回擺動，給她所需的一切答案。 結局 結局#15：貓女 恭喜您完成遊戲！您已解鎖「貓女」配件！在以後的遊戲中，這將在臥室壁櫥中提供。 重新開始遊戲

passages.name: RealDogEnd
passages.content: .hunterMark {display:none;} #versionwarning {display:none;} She stands up, her voice taking on a cold, commanding tone that seems to echo in the small room, "I’ve tried to reform you, but for all the outward changes, the Blackwolf is still the same angry dog that came here to kill me. Maybe it’s time your appearance better suits your nickname." You can feel the wind of her magic whipping up around you, a cold chill runs down your spine as you realize this is likely it for you. "My what a magnificent creature! A big, shaggy, black hound. But apart from your fearsome look, a sweet and loyal friend." You can already feel the magic working, your body shrinking and restructuring itself, your mind beginning to slip away into something else, something not human… --- Years later, the town of Ridinghood has returned to a peaceful state. Sightings of wytches are rare and mostly dismissed as mistakes or tall tales. The few townsfolk who remember the Blackwolf assume he did his job and ended their troubles. takes care these days to travel further to avoid rumor and trouble. Never wanting what happened with the Blackwolf to happen again. For you, life is wonderful! You spend your days playing with a ball, sleeping, watching squirrels through the window, and waiting eagerly for your master to arrive home. She's a wonderful master, and takes such good care of you. She always greets your licks and wagging tail with joy, even brings home treats sometimes! Sometimes though, you get a sense of sadness when she looks at you. So you give her extra licks to make her feel better! There's not much else you can, afterall, the complexities of human emotion are a little beyond you... ...and besides, it's time for a walk! The End Ending #3: Blackwolf the Black Wolf Congratulations on completing the game! You have unlocked the "Spiked Collar" accessory! This will be available in the bedroom closet in future playthroughs. passages.content_zh: .hunterMark {顯示：無;} #versionwarning {顯示：無；} 她站起來，聲音冰冷、命令般，似乎在小房間裡迴響：“我已經嘗試改造你了，但儘管外表發生了變化，黑狼仍然是那隻來這裡殺我的憤怒的狗。也許你的外表是時候更適合你的綽號了。” 你可以感覺到她的魔法之風在你周圍吹來，當你意識到這很可能適合你時，一股寒意順著你的脊椎流下來。 「我的天啊，多麼偉大的生物啊！一隻毛茸茸的黑色大獵犬。但除了你可怕的外表之外，它還是一個可愛而忠誠的朋友。” 你已經可以感覺到魔法在起作用，你的身體在收縮並自我重組，你的思想開始滑向其他東西，某種非人類的東西...... --- 多年後，裡丁胡德鎮又恢復了平靜。 女巫的目擊事件非常罕見，大多被視為錯誤或荒誕故事而被忽視。少數還記得黑狼的鎮民認為他完成了自己的工作並結束了他們的麻煩。 這些天要小心去更遠的地方旅行，以避免謠言和麻煩。不想再發生黑狼的事了。 對你來說，生活是美好的！你整天玩球、睡覺、透過窗戶觀察松鼠，並熱切地等待主人回家。 她是一位很棒的主人，把你照顧得很好。她總是高興地迎接你的舔舐和搖尾巴，有時甚至會帶一些零食回家！ 但有時，當她看著你時，你會感到悲傷。所以你要多舔她一下，讓她感覺好一點！你也無能為力，畢竟，人類情感的複雜性有點超出你的能力… ……而且，現在是散步的時間了！ 結局 結局#3：黑狼黑狼 恭喜您完成遊戲！您已解鎖「尖刺項圈」配件！在以後的遊戲中，這將在臥室壁櫥中提供。 重新開始遊戲 $(document).on(':passagedisplay', function (ev) { $('.frame #layer1, .frame #layer2, .frame #layer4, .frame #layer5, .frame #layer7, .frame #layer8, .frame #accChoker, .frame #accFlower, .frame #accHood, .frame #heartMeter'); });

passages.content: Hunter

passages.name: DinnerSketchbookExplain-DELETE?
passages.content: She sits down and smiles at the locket again, "It's amazing you found this, I hadn't thought about it in awhile. This was Sophie, my matriarch," she continues, opening the locket to show you the picture, "that's what we wytches call those who give us our magic. Though she was also my mentor, my friend, and much more." You study the tiny image, it's an intricately rendered painting of a regal-looking woman with piercing green eyes and bright, strawberry-red hair. Moreover, you recognize the painting style as 's from her sketchbook - she painted this. "She must have meant a lot to you." "Yes…she literally saved my life when she woke me up to magic." "Saved you? Were you a slave or a criminal or something?" "Oh no," she exclaims with a chuckle, "nothing so dramatic or cliche as that. My family was actually quite well off. Not nobility, but my father was a very wealthy merchant. I was his only daughter. I was pampered, tutored, and doted on hand and foot." You snerk at that with an eye roll, "Oh how horrible. Thank goodness you were rescued." She shoots you a glare and frown. "Yes, I am thankful. You have no idea the life of a wealthy woman. We are raised without a care in the world, without any worry or responsibility - the most comfortable hell you can imagine. How would you feel if you had no say in where you lived, what you eat, how you speak and dress, who you fuck, who you marry? Women in that world are not people, we're trophies. Would you want such a life?" You're taken aback, both by her old life and the passion she speaks about it. Moreover, you agree completely. You wouldn't want to be chained to a husband - even if the chain was made of gold. "You're right, I couldn't stand that life. I wasn't rich or pampered, grew up as a farmhand, but I couldn't let my whole world be a single farm. I first started hunting just to get away from the fields." "I thought so, from the first conversation we had, I thought you were like me. There's so much in the world to see, to taste, to feel! I hope you remember that out in the world." " You raise an eyebrow, "I'd try, but first I'd have to actually be...you know, free." "Yes yes, touche. This isn't a life sentence, you're only here as long as you need to be...or choose to be. Just as it was for me." Your eyebrow jumps up a little further in curiosity, "What does that mean?" Her usual smirk comes back, "It's getting late, let's leave it there for now. Tell you what, you keep the locket for now, as a reminder that this can all be a positive experience. Trust me on that." With that, she stretches and heads upstairs for the night. Leaving you with a mystery and a pile of dishes. Finish the dishes and head upstairs to bed
passages.content_zh: 她坐下來，再次對著墜飾盒微笑，“你發現這個真是太神奇了，我有一段時間沒有想到它了。這是索菲，我的女族長，”她繼續說道，打開掛墜盒給你看照片，“這就是我們巫師所說的那些給予我們魔法的人。儘管她也是我的導師，我的朋友，等等。” 你仔細研究這幅微小的圖像，它是一幅複雜渲染的畫作，畫中是一位看起來富麗堂皇的女人，她有著銳利的綠色眼睛和明亮的草莓紅頭髮。而且，你從她的素描本上認出了繪畫風格——她畫了這個。 “她對你一定意義重大。” 「是的……當她用魔法喚醒我時，她確實救了我的命。” 「救了你？你是奴隸還是罪犯還是什麼？」 「哦，不，」她咯咯地笑道，「沒有什麼比這更戲劇化或陳詞濫調了。我的家庭其實很富裕。不是貴族，但我的父親是一位非常富有的商人。我是他唯一的女兒。我被寵壞了，被教導著，手腳都被寵壞了。」 你對此嗤之以鼻，翻了個白眼，“哦，太可怕了。謝天謝地，你被救了。” 她瞪了你一眼，皺起眉頭。 「是的，我很感激。你不知道有錢女人的生活。我們在這個世界上無憂無慮地長大，沒有任何憂慮或責任——這是你能想像到的最舒適的地獄。如果你對你住在哪裡、吃什麼、說話和穿衣、和誰誰沒有發言權，你會感覺如何？那個世界的女人 你對她過去的生活和她談論它的熱情感到驚訝。而且，你完全同意。你不會想被鎖在丈夫身上——即使鎖鍊是金子做的。 「你說得對，我無法忍受那樣的生活。我不富有，也不養尊處優，作為一個農場工人長大，但我不能讓我的整個世界變成一個農場。我開始打獵只是為了遠離田野。” 「我是這麼認為的，從我們第一次談話開始，我就覺得你和我一樣。世界上有那麼多東西值得看、去品嚐、去感受！我希望你能記住這一點。” 」 你揚起眉毛，「我會嘗試，但首先我必須真正…你知道，自由。 」 「是的，是的，觸摸。這不是無期徒刑，只要你需要…或選擇在這裡，你就在這裡。就像對我來說一樣。 」 眉頭一挑，好奇地說：「這是什麼意思？ 」 她又恢復了往常的笑容：「時間不早了，我們就先到此為止。 「告訴你吧，你暫時保留這個墜飾盒，以提醒你這一切都可以是一次積極的經歷。相信我。」 說完，她伸了個懶腰，上樓睡覺。給你留下一個謎團和一堆菜餚。 洗完碗就上樓睡覺

passages.name: SketchNice
passages.content: "I did, and they're incredible!" you gush over her drawings, praising them. The blush in her cheeks spreads to her entire face. "Stop! I'm not that good." she gives you a light slap in mock anger while smiling, for once you're the one embarrassing her. "Besides," she says with a sly smile, "it's easy when I've got such a beautiful subject." Now is your turn to blush, causing you both to giggle. She ends up inviting you to pose for the next drawing. It would be a nude study of course. Upstairs. Now. Upstairs
passages.content_zh: 「我做到了，他們太不可思議了！」你滔滔不絕地欣賞她的畫作，稱讚它們。 臉頰上的紅暈蔓延到了整張臉。 「住手！我沒那麼好。」她微笑著假裝生氣地輕輕打了你一巴掌，這次你讓她難堪了。 “此外，”她狡猾地微笑著說，“當我有這麼美麗的主題時，這很容易。” 現在輪到你臉紅了，你們兩個都咯咯地笑了。她最終邀請你為下一幅畫擺姿勢。 這當然是一項裸體研究。 樓上。 現在。 樓上

passages.name: SketchTease
passages.content: "Meh, I've seen better." seems shocked by you just passing off her drawings, "Oh, well, yes, I'm not that good…" You smile at her and laugh, "Just kidding, you're very talented. You take a lot of pride in your pictures, don't you?" The blush in her cheeks spreads to her entire face. She gives you a light slap in mock anger while smiling, for once you're the one embarrassing her. After dinner is done, excuses herself upstairs, but notes that she'd be fine if you left the dishes for tomorrow... Just do the dishes. Forget the dishes! Go upstairs!
passages.content_zh: “嗯，我見過更好的了。” 似乎對你剛剛冒充她的畫感到震驚，“哦，好吧，是的，我沒那麼好……” 你對她微笑，笑道：“開個玩笑，你很有才華。你對自己的照片感到非常自豪，不是嗎？” 臉頰上的紅暈蔓延到了整張臉。她微笑著假裝生氣地輕輕打了你一巴掌，這次你是讓她難堪的人。 晚餐結束後，她上樓告辭，但指出如果你把碗盤留到明天就好了… 只是洗碗而已。 忘了菜！上樓吧！

passages.name: SketchMean
passages.content: "Meh, I've seen better." seems totally deflated by you just passing off her drawings. The blush in her cheeks spreads to her whole face, "Oh, well yes, I'm not really that good." She avoids your face while setting out dinner. It seems you've hurt her feelings quite a bit. Eventually, after eating, excuses herself upstairs, leaving you to clean up. Just do the dishes.
passages.content_zh: “嗯，我見過更好的了。” 看來你對她的畫作的冒充完全洩氣了。她臉頰上的紅暈蔓延到整張臉，“哦，是的，我真的沒那麼好。” 她在準備晚餐時避開你的臉。看來你已經深深傷害了她的感情。 最終，吃完飯後，她上樓告辭，留下你去清理。 只是洗碗而已。

passages.name: BarHunterAsk
passages.content: When the bartender eventually comes over to you, you lean across the bar to talk. In your best naive-sounding whisper you ask, "Is that one of those hunters?" He leans down close, "Sure is. They sure do stand out, don't they?" "They? Is there more than one?" "Oh, no…well…maybe? Not sure. We had one come through town a ways back. Pretty famous, you might have heard of him, the Blackwolf. He tried to help us out but…I don't think he made it." "The Blackwolf! Yes, he's famous! What happened? Did some monster eat him? Is it dangerous here?" He chuckles a bit, but puts on a reassuring tone, "not exactly. I wouldn't want to scare you, but we have a bit of a wytch problem in sleepy little Ridinghood." "A wytch! Oh my, how terrifying!" you exclaim in mock surprise. You're enjoying acting the part of a skittish young lass. "There there," he pats your shoulder for comfort, "she mostly goes after men. Nothing for a young lady like you to worry about. Besides, who knows - maybe the Blackwolf just ran off with the money." "He wouldn't do that!" you shoot back...maybe a little too quickly. The bartender raises an eyebrow for a moment before continuing, "No, I don't actually think he would, but you never know with these hunters. If it weren't for the wytch, I wouldn't want any of them in town. At least the Blackwolf had the decency to bugger off to do his job. This one barely drinks anything, just sits and takes up a table." You order a drink and try to strike up a casual-sounding conversation, "Say, what happened to that big guy in the black armor? The “hunter" was it?" The bartender rolls his eyes, "Oh him, the Ending, they call him. He's still here, up in his room." The Ending? Uh oh, you know that name. He's almost as famous as the Blackwolf. An older hunter, specializing in dealing with hauntings and magical creatures...like you. His nickname actually comes from being able to "end" those problems so well. "Oh? That's an interesting nickname." "Yeah, well I wish he'd 'end' his job already. Doing some kind of focus-ritualy-thing for days now. Not like the rest of us have to deal with a wytch problem while he dallies about. At least he's not taking up a table anymore." The Focusing Ritual! Of course! You've heard of it before, a week's worth of chastity and intense meditation to guard oneself against magic. You never put much stock into it, but now that you know magical energy is fueled by sex and imagination, it makes perfect sense. For a man, a week of meditation with no sex would probably build a reasonable defense against magic.that was before you really knew much about magic. At least you have a rough timeframe for when he's coming...but that doesn't ease the knot of fear in your stomach. You order a drink and try to strike up a casual-sounding conversation, "Say, what happened to that big guy in the black armor? The “hunter" was it?" The bartender rolls his eyes, "Oh him, the Ending, they call him. He finally decided to get to work I guess. Left already." "Oh, that's a shame," you say, having difficulty keeping from smiling as you take a sip of your drink. "Oh, that's a shame," you say worriedly. You take a sip of your drink to hide the rising fear you feel. The bartender smiles slyly back at you, "Why you asking? Fancy him?" You nearly spill your drink all over yourself in surprise, leaving the bartender laughing at his own joke. Back Leave
passages.content_zh: 當調酒師最終向您走來時，您靠在吧台上交談。你用你最天真的低語問道：“那是那些獵人之一嗎？” 他傾身靠近，“當然是。他們確實很引人注目，不是嗎？” “他們？不只一個嗎？” 「哦，不……呃……也許？不確定。我們很久以前就遇到過一個人。他很有名，你可能聽說過他，黑狼。他試圖幫助我們，但是……我認為他沒能成功。” 「黑狼！是的，他很有名！發生了什麼事？是被怪物吃了嗎？這裡危險嗎？」 他咯咯地笑了一下，但還是用了一種令人放心的語氣，“不完全是。我不想嚇到你，但我們在昏昏欲睡的小里丁胡德身上遇到了一點巫術問題。” 「一個巫婆！天哪，太可怕了！」你假裝驚訝地驚呼。你很享受扮演一個易受驚嚇的年輕女孩的角色。 “好了好了，”他拍拍你的肩膀尋求安慰，“她主要追求的是男人。像你這樣的年輕女士沒什麼可擔心的。此外，誰知道呢——也許黑狼只是帶著錢跑了。” 「他不會那樣做的！」你還擊……也許有點太快了。 酒保揚起眉毛片刻，然後繼續說道，“不，我實際上並不認為他會這麼做，但你永遠不會知道這些獵人的情況。如果不是因為女巫，我不會希望他們中的任何一個人進城。至少黑狼還得體地跑去幹他的工作。這個人幾乎不喝任何東西，只是坐著佔一張桌子。” 你點了一杯酒，嘗試著隨意的對話：“你說，那個黑甲大漢怎麼了？是‘獵人’嗎？” 酒保翻了個白眼，“噢，他，結局，他們這麼稱呼他。他還在這裡，在他的房間裡。” 結局？呃哦，你知道這個名字。他幾乎和黑狼一樣出名。一位年長的獵人，專門對付鬼魂和魔法生物……就像你一樣。 他的綽號實際上來自於能夠很好地「結束」這些問題。 “哦？這個暱稱很有趣。” 「是的，好吧，我希望他已經『結束』他的工作了。這幾天都在做某種專注儀式性的事情。不像我們其他人在他閒逛時必須處理一個巫術問題。至少他不再佔用一張桌子了。” 聚焦儀式！當然！你以前聽說過，一週的貞潔和強烈的冥想來保護自己免受魔法的侵害。你從來沒有投入太多的精力，但現在你知道魔法能量是由性和想像力推動的，它完全有道理。對一個男人來說，一週沒有性行為的冥想可能會建立起對魔法的合理防禦。那是在你真正了解魔法之前。 至少你對他的到來有一個大概的時間表……但這並不能緩解你內心的恐懼。 你點了一杯酒，嘗試著隨意的對話：“你說，那個黑甲大漢怎麼了？是‘獵人’嗎？” 酒保翻了個白眼，“噢，他，結局，他們這麼稱呼他。我猜他終於決定開始工作了。已經走了。” 「哦，真可惜，」你說，一邊抿了一口飲料，一邊忍不住微笑。 「哦，真可惜，」你擔心地說。你喝了一口酒，以掩飾內心不斷上升的恐懼。 調酒師狡猾地對你笑了笑，“你為什麼這麼問？喜歡他嗎？” 你驚訝地差點把酒灑了一身，讓酒保因為自己的笑話而大笑起來。 返回 離開

passages.name: HunterTalk
passages.content: You cautiously approach the table where the sits. He doesn't even look up from his book. You head upstairs to the inn's rooms. It might be the bartender's choice or just a cruel coincidence, but the has the same room as you did when you stayed here. You take a deep breath and knock softly on the door. "Um, hello, sir." you decide to make your voice sound hesitant and a little afraid. It's surprisingly easy because you're quite hesitant and a little afraid. He sighs and puts down his book. He takes his time but eventually opens the door. His eyes slide up and down your body, coming to a stop squarely on your chest.managing to look both pervy and judgmental at the same time. "Well hello there, pleasure to see a real beauty in a little hovel like this." "I'm sorry to bother you, but I heard some rumors, and I wanted to ask. Are you…a hunter?" "Aye, that I am," he smiles with a patronizing little roll of his eyes. He reaches inside one of the pockets on his belt, and pulls out a small card, all the while continuing to talk, "and while it pains me to say no to a rare beauty like yourself, please understand, I'm a very busy man." He hands you the card. It bears a small stamped sigil of the hunter's guild and a signature: "The Ending". His autograph. "There you go. Take that to keep me in mind. When I finish the job, do look me up. I know how to slay more than just monsters," he finishes with a slow, leery wink. He thought you were a fan? Worse, he thought you wanted to… Ew! Your face turns bright red as you realize what just happened. Mortified, you quickly thank him and rush out of the inn. He looks you over, sizing you up as a threat…before obviously and disappointingly deciding you aren't. "Yes?" "I'm sorry to bother you, but I heard some rumors, and I wanted to ask. Are you…a hunter?" "Aye, that I am," he smiles with a patronizing little roll of his eyes. He reaches inside one of the pockets on his belt, and pulls out a small card, all the while continuing to talk, "Listen kid, really pleased to meet you, but I hope you'll understand, I'm a very busy man." He hands you the card. It bears a small stamped sigil of the hunter's guild and a signature: "The Ending". His autograph. "There you go then. Take that, I'm sure all your friends will be very jealous." Your face turns bright red as you realize what just happened. He thought you were a fan! Mortified and nearly speechless, you quickly thank him and rush out of the inn. Leave The bartender confirms the is upstairs in his room. It might be the bartender's choice or just a cruel coincidence, but the has the same room as you did when you stayed here. You take a deep breath before knocking on the door. "Mr. hunter...um, Sir Ending??" The door opens quickly this time, causing you to jump in surprise. "Oh, you again." "I'm sorry to disturb you…" He cuts you off with a dismissive wave, "Listen , I'm flattered, really. But I'm busy now trying to cleanse and focus for my hunt. So unless you've got something that's going to help me with that, I'll wish you a good day." Cleanse? The Focusing Ritual! Of course! You've heard of it before, a week's worth of chastity and intense meditation to guard oneself against magic. You never put much stock into it, but now that you know magical energy is fueled by sex and imagination, it makes perfect sense. For a man, a week of meditation with no sex would probably build a reasonable defense against magic.that was before you really knew much about magic. At least you have a rough timeframe for when he's coming...but that doesn't ease the knot of fear in your stomach. $(function() {$("#layer8 img").attr('src', 'resources/avatar/layer8/' + State.variables.faceState + '/smirk.png')}); Just leave Tell him about "Oh, I see. Ok, I'll just…uh…go. Sorry to bother you again!" "Nah, I get it. I have that effect on the ladies. Tell you what, I'll be swinging back through town after the hunt. Look me up then and we can have a bit of fun." With that, he gives you a sly wink and closes the door, leaving you a little grossed out and alone in the hallway. He just nods gruffly and slams the door, leaving you embarrassed and alone in the hallway. Leave You smile coyly, "I'm glad you asked. That actually is the reason I came. I have some information that might help your hunt." He narrows his eyes at you before nodding and opening the door. "Ok, I'm listening." "I know the wytch. I've seen her cabin in the mountains, I've even been inside." He leans against the door frame, keeping his suspicious look. "Really? And how is it you know all this?" Lie Admit you're her prisoner Admit you're the Blackwolf "I…uh…also live in the mountains. I've seen her coming and going, we talk on occasion, I've even picked up things for her from the market. Not to mention I know a few woodsmen, and she's no stranger to them…if you know what I mean." "Seems like you know her pretty well, why turn her in to me?" "Self preservation! She hasn't done anything to me yet, but I don't know if it will last forever. Also, in case you haven't noticed, I'm also a redhead, I'd hate for a hunter like you to make a mistake and come after me instead!" A smile curls up his lips, "I'll be honest, I thought so too at first. But your eyes are the wrong color. And your tits don't match the stories." You're shocked at how direct - and insulting - he is about your chest! You’re relieved to not be under suspicion, especially as you notice a glint of light behind the door frame and realize he's been holding a sword this entire time. Looking at the polished blade, you shiver a little at the thought of how close you were to danger. He snickers a little as you stare at the sword. "Can't be too prepared. So what can you tell me about the wytch?" "I…actually I live there." He chuckles slightly and takes a step back. "Mysterious redhead with huge knockers, coming down from the mountain just to talk to me. I knew it!" as he moves, you catch the glint of a blade from behind the door! Combat instinct kicks in and you sidestep his his first lunge at you. You spin off your dodge in a fluid motion and rush forward to shove him off balance. Hopefully that will give yourself a chance to explain, or at least escape. This time however, your instincts fail you. You learned your combat moves when you were much larger and much, much stronger - you push against him with all your weight and it does nothing! It's like pushing against a stone wall! The hunter takes the advantage to grab and slam you - painfully - against the door. You cry out in desperation as he raises his sword to finish you off, "I'm her servant! Her prisoner!" He's still holding his sword up, ready to strike, but pauses, "And how do I know you're not the wytch, come here to get me first?" "I've had plenty of chances to cast a spell on you, and I didn't. And my eyes are green! Surely the villagers told you the wytch's eyes are violet, right?" He seems to think it over for a few seconds before slowly lowering his blade and releasing you. "Fair enough," he glances downwards, "in my defense though, they emphasized the tits more, and well…""now that you mention it, the tits don't match the stories either." "Yeah, thanks for reminding me," you're suddenly feeling very self-conscious, and try to cover yourself by crossing your arms. Unfazed, he continues, "so you want me to help your situation? To escape her?" "YES! I've been trapped there for weeks!" "Well, you've come to the right place, a hunter is exactly what you need. But..." a crooked smile crawls across his face, "there is the matter of price. We hunters don't work for free." What? This son-of-an-ogre wants you to pay him? After the town already has? "I'm sorry, but as I told you, I'm a slave. I have nothing to pay you with." your face has started to turn red, this time in anger. He misreads your emotions again, "No need to be shy, lass. You have plenty to pay with." he emphisizes his slimy request with a slow, obvious look up and down your body. You turn away, trying your best to calm yourself down before you explode. He relents for the moment, "Tell you what, as I said, I'm fasting at the moment, so we'd have to wait until later for such pleasantries. For now, why don't you tell me what you know about the wytch?" "I…actually I live there." He chuckles slightly and takes a step back. "Mysterious redhead with huge knockers, coming down from the mountain just to talk to me. I knew it!" as he moves, you catch the glint of a blade from behind the door! Combat instinct kicks in and you sidestep his his first lunge at you. You spin off your dodge in a fluid motion and rush forward to shove him off balance. Hopefully that will give yourself a chance to explain. This time however, your instincts fail you. You learned all your moves when you were much larger and much, much stronger - you push against him with all your weight and it does nothing! It's like pushing against a stone wall! The hunter takes the advantage to grab and slam you - painfully - against the door. You cry out in desperation as he raises his sword to finish you off, "I'm the Blackwolf!" He's still holding his sword up, ready to strike, but pauses, "What?" "The first hunter sent to kill the wytch was the Blackwolf. She caught me and changed me into a…into this." Despite the being pinned up against a wall, admitting this makes you drop your eyes in shame. The next thing you hear is raukous laughter as he lets you go. "Gods! You are Blackwolf! I see it in your eyes! Now this is a surprise! Got yourself in a fine mess." Your face burns bright red, "It wasn't my fault, she had a succubus that distracted me!" "Did you prepare against spells to protect yourself? Of course not. Never send a beast hunter to do a wytch hunter's job. Rushing in cock-first. Looks like that won't be an issue for you anymore! Nice tits though." "Yeah, thanks for reminding me," you"re suddenly feeling very self-conscious, and try to cover yourself by crossing your arms. When he finally finishes laughing, he puts away his sword and gets to business, "And I suppose you want my help to finish your job?" "No, it's not that!" you blurt out defensitely. "You want help with your…situation then?" He narrows his eyes, "Not that I wouldn't help if I could, but you know as well as I do that we don't dabble in magic. And I won't risk asking the wytch - too dangerous giving her a chance to speak. Best I can offer you now is a good fucking after we slay the wytch." You drop yor gaze again as a flood of conflicting emotions come over you. Your feelings fight between the Guild and , your old body and this new one, and whether you want to slap this hunter in the face or kick him in the balls more. He seems to mistake your thinking for disappointment, and pats you on the head, "Sorry Blackwolf, that was unkind. Tell you what, I can put in a good word for you with the Guild. Women aren't allowed to be hunters, but maybe they could find something for you. Maybe a cook or something? “First thing’s first though, we have to defeat the wytch. What can you tell me about her?"
passages.content_zh: 你小心翼翼地靠近他們坐的桌子。他甚至沒有從書本上抬起頭來。 您上樓前往旅館的房間。這可能是調酒師的選擇，也可能只是一個殘酷的巧合，但這裡的房間和你住在這裡時的房間是一樣的。你深吸一口氣，輕輕敲門。 「嗯，你好，先生。」你決定讓自己的聲音聽起來猶豫不決，而且有點害怕。這齣奇的簡單，因為你相當猶豫，而且有點害怕。 他嘆了口氣，放下書本。 他慢慢地，但最終還是打開了門。 他的目光在你的身體上上下滑動，最後停在你的胸口上。看起來既乖僻又挑剔。 “你好，很高興在這樣的小屋裡看到真正的美女。” “很抱歉打擾你，但我聽到了一些傳聞，我想問一下。你是……獵人嗎？” 「是的，我就是，」他微笑著，眼珠子轉動了一下，顯得居高臨下。 他把手伸進腰帶上的一個口袋，掏出一張小卡片，同時繼續說話，“雖然對像你這樣的罕見美女說不讓我很痛苦，但請理解，我是一個非常忙碌的人。” 他把名片遞給你。它帶有獵人公會的小印記和簽名：「結局」。 他的親筆簽名。 「好了。記住這一點，讓我牢記在心。當我完成工作時，一定要來找我。我知道如何殺死的不僅僅是怪物，」他緩慢而警惕地眨了眨眼睛。 他以為你是粉絲？更糟的是，他以為你想… 呃！ 當你意識到剛剛發生了什麼事時，你的臉變得通紅。 你羞愧地連忙道謝，然後衝出了客棧。 他打量你，將你視為威脅……然後很明顯、令人失望地決定你不是。 “是的？” “很抱歉打擾你，但我聽到了一些傳聞，我想問一下。你是……獵人嗎？” 「是的，我就是，」他微笑著，眼珠子轉動了一下，顯得居高臨下。 他把手伸進腰帶上的一個口袋，掏出一張小卡片，同時繼續說話，“聽著，孩子，很高興見到你，但我希望你能理解，我是一個很忙的人。” 他把名片遞給你。它帶有獵人公會的小印記和簽名：「結局」。 他的親筆簽名。 “那就這樣吧。拿著這個，我相信你所有的朋友都會非常嫉妒。” 當你意識到剛剛發生了什麼事時，你的臉變得通紅。 他以為你是他的粉絲！ 你羞愧得幾乎說不出話來，連忙道謝，然後衝出了客棧。 離開 酒保確認酒在樓上他的房間。這可能是調酒師的選擇，也可能只是一個殘酷的巧合，但這裡的房間和你住在這裡時的房間是一樣的。 敲門之前你深吸一口氣。 “亨特先生……嗯，恩丁先生？” 這次門開得很快，讓你嚇了一跳。 “噢，又是你。” “抱歉打擾你了…” 他輕蔑地揮揮手打斷了你，“聽著，我真的很受寵若驚。但我現在正忙著清理和集中精力去狩獵。所以除非你有什麼東西可以幫助我，否則我會祝你有美好的一天。” 潔淨？聚焦儀式！當然！你以前聽說過，一週的貞潔和強烈的冥想來保護自己免受魔法的侵害。你從來沒有投入太多的精力，但現在你知道魔法能量是由性和想像力推動的，它完全有道理。對一個男人來說，一週沒有性行為的冥想可能會建立起對魔法的合理防禦。那是在你真正了解魔法之前。 至少你對他的到來有一個大概的時間表……但這並不能緩解你內心的恐懼。 $(function() {$("#layer8 img").attr('src', 'resources/avatar/layer8/' + State.variables.faceState + '/smirk.png')}); 離開吧 告訴他關於 「哦，我明白了。好吧，我就……呃……走吧。抱歉又打擾你了！” “不，我明白了。我對女士們有這種影響。告訴你吧，狩獵結束後我會穿過城鎮返回。然後來找我，我們可以找點樂子。” 說完，他狡猾地向你眨了眨眼睛，然後關上了門，留下你一個人待在走廊裡，有點噁心。 他只是粗聲粗氣地點點頭，然後關上門，留下你尷尬地獨自一人在走廊上。 離開 你靦腆地笑了笑，“很高興你問了這個問題，這其實就是我來這裡的原因。我有一些信息，或許可以幫助你狩獵。” 他瞇起眼睛看著你，然後點點頭，打開了門。 “好的，我聽著。” “我認識那個女巫。我見過她在山上的小屋，甚至還進去過。” 他靠在門框上，保持著疑惑的表情。 “真的嗎？你是怎麼知道這些的？” 謊言 承認你是她的俘虜 承認你是黑狼 「我……呃……也住在山裡。我見過她來來去去，偶爾會說話，我什至還從市場上給她買過東西。更何況我認識幾個樵夫，她對他們並不陌生……如果你明白我的意思的話。” “看來你很了解她，為什麼要把她交給我？” 「自保！她還沒有對我做什麼，但不知道會不會永遠持續下去。還有，如果你沒有註意到，我也是紅發，我最討厭你這樣的獵人犯錯，來追殺我！” 他的嘴角揚起一絲微笑，“說實話，我一開始也是這麼想的。但是你的眼睛顏色不對。而且你的奶子和故事裡的不符。” 你對他對你胸部的直接和侮辱感到震驚！你因為沒有受到懷疑而鬆了口氣，尤其是當你注意到門框後面有一道閃光，並意識到他一直拿著一把劍時。看著那光滑的刀刃，一想到自己離危險有多近，你就有點發抖。 當你盯著劍時，他輕笑了一聲。 “準備得不能太充分。那麼你能告訴我關於女巫的事嗎？” “我……其實我就住在那裡。” 他輕輕一笑，後退了一步。 「有著巨大門環的神秘紅髮，從山上下來只是為了跟我說話。我就知道！」當他移動時，你會看到門後刀刃的閃光！戰鬥本能開始發揮作用，你避開了他對你的第一次衝刺。 你以流暢的動作旋轉閃避，衝上前去把他推得失去平衡。希望這會給自己一個解釋的機會，或至少逃脫。 然而這一次，你的直覺卻失敗了。當你變得更大、更強壯時，你就學會了戰鬥動作——你用你所有的重量推他，但沒有任何作用！ 就像推一堵石牆一樣！ 獵人趁機抓住你並把你狠狠地摔在門上。 當他舉起劍要殺死你時，你絕望地喊道：“我是她的僕人！她的囚犯！” 他仍然舉著劍，準備出擊，但停了下來，“我怎麼知道你不是女巫，先來這裡抓我？” 「我有很多機會對你施咒，但我沒有。而且我的眼睛是綠色的！村民們肯定告訴過你女巫的眼睛是紫色的，對吧？” 他似乎想了幾秒鐘，然後慢慢放下刀片並釋放了你。 “這很公平，”他低頭看了一眼，“但在我看來，他們更強調了乳房，而且……”“既然你提到了，乳房也與故事不相符。” 「是的，謝謝你提醒我，」你突然感覺很不自在，並試圖交叉雙臂來掩護自己。 他不為所動，繼續說道，“所以你想讓我幫助你的處境？逃離她？” “是的！我已經被困在那裡好幾個星期了！” “嗯，你來對地方了，獵人正是你所需要的。但是……”他的臉上浮現出一絲扭曲的微笑，“這裡有一個價格問題。我們獵人不是免費工作的。” 什麼？這個食人魔之子要你付錢給他？後鎮已經有了？ 「我很抱歉，但正如我告訴過你的，我是一個奴隸。我沒有什麼可以付給你的。」你的臉開始變紅，這次是因為憤怒。 他再次誤讀了你的情緒，「不用害羞，姑娘。你要付出的代價已經很多了。」他緩慢而明顯地上下打量你的身體，以強調他的黏糊糊的要求。 你轉過身去，盡力在爆發前讓自己冷靜下來。 他暫時緩和下來，“告訴你吧，正如我所說，我現在正在禁食，所以我們必須等到以後才能進行這樣的寒暄。現在，你為什麼不告訴我你對女巫的了解呢？” “我……其實我就住在那裡。” 他輕輕一笑，後退了一步。 「有著巨大門環的神秘紅髮，從山上下來只是為了跟我說話。我就知道！」當他移動時，你會看到門後刀刃的閃光！戰鬥本能開始發揮作用，你避開了他對你的第一次衝刺。 你以流暢的動作旋轉閃避，衝上前去把他推得失去平衡。希望這會給自己一個解釋的機會。 然而這一次，你的直覺卻失敗了。當你變得更大、更強壯時，你就學會了所有的動作——你用你所有的重量推他，但沒有任何作用！ 就像推一堵石牆一樣！ 獵人趁機抓住你並把你狠狠地摔在門上。 當他舉起劍要殺死你時，你絕望地喊道：“我是黑狼！” 他仍然舉著劍，準備出擊，但停了下來，“什麼？” “第一個被派去殺死女巫的獵人是黑狼。她抓住了我，把我變成了……變成了這個。” 儘管被釘在牆上，承認這一點會讓你羞愧地垂下眼睛。 當他放開你時，你接下來聽到的是刺耳的笑聲。 「諸神！你是黑狼！我從你的眼睛裡看到了！現在這真是一個驚喜！把你自己搞得一團糟。” 你的臉漲得通紅，“不是我的錯，是她有一個魅魔，讓我分心了！” 「你準備好對抗咒語來保護自己了嗎？當然沒有。永遠不要派一個野獸獵人來做巫師獵人的工作。先衝進雞巴。看來這對你來說不再是問題了！不過，奶子不錯。” 「是的，謝謝你提醒我，」你突然感覺很不自在，並試圖交叉雙臂來掩護自己。 當他終於笑完時，他收起了劍，開始說正事，“我想你需要我的幫助來完成你的工作吧？” 「不，不是那樣的！」你脫口而出。 「那麼你的……情況需要幫助嗎？」他瞇起眼睛，「並不是說我不會幫忙，但你和我一樣清楚，我們不涉足魔法。我不會冒險去問女巫——給她說話的機會太危險了。我現在能為你提供的最好的就是在我們殺死女巫之後好好地做愛。」 當大量矛盾的情緒湧上心頭時，你再次垂下目光。你的感情在公會和你的舊身體和新身體之間進行鬥爭，以及你是想打這個獵人的臉還是更多地踢他的蛋蛋。 他似乎把你的想法誤認為是失望，並拍拍你的頭，「對不起，黑狼，這太不友善了。告訴你吧，我可以在公會裡為你說幾句好話。女性不允許成為獵人，但也許她們可以為你找到一些東西。也許是廚師之類的？ 「首先，我們必須打敗女巫。你能告訴我關於她的什麼事嗎？ 」
